title: Software Developer (AI Integration Expert)
description:
PropZap — Build the Intelligence Behind a Platform That Millions Will Rely On|



PropZap is building a next-generation real estate platform designed to expand across North America.



But we're not just building software.



We're building the future of how people buy, sell, and experience real estate. And AI is at the center of that future.

Every agent who runs their business through the platform. Every client making one of the biggest decisions of their life. Every interaction, every message, every 
nt of clarity in a process that has always been complicated. That's what we're improving. That's what we're building toward.



AI is not a feature we're adding to the roadmap. It's becoming the foundation of how the platform thinks, responds, and grows. And we need someone who already knows how to build that, not someone learning on the job.



--------------------------------------------------------------

Role: Software Developer (AI Integration Expert)

Location: Remote (Philippines)

Role Type: Full-Time

Compensation: TBD



We believe great developers are force multipliers. We are willing to pay premium for developers who can integrate AI into real systems, think independently, and contribute to something that is built to last.



--------------------------------------------------------------

Company: PropZap — Building the next-generation real estate platform for North America

Why This Role Is a Big Opportunity



- Be part of the team shaping how AI gets built into a platform at scale

- Contribute to decisions that define the product, not just execute on them

- Build things that agents and clients interact with every single day

- Work on something that compounds, where every system you build makes the next one more powerful



If you've been sitting on real AI experience but working on projects that go nowhere, this is your chance to put that expertise into something that is actually growing. Fast.



--------------------------------------------------------------

What You'll Be Working On



You'll help design and build the intelligent systems that power the platform, including:

- AI integrations across backend services and workflows

- APIs and third-party integrations that leverage AI capabilities

- Internal tools and automations powered by AI

- Data pipelines and system architecture that support AI features

- Frontend contributions as needed to bring AI features to life



This role is about understanding how AI fits into a real product and building it in a way that works for the people using it, not just the people building it.



--------------------------------------------------------------

Responsibilities



AI Integration and Development

- Integrate AI tools, models, and services into existing and new platform features

- Build reliable, scalable systems that bring AI capabilities into production

- Connect AI to real workflows that agents and clients experience directly

- Stay ahead of where AI is going and bring that knowledge into the product



Back-End Engineering

- Design and build server-side systems that support AI-powered features

- Develop and maintain RESTful APIs that connect AI capabilities to the platform

- Ensure systems are secure, efficient, and well-documented



Code Quality and Ownership

- Write clean, maintainable, and production-ready code

- Review and contribute to a codebase built for the long term

- Document integrations, architecture, and processes thoroughly



Cross-Functional Collaboration

- Work closely with other developers on the platform team

- Contribute to architecture decisions and technical direction

- Support frontend requirements when needed to complete AI-driven features



Quality and Troubleshooting

- Test across environments and iterate based on real usage

- Debug issues across different parts of the system

- Build with reliability and performance in mind from the start



--------------------------------------------------------------

Who This Role Is Built For

- Someone who has already built AI into real products and knows what it actually takes in production.

- Someone who sees AI not as a trend to follow, but as a tool to wield with precision and purpose.

- Someone who wants to be part of building something that outlasts any single feature, and who understands that the best AI  work is invisible to the user but felt in everything they do.



Strong candidates typically:

- Have hands-on experience integrating AI into software products that real people use

- Know how to make AI practical, not just impressive

- Are comfortable working across backend systems and APIs

- Write clean, scalable code that others can build on

- Can work independently, move fast, and make thoughtful technical decisions

- Are energized by the idea of being early to something that is going to be very big



--------------------------------------------------------------

Technology Mindset

We're not hiring based on one specific stack or one specific AI tool.

We're looking for developers who know how to make AI work inside products that people actually rely on.

You should be comfortable with:



AI tools, APIs, and frameworks used in production environments

- Backend systems and server-side logic

- API design and third-party integrations

- Data structures and pipelines that support AI features

- Debugging across environments

- Writing production-ready code



--------------------------------------------------------------

What You Gain

- The opportunity to shape how AI is integrated into a platform that is scaling across North America

- A long-term role inside a company that is moving with real urgency and real vision

- Direct impact on how millions of people will experience real estate through technology

- Ownership over meaningful work, not isolated tasks handed down from above

- The chance to grow into a bigger role as the platform grows around you



The window to be early to something like this does not stay open forever.



--------------------------------------------------------------

How to Apply



Send the following to: 



- Resume

- Portfolio / GitHub (required)

- Summary of AI integration projects you've built or contributed to

- Expected compensation

- Internet speed test link

- Any DISC test result (if available)

- Intro video (optional but preferred)



Subject Line: Software Developer (AI Integration Expert) – Your Name



--------------------------------------------------------------

PropZap is moving fast. The platform is growing. And the people who help build the intelligence behind it will look back on this as the role that changed the trajectory of their career.

If that sounds like something worth being part of, we want to hear from you.

title: Revenue & Listing Optimization Specialist (Boutique Exclusive Short-Term Rental Company)
description:
WHO WE ARE: 

We are a high-end exclusive boutique short-term rental (STR) and design/launch company managing and launching high value properties. Current portfolio includes 6 high performing properties with growth of an additional 10 by end of the year.  



WHAT YOU CAN EXPECT: 

In working with us, you can expect to find a supportive, fast-growing team that values clear communication, ownership, and pride in your work. We trust our team to take initiative and solve problems, and we’re here to support you every step of the way.  



WHO WE ARE LOOKING FOR: 

We are looking for a data-driven, detail-oriented Revenue & Listing Optimization Specialist who can directly improve our properties performance, increase occupancy, and maximize revenue.  This is a performance-driven role, you will own these outcomes with the team's support. 



YOUR OBJECTIVES:

- Maximize revenue across all properties

- Optimize listings for conversion and visibility

- Support owner experience through clear reporting and insights

- Help build scalable systems for growth



DETAILED RESPONSIBILITIES FOR SUCCESS:  



>Revenue Optimization (PRIMARY FOCUS):

- Manage and optimize pricing using PriceLabs 

- Adjust pricing strategies based on:

    - Demand

    - Seasonality

    - Local events

    - Market trends

- Monitor occupancy and revenue performance across listings 



>Listing Optimization:

- Improve listing performance on:

    - Airbnb

    - Vrbo

    - Other Online Travel Agencies (OTA's)

- Optimize:

   - Titles

   - Descriptions

   - Photo order

    - Amenities

- Identify opportunities to increase conversion rates



>Performance Tracking & Insights:

- Track key metrics:

    - Occupancy rate

    - Average daily rate (ADR)

    - Revenue per property

- Provide insights and recommendations:

   - What’s working

    - What needs improvement

    - What actions to take next



>Owner/Client Experience Support:

- Assist with owner reporting (clear, professional, accurate)

- Support invoicing processes

- Help communicate performance improvements



>Systems & SOP Development (SECONDARY):

- Build and organize systems in Notion

- Create SOPs for repeatable processes

- Help structure internal workflows



YOUR PROVEN EXPERIENCE INCLUDES: 

- Must have strong knowledge and experience with:

    - PriceLabs Pricing Software Platform

   -  Hospitable Management Software

    - Airbnb, Vrbo, and other OTA platforms

- Data oriented; understand complex data and dashboard reporting 

- Familiarity with Notion platform



OTHER INHERENT SKILLS: 

- Analytical thinking and data interpretation

- Strong attention to detail

- Ability to make decisions based on data (not guesswork)

- Organized and systems-oriented

- Clear written communication



HOW TO APPLY



To be considered, MUST follow ALL instructions:



1. Start your application with this exact phrase:  "Optimizing Revenue is WHAT I DO"



2. Submit a 2–3 minute Loom video answering:

- How you have improved listing performance or pricing before

- How you approach pricing strategy

- A system or process you’ve built 



3. Answer this scenario:

“A property has 40% occupancy next month, while similar listings are at 65%"

What steps would you take to fix this?



4. Attach your resume



Thank you for taking the time to apply, look forward to connecting!

????

????

title: Video Editor: E-Commerce Videos ($40 per video)
description:

AdChefs works with e-commerce brands to build their in-house video editing teams. You get placed with one brand, work as part of their team, and get daily support from a lead who gives feedback and coaches you.



What We Are Looking For:

A full-time video editor for short-for
ta ads. You'll turn raw footage into 30-60 second creatives that stop the scroll and drive purchases.



Benefits of Joining Us:

- Stable, long-term relationship in a real e-commerce brand, without the instability of freelancing.

- $40 per video. Most editors complete 6 - 8 videos/week, averaging $1,000-$1,500/month

- Daily feedback from a dedicated lead who's invested in your growth

- The possibility to grow into a senior role, earning $1,500 - $2,000 per month



Qualifications:

- 3+ years in Adobe Premiere Pro and After Effects

- Portfolio with e-commerce or direct-response ad work (Meta preferred)

- Coachable and consistent, you take feedback and actually apply it



Responsibilities:

Edit high-converting short-form ads using provided A-roll, B-roll, and creative direction. Direct the pacing, music, transitions, hooks, and overall feel of every video.



You Should Not Apply If:

- You're looking for a side gig or already have a full-time commitment

- You don’t have experience editing ads for eCommerce brands

- You treat feedback as criticism instead of fuel



You Should Apply If:

- You want real in-house experience without giving up the flexibility of remote work

Next Steps:

Apply here: t.ly/yC9x9

title: Virtual Assistant for Events & Digital Brands
description:
Per hour rate:
per hour (Hours depending on project needs) Roughly 20 hours per week



We’re building some of the most recognised brands in the short term rental and accommodation space across Australia and New Zealand. That means conferences, podcasts, digital platforms, websites, content, and a lot of moving parts.



Right now, we’re looking for a self employed contractor who wants more than a standard VA gig. This is a hands on, fast paced support role sitting at the heart of three growing brands:



* STRIVE Conference

Industry leading events and awards bringing together property managers, owners, and suppliers across Australia, New Zealand, and beyond.



* The Accommodation Show

A long running podcast featuring operators, founders, and leaders in hospitality, travel, and short term rentals.



* iBooked.online

A digital agency focused on direct bookings, websites, SEO, and marketing strategy for accommodation businesses.



If you enjoy variety, problem solving, and being close to the action, you’ll feel right at home.



What You’ll Actually Be Doing



This role is deliberately broad. You’ll touch a lot of areas, without being expected to be an expert in all of them from day one.



Admin and operations

* Managing inboxes and basic diary coordination

* Organising data, lists, and spreadsheets

* Supporting day to day business admin across the brands



Content and marketing support

* Scheduling social media posts across multiple platforms

* Assisting with podcast uploads, episode assets, and show notes

* Helping prepare
 campaigns and announcements

* Light content editing and formatting



Web and tech support

* Simple WordPress edits and page updates

* Uploading content, images, and basic changes

* Working with tools like Google Workspace, social schedulers, and
 platforms



Events support

* Helping coordinate speakers, sponsors, and partners

* Keeping track of assets, deadlines, and comms

* Supporting event logistics before, during, and after delivery



You won’t just be following instructions. You’ll be encouraged to spot gaps, suggest improvements, and contribute ideas for content, campaigns, and processes.



Hours, Flexibility & Setup



* Around 20 to 60 hours per week

* Spread across 5 to 6 days

* Fully remote and flexible

* Work to your own rhythm, as long as things get done



This suits freelancers who like consistent work without being locked into rigid hours.



Who This Is Great For



This role is ideal if you:



* Are a freelancer or contractor looking for a long term client

* Enjoy variety rather than doing the same task all day

* Like hospitality, travel, marketing, media, or tech

* Want exposure to events and the short term rental industry

* Are organised, detail oriented, and proactive



You’ll be working with people and brands across Australia and New Zealand, and you’ll build genuine industry connections along the way.



Skills We’re Looking For



* Strong written English

* Confidence with Google Workspace

* Comfortable with social media tools

* Basic WordPress experience

* Good internet connection and a solid home setup

* Curious mindset and willingness to learn



You don’t need to know everything upfront. You do need to be reliable, switched on, and comfortable juggling priorities.



Growth & Pay



As your role expands and your impact grows, your rates will grow too. This is a relationship we want to invest in, not a short term stop gap.



How to Apply



Send us:



* A short intro about you

* A link to something you’ve worked on that you’re proud of

* Your hourly or project based rate



If you like being close to the action and want to grow alongside brands that are genuinely building something in this space, we’d love to hear from you.

title: Full-Time Video Editor (High-Touch Team | Growth-Focused Role)
description:
If you’re just looking for a stable job to pay the bills, this isn’t it.

If you want to grow, learn new skills, and become world-class at what you do — keep reading.



At 20x Agency, we’re a tight, high-touch team that works closely together, gives direct feedback, and moves fast. We don’t just “make videos.” We build stories that connect — and we expect everyone on the team to bring that same level of care and ownership.



???? What We’re Looking For



We’re hiring a full-time video editor who:

- Has strong storytelling instincts — knows how to spot the 
nt that matters.

- Loves feedback and uses it to improve fast.

- Thrives in structure, consistency, and collaboration.

- Takes ownership and doesn’t need to be chased.



If you’re used to freelancing with total flexibility, this will be a big shift.

If you want to actually get better every month, this is the place to do it.



???? What “High-Touch” Means

- Daily meetings. Be on time, every day.

- Fast replies. During work hours (8:00 am – 4:00 pm PH time), reply within 10 minutes.

- Consistency. Show up and finish your tasks on time.

- Ownership. If it’s assigned to you, it’s your responsibility to complete it — and update us early if you hit a roadblock.

- Growth mindset. We give direct feedback and expect to see progress.



If that sounds intense, that’s okay — it’s supposed to be.

We’re building a team that’s committed to growth, not comfort.



???? The Work

- Edit long-form content (podcasts, talking-head videos)

- Create graphics for YouTube thumbnails

- Write YouTube titles and short-form captions

- Edit short-form videos (TikTok, Reels, YouTube Shorts)

- Design carousel posts for Instagram and LinkedIn



???? Tools We Use

- CapCut (video editing)

- Canva (graphics + layout)

- Descript (clip review + selection)

- Google Chat (team communication)

- 
 (video review)



? Must-Haves

- CapCut and Canva experience 

- Excellent storytelling, pacing, and clip selection

- Full-time availability, 8:00 am – 4:00 pm PH time

- No other jobs or side hustles — this must be your main focus

- Solid English communication skills (Duolingo test after probation)

- Daily attendance and fast replies during work hours are non-negotiable



???? Career Growth & Salary



We reward reliability, improvement, and leadership — not just years of experience.



Role                    Salary Range                              Focus

Editor                    ?30,000 – ?40,000 / month      Core editing

Lead Editor            Up to ?50,000 / month              Training + mentorship

Management            Up to ?60,000 / month              Quality control + team support



If you grow, your role grows with you.



???? How to Apply (Follow Every Step)

1. Write a short note (in your own words) explaining why you’re a good fit for a high-touch, growth-focused team.

2. Share a link to one project you’re most proud of, and explain your role in it.

3. Provide a folder link with your full portfolio.

4. Include the code word “Chicken Adobo” somewhere in your message.



If you miss a step or forget the code word, your application will be skipped.



???? Hiring Process

- You may be asked to complete a short test project or have a quick call — the order can vary.

- The test helps us see your real storytelling and clip-selection instincts, not just polished edits.

- After the test, we’ll schedule a short call to meet and talk further.



If this post feels like a challenge and not a chore — that’s a good sign.

Apply today, and let’s grow together.

title: Creative Director
description:
Please copy the URL link for the detailed resume:







Creative Director, Brand & Visual Identity — 7 Leaves Cafe



We are not looking for someone to execute a brief. We are looking for someone who writes the brief.



7 Leaves Cafe is a 40+ location beverage brand built on exceptional quality, cultural depth, and a customer experience that is genuinely distinct. We have grown through product and community. Now we are ready to grow through design, and we need a creative leader who can own that chapter entirely.



The Role

This role exists to establish, protect, and elevate the visual identity of 7 Leaves across every surface — physical, digital, and experiential. You will be the first person who truly owns this function. You will report directly into leadership with full authority to champion design as a strategic asset. We are open to full-time, fractional, or a project engagement that transitions into a longer-term partnership.



What You Will Own



- Brand architecture — identity system, typography, color, photography, tone

- Retail and in-store experience — signage, packaging, physical touchpoints

- Digital and campaign design — social, marketing, launches

- Creative direction of external collaborators

- Brand governance — you set and hold the standard



Who You Are



- 8+ years in brand design, art direction, or creative leadership

- Portfolio that shows systems thinking, not just beautiful one-offs

- Experience building consumer brands in food, beverage, hospitality, or retail

- You have a point of view, can defend it, and know when to update it

- You are energized by ownership, not intimidated by it



What We Are Not Looking For

This is not a production role. Not a generalist freelancer. Not a trend-follower. We need creative vision, brand depth, and genuine conviction.



How to Apply

Skip the cover letter template. Send us:



1. Your portfolio (required — no exceptions)

2. 3–5 sentences on what you believe is visually underdeveloped about 7 Leaves today, based on what you've observed publicly

3. One project from your portfolio that proves you can do this job — and why

4. Your preferred engagement model and rate



Applications without a portfolio will not be reviewed. The brand note is not optional.

title: Video Editor (Short-Form Reels / CapCut) – Ongoing Work
description:
We’re hiring a high-level, fast video editor for ongoing short-form content (Reels/TikTok).



This is not a creative-heavy role — it’s about precision, speed, and consistency at scale.



You’ll be editing street interview content from live events, following a proven format:

 



----



ROLE

 • Cut footage into tight, engaging short-form edits

 • Add clean, accurate subtitles (must be perfect)

 • Apply consistent branding (logos, fonts provided)

 • Match existing style exactly — no guesswork



----



NON-NEGOTIABLES

 • Deliver within 12 hours of receiving footage (Work is scheduled in advanced so you'll know ahead of time)

 • Be highly responsive (we work fast)

 • Follow references exactly

 • Strong English — subtitles must be clean and natural



If you miss deadlines or need multiple revisions, this role is not for you.



----



TOOLS

 • CapCut preferred (or equivalent with same efficiency)



----



WHAT YOU GET

 • Ongoing, consistent work

 • Simple, repeatable editing system

 • Opportunity to grow into more advanced projects



----



TO APPLY (STRICT)



Only apply if you meet the above.



Send:

 1. 3–5 of your best short-form edits (Reels/TikTok)

 2. Your exact turnaround time for a 30–60 sec video

 3. Your rate (per video or hourly)



Start your application with: “12 HOUR EDITOR”



----



FINAL NOTE



We’re looking for someone who can:

 • Execute fast

 • Deliver clean work first time

 • Handle volume without drop in quality



If you’re average, you won’t last.

If you’re sharp, this will turn into ongoing work immediately.

title: Website Migration Specialist – GoHighLevel (Project-Based)
description:
We're a New Zealand digital agency looking for an experienced GoHighLevel website builder to migrate existing websites into GoHighLevel — rebuilding them like-for-like inside the GHL page builder.

We have an immediate batch of 9 websites to migrate (ranging from 1 to 9 pages), with ongoing project work available for the right person.

What the work involves

You'll be given access to an existing live website and asked to recreate it inside GoHighLevel as accurately as possible — matching layout, content, colours, fonts, and functionality. Each site is a standalone project with its own quote and timeline.

What we're looking for



Proven experience building websites inside GoHighLevel (not just funnels)

Strong eye for detail — pixel-accurate recreation matters

Able to match typography, spacing, colour schemes, and section layouts

Experience connecting custom domains in GHL

Able to work independently from a brief with minimal hand-holding

Fast turnaround — these are simple local business websites, not complex builds

Bonus: experience customising the GoHighLevel blog using custom CSS or code



What we're NOT looking for



People who will use templates that don't match the original

People who need a lot of back-and-forth to understand the brief

Designers who will "improve" the site rather than replicate it



How it works



Each project is quoted individually based on page count and complexity

You'll review the existing site and provide a fixed price quote before work begins

Payment on completion and approval

First batch of 9 sites available immediately — ongoing work for the right person



To apply, please include:



Examples of websites you have built inside GoHighLevel (live URLs preferred)

Your typical project rate for a simple local business website (quote per page count is fine)

A brief description of your migration process — how do you approach replicating an existing site?

If applicable, examples of GHL blog customisation using CSS or code

title: Customer Support Representative
description:
We’re looking for a sharp, quick-thinking Customer Support Representative. At our company, support goes beyond answering questions. It’s about guiding customers seamlessly through their gaming experience and ensuring every interaction is fast, clear, and dependable.



We’re seeking someone who takes pride in delivering exceptional service, thrives in a high-paced environment, and enjoys solving problems in real time. If you’re proactive, detail-oriented, and genuinely driven to help customers succeed, you could be a great fit for our team.



Key Responsibilities

1. Manage Intercom Live Chat, responding promptly to live chat,
, and occasional social media inquiries.

2. Troubleshoot unique scenarios and edge cases using logic, judgment, and customer-first thinking — not scripts.

3. Proactively update customers on order status by coordinating with our internal team and third-party suppliers.

4. Communicate clearly, professionally, and naturally, no robotic replies or over-reliance on AI.

5. Identify opportunities to streamline the support experience and improve internal systems and workflows.

6. Collaborate closely with tea
mbers and suppliers to ensure smooth delivery from start to finish.

7. Handle multiple tasks with urgency, accuracy, and strong attention to detail in a high-volume environment.



Ideal Candidate:

- Passionate about helping others: You have a natural desire to solve problems and help customers succeed in their goals.

- Excellent communicator: Your communication skills are top-notch, whether it’s written, via
 or live chat.

- Adaptable: You thrive in a fast-paced environment and are quick to learn new systems and technologies.

- Detail oriented: You pay attention and notice issues before customers even point them out.



Required Experience

- Experience with Intercom (highly preferred) or similar customer support platforms such as Zendesk or Freshdesk

- Previous customer support experience (live chat)

- Reliable high-speed internet

- Ability to work remotely with minimal distractions

- Load-shedding readiness (backup power, mobile hotspot, or contingency plan in place)



Training will be provided for Intercom if you haven’t used it before.



Why Work With Us?

- Be part of something bigger: Join a team that’s on a mission to revolutionize the video gaming space, with practical, results-  driven strategies and a global community of passionate players and creators.

- Dynamic team: Work with a passionate and growing team that is committed to excellence and innovation.

- Consistent workflow: Enjoy a structured work environment with clear expectations, steady tasks, and room to grow.

- Growth and learning: Professionally develop and grow skills with ongoing learning and advancements of responsibilities within the company.



YOU SHOULDN’T APPLY IF:

- You’re comfortable blending in rather than striving to stand out. This role is NOT simple and requires an all-in mentality. We’re looking for an applicant who will put in the work that others won’t

- You are married to your ideas or cannot take creative criticism.

- You can’t handle stress or pressure.



Think you’re a fit? Apply Today. Include the word ‘CACTUS’ in your message to us to show you’ve read the full post.

title: Xero Bookkeeper Australian Experience
description:
BeanGuru are bookkeepers for Busy Business owners. We love to help business owners manage their books to they can get back to their “Why they run their business”.



Would you like to help business owners get more time back? Do you like knowing you’ve made their job easier by using your amazing bookkeeping skills to do what they don’t have time to do? Are you detail oriented, positive, eager to learn and humble enough to ask questions?



If yes we’d like to invite you to become a valued member of our small but fast growing team.



We service small to medium businesses across Australia for their bookkeeping needs. We are a professionally run, highly systemised, Xero focused business that values our clients and our tea
mbers like family. And we love attention to detail.



Note you are working as a full time direct tea
mber with Bean Guru employed by us through our Philippines representative and not via an agency or offshoring middle person.





We are looking for a Bookkeeper who has worked with Australian Bookkeeping and GST as well as done client communication.



On your first day with us you’ll have at least 3+ years experience working with Australian bookkeeping operations including GST, IAS and BAS.



You’ll also already have extensive experience in XERO as well as the core aspects of bookkeeping:

- AR/AP - invoicing, statements, reconciliation, batch payments etc

- Bank and Ledger Reconciliations

- Data entry and transaction processing

- Basic reporting



Experience in payroll and superannuation would be highly regarded:



It also important that you have excellent spoken and written English, are a clear communicator, eager to learn/grow your skills and open to seeking help when needed.



As a finance professional you will have a comfortable and productive work environment, excellent internet access that supports video calling.



We look forward to meeting you. If you put the number 42 in your application to us we'll know you have attention to detail.



Benefits and Pay:

- Immediate start available

- Salary based on experience + many benefits including:

- 13-month pay

- All Paid PH Public Holidays

- Daytime (AU East Coast) work hours with some flexibility on start time

- Full-time EMPLOYMENT

- WORK FROM HOME



***Applicants must be LEGAL to work and currently residing in the Philippines***



Our hiring process will be a little bit different we want to hire great people with the right mindset and fit for our great company culture.



1. Reply to this ad with your resume and a covering letter telling us why you'd like to work with us and reason for change.

2. We will contact the short list and have a first interview.

3. We will do a skills test which will take roughly 60-90mins

4. Final interview with our founder Judith.

5. A call to say you made it welcome aboard.

title: Web Designer / WooCommerce Developer for 4 Simple E-Commerce Sites
description:
We are looking for a skilled and dependable web designer / web developer to help build and improve our website, 
, and possibly 3 other simple e-commerce sites for our company.



We prefer someone with strong English skills, good communication, a great attitude, and real experience building attractive, clean, user-friendly online stores. We have worked with Shopify, but it did not work well for us. At this time, we prefer WooCommerce, though we are open to hearing other recommendations if you strongly feel another platform would be better for SEO, ease of use, and long-term success.



We want someone who understands not only design, but also SEO, product organization, and how to build stores that are easy for customers to shop. We are especially interested in someone who may also be able to help import or transfer listings from Amazon and Etsy into our new websites efficiently.



We are open to candidates who use AI tools to help with workflow, productivity, SEO, content, or design. If needed, we may help provide access to AI tools for the right person.



What we are looking for:



Strong English communication

Experience building e-commerce websites

Strong WooCommerce experience preferred

Good eye for clean design and layout

Knowledge of SEO best practices

Ability to import or recreate product listings from Amazon and Etsy

Dependable, honest, and detail-oriented

Good pricing for long-term work



About the role:



Help improve and build 

Possibly build or assist with 3 additional simple e-commerce sites

Make sure the sites are clean, functional, and SEO-friendly

Help organize products and content

Possibly assist with product imports and setup

Long-term opportunity for the right person



To apply, please answer these questions clearly:



1. Would you accept PayPal payments or Wise?

2. What would your estimated cost be for helping with 4 simple e-commerce sites?

3. When could you start?

4. Please send a working link to your portfolio

5. Do you have any questions for us?



Please also tell us about any other useful skills you have, especially with:



WooCommerce

SEO

Amazon / Etsy product importing

AI tools

Graphic design

Website maintenance

Speed optimization



We are looking for someone with a good attitude who may be a strong long-term fit for our company.

Thank you and look forward to hearing from you soon.

title: EXPERIENCED Product Lister, Optimizer & Product Researcher | Fashion Dropshipping
description:
Hi Future teammember,



We are looking for the most HUNGRY Product Lister & Optimizer for our fashion dropshipping business:



At this 
nt our company is launching
products per week. All those products need to be listed on time. 

Besides that we have new winning products every single day that need to be optimized by adjusting the price, size chart, images, description, title, etc. This is a full-time job and we are going to scale the amount of products in the next few months. 

Does this sound like it's your piece of cake? Read further.



The future of the job:

We will also teach you how to do product research and find these
products per week. You are going to analyse our current winners and losers. Eventually when we scale up our weekly products we will need more listers and you will work in a team of listers. 



**DON'T RESPOND if you have 0 experience and you JUST want to do product listing.



------



Is this you?:

- Minimum 1 year experience in product listing for fashion dropshipping 

- Minimum 1 year experience in product optimizing for fashion dropshipping 

- You are HUNGRY to grow (our best employees worked with us for 1.5+ year and grew into managing positions)

- You work extremely detailed (eye for detail)

- You work extremely organized and structured (you can make and organize your own sheets)

- You work fast and want to do more than necessary 



------



Salary: we will start with $3 per hour. We always work with KPI's, meaning you will make X amount of listings in Y amount of time. There is always work to do in our business so you can work minimum 40 hours per week. Sundays are off. We always reward based of your commitment (hitting KPI's, doing more work, learning).

title: EXPERIANCED PINTEREST MEDIA BUYER
description:
Do you have experience with Pinterest mediabuyng?

title: Creative Designer
description:
Fusion Vine is a remote-first company focused on building scalable systems by combining skilled talent with AI-powered workflows. We support businesses through content, creative, and digital execution while prioritizing efficiency, clarity, and quality.



Our team is distributed globally and operates with clear SOPs, structured feedback, and performance-based growth. We value execution, accountability, and continuous improvement.



Role Overview

We are hiring a Creative Specialist to support our visual content needs and reduce reliance on subcontractors. This role focuses on producing high-quality, on-brand visual assets using a mix of design tools and AI-assisted platforms.

This is a priority role aimed at bringing creative work in-house while maintaining speed, consistency, and quality.



Key Goal

Reduce dependency on external subcontractors by producing consistent, high-quality visual assets internally.



Responsibilities

Create visual content using Canva Pro, Photoshop, and AI tools

Produce graphics for digital use (social media, marketing, content assets, etc.)

Use AI tools (e.g., InVideo or similar) to assist with creative production

Follow brand guidelines, templates, and creative briefs

Edit, resize, and optimize images for different platforms

Manage workload efficiently and meet deadlines

Apply feedback quickly and accurately



Skills & Requirements

Proven experience with Canva Pro (required)

Working knowledge of Photoshop

Experience or familiarity with AI creative tools (e.g., InVideo, nano banana, midjourney, kling.ai)

Strong attention to detail and visual consistency

Ability to follow creative instructions and SOPs

Reliable internet connection and suitable device for design work



Workload Expectations

Approx.
images per month for full time work

Volume may vary depending on project needs and performance



If you’ve read this far, please include “TACOS” in the subject line when applying for this role.



Compensation

Hourly, based on experience and skill level

Final rate discussed during the hiring process





Apply here:  
/widget/form/E7ttlpvV8o0QITxC5IqC

title: If You Only Edit Short-Form… Don’t Apply (Long-Form Editor Needed)
description:
Most video editors can’t do this.



And that’s not an insult…



It’s just reality.





If your entire skillset is:



- Adding captions

- Zoom cuts every 2 seconds

- Throwing random B-roll on top of talking heads

- Matching words to text like karaoke



This is NOT for you.



Seriously… don’t apply.





Because what we’re building requires a completely different brain.





What we actually need (read this twice):



We’re looking for a long-form video editor who can:



Zoom OUT before they zoom in



Understand the point of a video before touching the timeline



Edit with intention… not decoration



Tie every cut, visual, and pacing decision back to a bigger narrative



This is NOT about making things “more engaging” with noise.



This is about making things more compelling with structure.





Here’s the problem we keep running into…



Editors who come from short-form think:



“More visuals = better edit”



So what happens?



- Every sentence gets a caption

- Every 3 seconds gets a cut

- Every idea gets drowned in unnecessary B-roll



And the final product?



Feels busy… but empty.



Looks edited… but not thought through.



We don’t want that.





What great looks like to us:



You watch a 20-minute video…



And you’re not thinking about transitions or effects…



You’re locked into the story.



Everything feels intentional.



Every cut earns its place.



The pacing breathes.



And when it ends…



You remember the message.





This role is for you if:



You’ve edited long-form content (10+ minutes) like:



- YouTube videos

- Podcast videos



And more importantly…



You think in:



- Narrative arcs

- Retention flow

- Emotional pacing

- Information hierarchy



Not just:



- Effects

- Presets

- Templates





Damaging truth:



This kind of editing is slower.



It takes more thinking.



More rewatching.



More restraint.



BUT…



The end result is 10x more powerful…



And that’s what we care about.





What you’ll be responsible for:



Taking raw long-form footage and shaping it into a cohesive, compelling story



Making editing decisions based on the goal of the video… not habits



Enhancing clarity, flow, and retention without over-editing



Knowing when to add… and when to leave things alone





What we don’t care about:



- Fancy transitions

- Overused editing tricks

- How fast you can pump out clips





What we DO care about:



Taste



Judgment



Restraint



Storytelling ability





How to apply (this is important):



Do NOT send us short-form edits.



We will ignore them.



Instead, send:



2–3 long-form projects (10+ minutes) you’ve edited



And tell us:



- What was the goal of the video?

- What editing decisions did you make to support that goal?

- What did you intentionally choose NOT to do… and why?





If you read this and thought:



“Finally… someone gets it.”



We want to see your work.





If you read this and thought:



“This seems like overthinking editing…”



This is not for you.





Reply with your portfolio.



Or don’t.



Your call.

title: Credit Repair Specialist

title: Record Label Sales Manager
description:
Pex Life Records LLC is an independent record label dedicated to producing high-quality urban music focused on health, personal relationships, financial literacy, peak performance, bodybuilding, meditation, and spirituality. Founded by Wilmarck, our music merges influences from Kanye West and Drake with motivational themes inspired by Tony Robbins. With over 1,000
 subscribers and 20,
 followers, we aim to inspire and uplift through our music.



Position: Music Manager



We are looking for a music manager responsible for:

- Pitching proposals to songwriting job boards

- Keeping our books and managing contracts

- Driving success by boosting profits and hitting sales targets

- Leading and inspiring the team to deliver stellar performance

- Recruiting, hiring, and guiding contractors

- Managing operations, scheduling, and compliance

- Creating memorable customer experiences

- Onboarding and training new hires

- Communicating seamlessly with stakeholders

- Working 45-50 hours/week, including evenings, weekends, and holidays

- Lifting up to 25 pounds when needed



Disclaimer: Prospects will respond outside of scheduled hours. There will be an established 8-hour window where you’ll be expected to respond within an hour. Ex. Your schedule hours will be 6:30 PM -3:00 AM EST (From 3-11 PM EST if a prospect responds to a proposal, you’ll be expected to respond. Each response should take 5-15 mins. You can expect 3-5 responses per week. The additional hours may be deducted from your regular schedule if it exceeds 50 hours.



Contract Details

- Hourly Rate: $2.81/hr USD + 10%-15% of revenue

- Monthly Compensation: $505-$900 + commission

- Initial Hours: 10 hours/week, increasing to 45 hours/week over 45 days

- Training: Paid training provided

- Raises: Based on work performance



Hiring Process

This is an audition-based hiring process. We will select 3-5 candidates for a paid audition. After reviewing your work, we'll choose one full-time hire.

- Interview: To assess mutual fit

- Notification: Candidates will be contacted within 48 hours regarding audition status

- Video Chat: For day 1 of the audition



Responsibilities

Immediate Focus:

- Pitching to Songwriting Job Boards

- Album Launch Tasks

- Bookkeeping

- Onboarding & Interviewing Staff

- Explaining service and product prices

- Answering customer inquiries

- Obtaining customer information for shipping/services

- Managing our production team

- Communicating with tea
mbers/leaders

- Hitting monthly revenue goals



Future Responsibilities (If Qualified):

- Leading meetings

- Managing teams

- Reporting analytics

- Servicing customers



Skills and Qualifications

Essential:

- Persistence and determination

- Proposal writing skills

- Time management

- Product knowledge

- Customer service proficiency

- Strong English speaking/writing skills

- Reliable internet connection



Ideal Candidate Qualities

- Flexible and eager to learn

- High integrity and commitment

- Relentless execution

- Ability to work independently

- Competitive spirit

- Receptive to constructive criticism

- Effective communication skills



Benefits

 

Music Manager Incentive Program

The program motivates music managers to achieve monthly revenue goals, fostering a productive environment.



Eligibility: Current management team as of Jan 12, 2025

New hires must be with Pex Life Records for 6 months to qualify

Monthly Revenue Goals and Benefits:

- At $1,200 Minimum:

  - Guaranteed Pay: $675 Minimum

  - Commission: 10% on qualifying sales

  - Additional Benefits: 13th Month Pay, Internet Costs Reimbursement, Profit Sharing, PhilHealth Reimbursement



- At $2,400 Minimum:

  - Guaranteed Pay: $900 Minimum

  - Commission: 15% on qualifying sales

  - Additional Benefits: Social Security System Reimbursement, Pag-IBIG Fund Reimbursement, 50% HMO Expenses, Profit                    Sharing

- Contractual Availability

- Flexible Scheduling: Choose your working days/hours

- Job Sharing: Train others to complete your tasks

- Revenue Lock-In Structure

- Contractual lock-in for pay based on hitting revenue goals over 2-12 months.

- Compensation

Monthly Salary: $505 USD (ifgoal isn't attained)

Start Date: 2 weeks after the interview (if selected)

Long-term Position: 32-40 hours/week

Available Hours: Sunday-Thursday 6:30 PM EST - 3:00 AM EST

Work Location: Remote



Only one position is available; apply now!



Application Instructions

In your proposal, please start with "purple elephant" to confirm you've read this job description. Include components of sales management such as writing proposals to acquire clients, appointment setting, and performing introductory calls to close clients. If we'd like to move forward, we'll send you a screening exercise followed by an interview invite if you pass.

title: Apex Futures Mentor (Payout Proven) – Manage & Train 2 Scholars | Makati Hybrid
description:
Company: Nonprofit NGO Trading Group

Location: Philippines Only (Makati/Manila preferred)

Work Style: Hybrid (In-person + Virtual)

• Makati in-person: 3x/week, 4–5 hours/day

• Other days: virtual monitoring/coaching

• Mostly evenings (PH time) | Mon–Fri

Salary: PHP 6,500/month (can go up if traders progress and produce payouts in coming months)





Mission



We’re a nonprofit NGO using disciplined FUTURES trading to help fund charitable programs. This role is for someone who wants to mentor with purpose, structure, accountability, and real trader development.







Who We Need



We’re hiring a FUTURES Mentor + Manager to oversee two scholar traders, primarily trading NASDAQ futures (NQ).



There are many traders who “know how to trade.” What we need is someone who knows how to get to payout under prop firm rules, especially Apex trailing drawdown, and can teach that process step-by-step.



If you only know Forex, do not apply.





What You’ll Be Responsible For



You will be accountable for the growth and progress of two traders:

• Monitor trades daily (execution, entries/exits, discipline)

• Track and review P&L and account progression

• Ensure strict rule compliance (no gambling, no over-risking)

• Teach and enforce futures prop rules, especially:

• Apex Trader Funding (Top Priority – Futures Only)

• Trailing drawdown management

• Daily loss limits / risk limits

• Consistency rules and payout readiness

• Deliver structured feedback and improvement plans

• Keep both traders accountable

• Send daily progress updates to the nonprofit team





Minimum Qualifications (Strict)



Apply only if you meet ALL of the following:

• 2+ years professional FUTURES trading experience

• Real experience with Apex funded accounts

• At least one verified payout from Apex (or similar futures prop firm)

• Proof required (screenshot OK)

• Can clearly teach:

• Trailing drawdown

• Risk management & consistency rules

• Compliance + payout preparation

• Can commit to in-person Makati mentoring 3x/week (4–5 hours/day)





Disqualifiers



Do not apply if:

• You only trade Forex

• You cannot show proof of payout/funded results

• You use martingale, revenge trading, or other high-risk methods



 FUTURES ONLY. NOT Forex.



Apply via WhatsApp Only



Message Michelle on WhatsApp:


Send:

1. Short resume / background

2. Proof of futures trading experience

3. Proof of at least one payout (screenshot OK)

4. Apex + other prop firm experience

5. Availability confirmation (Makati 3x/week + evenings)

title: Remote Research & Writing Training Program (Paid)
description:
Church Nonprofit – Character and Reliability Required

Our church nonprofit is building a long-term training and selection program for individuals who may later support our nonprofit initiatives.

This is a paid remote training program where participants complete structured learning modules and produce written and presentation-based work.

However, before anything else, character and reliability come first.

________________________________________

Character and Work Ethic Come First

We carefully evaluate character during the first sessions.

Many people may be intelligent or academically capable. But if we do not see reliability, respect, and strong work ethic early on, we will not be able to continue working with that candidate.

We look for people who:

•	follow through on commitments

•	communicate respectfully

•	provide consistent progress updates

•	complete assignments they start

•	take responsibility seriously

If someone stops responding, disappears, abandons work midway, or fails to communicate, this shows a reliability problem and the program will end for that applicant.

Our nonprofit depends on people who finish the work they start.

If you are dependable, responsible, and respectful in communication, you will likely do very well here.

________________________________________

About the Training Program

Participants complete structured study modules and produce:

•	research-based essays

•	PowerPoint presentations with speaker notes

•	organized written work based on assigned topics

The program evaluates:

•	writing ability

•	research and analysis

•	communication

•	discipline and consistency

•	professionalism and integrity

This is designed for applicants who enjoy studying and learning and want to strengthen their academic and professional skills.

________________________________________

Pay and Program Structure

Pay: ?4,500 per completed program

Program format:

•	15 structured modules

•	8-week session

•	self-paced and competency-based

•	strong applicants often finish in about 7 weeks

Each module requires:

•	APA-style essay

•	PowerPoint presentation with speaker notes

•	proper citations and references

Module 15 is a final capstone project.

________________________________________

Available Program Tracks (Choose One)

Applicants must select one program track.

Program A – Criminal Justice and Community Safety

Topics include justice systems, criminology, crime prevention, and community safety.

Program B – Healthcare Administration and Community Health

Topics include healthcare systems, policy, management, and community health programs.

Program C – Nursing, Health Promotion, and Community Care

Topics include community health nursing, prevention strategies, and patient education.

Program D – United States Studies

Topics include U.S. history, society, culture, and civic institutions.

________________________________________

Integrity and Original Work

All work must be original.

AI tools may be used only for support, such as:

•	brainstorming

•	outlining

•	grammar support

However:

•	copying or plagiarism is not allowed

•	sources must be cited properly in APA style

•	originality checks are used

________________________________________

Who Should Apply

You should have:

•	a college degree, or

•	a strong academic background with strong reading and writing ability

You must also be:

•	studious and intellectually curious

•	a quick learner

•	strong in writing and organized thinking

•	comfortable communicating through WhatsApp

•	able to provide daily progress updates

•	dependable and responsive

•	respectful and professional

This opportunity works best for people who take commitments seriously and complete the work they start.

________________________________________

What This Can Lead To

Applicants who demonstrate strong work ethic, honesty, and consistent performance may be invited into ongoing paid work supporting our nonprofit programs.

We continue working only with people who show:

•	reliability

•	consistent communication

•	dependable work quality

•	professionalism and trustworthiness

________________________________________

How to Apply

Send your application through WhatsApp:


Please include:

1.	Updated resume

2.	Full name and timezone

3.	Daily availability (hours per day)

4.	Program choice (A, B, C, or D)

5.	Writing sample (1–2 pages, APA style)

6.	PowerPoint sample (5–10 slides with speaker notes)

7.	Confirmation statement:

"I understand originality checks are used. AI may only be used for assistance. I will submit only original work and include proper citations where required."

________________________________________

Additional Documents

Please also
 the following to:


 

Required:

•	Resume / portfolio

•	School diploma (front and back)

•	Transcript of Records (front and back)

For nursing graduates:

•	BSN diploma

•	CHED verification of degree equivalency

•	RN license copy if available

________________________________________

Qualified applicants may be invited for a phone interview.

Please read the full post carefully before asking questions already answered here.

________________________________________

title: Tutoring Remote Work - Fresh Nursing Grads or RNs ONLY
description:
Online Nursing Healthcare Tutor Clinical Documentation Improvement Track



“Fresh Nursing Graduates or Registered Nurses Welcome”



Online Nursing / Healthcare Tutor

Clinical Documentation Improvement (CDI) Track

Fresh Nursing Graduates or Registered Nurses Welcome

Nonprofit Academic Initiative – Philippines

Gig-Based Engagement

We are currently in the early development stage of a nonprofit academic initiative focused on strengthening healthcare education and building a future Clinical Documentation Improvement (CDI) group in the Philippines.

At this stage, the program is still being carefully developed. Planning and discussions are ongoing as we structure the initiative and determine how the training and tutoring components will operate.

Our long-term goal is to create structured opportunities for nursing graduates to participate in Clinical Documentation Improvement work.

CDI is a growing field in healthcare where nurses often perform very well because of their clinical background, critical thinking ability, and understanding of patient care. With additional exposure to medical coding concepts and documentation standards, nurses can transition into valuable documentation improvement roles.

We are seeking Bachelor of Science in Nursing (BSN) graduates, including fresh graduates, who can assist with online tutoring and academic guidance in healthcare-related subjects.

Registered Nurses are preferred, but an RN license is not required.

This role begins on a gig basis while the initiative is still developing. If the program progresses successfully, a more structured engagement may be discussed in the future.

________________________________________

Role Responsibilities

•	Provide structured online tutoring in healthcare and nursing subjects

•	Assist students in improving academic performance

•	Support understanding of clinical documentation practices

•	Introduce basic awareness of medical coding concepts

•	Help develop foundational materials for future CDI training

•	Monitor student progress and provide academic feedback

________________________________________

Qualifications

•	Bachelor of Science in Nursing required

•	Fresh graduates are welcome to apply

•	RN license preferred but not mandatory

•	Strong academic performance

•	Interest in clinical documentation or medical coding is an advantage

•	Professional, responsible, and detail-oriented

•	Good communication skills

________________________________________

Compensation

This is a gig-based opportunity with performance-based compensation.

Because the initiative is still in development, compensation structure may be adjusted as the program evolves.

Further details may be discussed with selected applicants.

________________________________________

Application Requirements

All documents must be submitted in clear PDF format scanned at 600 DPI or higher for clarity.

Please submit the following:

1.	Updated resume or portfolio

2.	BSN diploma (front and back, even if blank)

3.	Transcript of Records (front and back)

4.	CHED verification for equivalency of your BSN degree

5.	If you hold an RN license, include a copy (front and back)



Send all documents to:





Incomplete or unclear submissions will not be reviewed.

Thank you.

title: Experienced Buyer for ecommerce company
description:
Our US-based ecommerce company is looking for a very experienced and excellent Buyer (there are positions for apparel, home décor and collectables) who is hard-working, organized, analytical, with several years of experience in ecommerce. 

It is a FULL-time position (40h/week). This is NOT an entry-level role. 



The Buyer sources new product vendors and grows the assortment offering on our brands’ sites;

oversees and maintains inventory as well as researches, analyzes, and forecasts current and future buying trends, markets, styles, and products with attention to specified target market and demographics. This role supports the curation of our product assortments, develops and maintains relationships with wholesalers and suppliers while leading negotiation of contracts with wholesalers and suppliers. 



Omni Retail Enterprises operates a lifestyle portfolio of digital storefronts and communities including home decor, apparel, collectables, fitness, and more, with millions of consumers around the globe. 



Skills & Qualifications:



• Strong English proficiency, both written and spoken. 

• 3+ years’ experience as a Buyer, preferably in apparel, home decor, or collectables

• Experience in retail and ecommerce 



Experience in Platforms:



• Proficient in Shopify, Google Analytics, and Excel. 



Work Schedule:



• Full-time position (40h/week)

• US work hours (CST)



Key Responsibilities:



• Qualifies and negotiates with vendors to find the best sales price and may include bid prices and negotiation techniques, plus review of written documents

• Acquires information concerning an item’s condition, type, rarity or value

• Prepares data for financial records: invoices, purchase orders and other related documents

• Performs financial analysis to determine savings, calculates quantity discounts and negotiates the best sales price when purchasing large quantities of goods

• Arranges payments through bank drafts or money orders to purchase items

• Maintains inventory that includes verifying inventory levels, choosing new items, returning expired items or obsolete merchandise 

• Tracks purchases, monitors vendor quality, and maintains a current database of vendor information

• Negotiates contracts with suppliers to secure favorable terms, including pricing, delivery schedules, and quality specifications

• Develops and implement purchasing strategies aligned with the company’s business goals and operational needs

• Maintains commercial contracts with clients, suppliers, and other business partners

• Researches and evaluates suppliers, considering factors such as quality, pricing, and market trends

• Analyzes market trends, ensuring the organization gets the best value for its purchases

• Implements strategies for procuring, storing, and distributing goods and services

• Oversees financial analyses related to the department’s budget 

• Manages procurement activities, including purchasing supplies and communicating company specifications to suppliers

• Ensures the company complies with legal, regulatory, and ethical requirements 

• Evaluates departmental policies and procedures to ensure alignment with industry standards and changes in law or technology

• Participates in cross-functional projects aimed at improving efficiency, profitability, quality, and customer service

• Collaborates with other senior tea
mbers to analyze potential problems impacting work

• Recommends improvements, new products, quality enhancements, or operational efficiencies

• Handles multiple projects simultaneously and prioritize tasks based on urgency

• Stays on top of trends in terms of supplement innovation and industry demand 



Resume



Please submit your information and resume detailing your relevant experience, skill set, and why you're the perfect fit for this position. Link to submit this information: 





We look forward to hearing from you!

title: Social Media Manager – Paid Ads Expert
description:
We are looking for an experienced Social Media Manager / Ads Expert to manage and scale our paid advertising campaigns across multiple platforms. The ideal candidate is data-driven, creative, and capable of optimizing campaigns to drive visibility, engagement, and growth for our social media pages.



Key Responsibilities

-Plan, launch, and manage paid advertising campaigns across Meta 
 & Instagram), and TikTok Ads

-Monitor and optimize campaign performance to improve ROI and conversions

-Analyze ad analytics, audience insights, and market trends

-Provide data-driven recommendations to improve overall social media growth

-Test creatives, audiences, and ad strategies to identify high-performing campaigns

-Track campaign performance and prepare regular reports

-Manage and improve the visibility and growth of the company’s social media pages





Qualifications

-At least 3-5 years of hands-on experience managing paid advertising campaigns

-Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business, or a related field

-Proven experience running ads on Meta 
 & Instagram), and TikTok Ads

-Strong understanding of social media platforms and ad performance

-Ability to plan, launch, optimize, and scale ad campaigns

-Data-driven mindset with strong knowledge of analytics and performance tracking

-Ability to analyze data and identify trends and growth opportunities

-Creative, proactive, and able to work independently



Kindly send us a message on Microsoft Teams at 
 and send your CV/resume there so we can discuss further details.

title: Graphic Designer (Streetwear Brand)
description:
We’re looking for a creative and culturally in-tune Graphic Designer to join Banana Lagoon - an Australian streetwear brand known for bold designs, premium quality, and limited releases.  ?



This role is perfect for someone who understands streetwear culture and can translate ideas into standout visuals that drive hype, identity, and sales.



You’ll be responsible for designing graphics across apparel, social media, and marketing campaigns, helping shape the visual direction of upcoming drops and collections.



Key Responsibilities:

 • Design original graphics for hoodies, t-shirts, hats, accessories, etc.

 • Create visuals for product drops, campaigns, and social media content

 • Develop cohesive branding across collections and seasonal releases

 • Work closely with the team to bring creative concepts to life

 • Prepare print-ready files for garment production

 • Stay on top of streetwear, fashion, and design trends



Requirements:

 • Strong portfolio showcasing streetwear, fashion, or bold graphic work

 • Proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite (Illustrator, Photoshop)

 • Understanding of garment printing and design specs

 • Ability to design for a youthful, trend-driven audience

 • Creative, fast-moving, and able to execute ideas quickly

 • Bonus: experience working with clothing brands or drop-based models



Ideal Candidate:

 • Deep understanding of streetwear culture and aesthetics

 • Strong eye for typography, layout, and branding

 • Able to create designs that feel exclusive and “drop-worthy”

 • Passionate about fashion, design, and building a brand

title: Weekend Logistics Coordinator (Overnight Shifts – Eastern Time)
description: We are seeking a dedicated Logistics Coordinator to cover weekend overnight shifts. The schedule is Friday, Saturday, and Sunday from 8 PM to 10 AM Eastern Time. This role offers steady coverage, ensuring smooth operations during weekend overnight and early morning hours. You’ll monitor driver tracking, provide customer updates, and handle administrative tasks. If you’re reliable and have weekend availability, we’d love to hear from you!

title: Sales Manager
description:
Pex Life Records LLC: Our Vision for Transformative Music



Pex Life Records is an independent label where urban music meets personal development. Founded by Wilmarck, we create high-quality tracks that resonate with the motivation of Tony Robbins, blended with the commercial sound of artists like Kanye West and Drake. Our music is purpose-driven, focusing on critical life areas: health, financial literacy, peak performance, and spirituality.



You will be joining a brand with a strong, engaged audience of over 1,000
 subscribers and 20,
 followers. Your work will directly contribute to inspiring and uplifting thousands through music.-----The Role: Drive Revenue, Build a Team, Shape a Brand



We are seeking a highly motivated Music Manager to lead our sales, operations, and team development. This is a pivotal role for a professional ready to commit to a 45-50 hour/week position that offers substantial commission potential and a clear path to high earnings.



Key Areas of Impact:

Sales & Business Development: Lead client acquisition by pitching proposals to songwriting job boards and driving profits to achieve ambitious sales targets.

Team Leadership: Recruit, hire, train, and inspire contractors and staff to ensure stellar performance and successful new releases.

Operations & Finance: Manage contracts, maintain essential financial records (bookkeeping), and ensure compliance and seamless communication across all stakeholders.

Customer Experience: Be the face of the company, creating memorable customer experiences, explaining product/service prices, and handling key inquiries.



Compensation & Uncapped Earning Potential



This is a performance-driven role with a clear path to significant monthly income through our incentive program.

Base & Growth: The hourly rate starts at $2.81 USD plus commission. The initial 10 hours/week commitment quickly scales up to 45 hours/week within 45 days, allowing for a rapid increase in base earnings.

Monthly Compensation Range: $505–$900 Guaranteed Base + Generous Commission.



Compensation Structure by Target Revenue Goal:

Achieve $1,200 Minimum: Guaranteed Monthly Base: $675 Minimum. Commission Rate: 10% on qualifying sales. Enhanced Benefits Package: 13th Month Pay, Internet Costs Reimbursement, Profit Sharing, PhilHealth Reimbursement.

Achieve $2,400 Minimum: Guaranteed Monthly Base: $900 Minimum. Commission Rate: 15% on qualifying sales. Enhanced Benefits Package: Social Security System & Pag-IBIG Fund Reimbursement, 50% HMO Expenses, Profit Sharing.



Flexibility and Structure:



100% Remote Position: Work from anywhere.

Core Availability: Sunday–Thursday, 6:30 PM EST – 3:00 AM EST.

Work/Life Balance: We offer Flexible Scheduling (choose your working days/hours) and Job Sharing options.

Prospect Response Disclaimer: Maintain key client relationships by being available for 3-5 quick, 5–15 minute responses per week within a designated 8-hour window (e.g., 3:00 PM – 11:00 PM EST).



What We're Looking For (Skills & Qualities)



We need a relentless executor with an independent spirit and high integrity.

Essential: Superior proposal writing, persistence, time management, and strong English speaking/writing skills.

Ideal Candidate: Flexible, eager to learn, competitive, and receptive to constructive criticism.



Your Path to Full-Time: The Paid Audition



We skip the traditional hiring steps and go straight to evaluating your work. The process is designed to be fair, fast, and merit-based:

1 Submit your proposal.

2 Pass a screening exercise.

3 Participate in an interview.

4 Top candidates are selected for a paid audition to ensure a mutual fit before a full-time offer is extended.

If you are ready to be a crucial leader in a high-growth, mission-driven music company, apply now!



Application Instructions:



Demonstrate your expertise in sales management (client acquisition, appointment setting, and closing calls) in your proposal. To ensure you've read these details, please begin your proposal with the phrase "purple elephant."

title: Sales Manager
description:
Pex Life Records LLC is an independent record label dedicated to producing high-quality urban music focused on health, personal relationships, financial literacy, peak performance, bodybuilding, meditation, and spirituality. Founded by Wilmarck, our music merges influences from Kanye West and Drake with motivational themes inspired by Tony Robbins. With over 1,000
 subscribers and 20,
 followers, we aim to inspire and uplift through our music.



Position: Music Manager



We are looking for a music manager responsible for:

- Pitching proposals to songwriting job boards

- Keeping our books and managing contracts

- Driving success by boosting profits and hitting sales targets

- Leading and inspiring the team to deliver stellar performance

- Recruiting, hiring, and guiding contractors

- Managing operations, scheduling, and compliance

- Creating memorable customer experiences

- Onboarding and training new hires

- Communicating seamlessly with stakeholders

- Working 45-50 hours/week, including evenings, weekends, and holidays

- Lifting up to 25 pounds when needed



Disclaimer: Prospects will respond outside of scheduled hours. There will be an established 8-hour window where you’ll be expected to respond within an hour. Ex. Your schedule hours will be 6:30 PM -3:00 AM EST (From 3-11 PM EST if a prospect responds to a proposal, you’ll be expected to respond. Each response should take 5-15 mins. You can expect 3-5 responses per week. The additional hours may be deducted from your regular schedule if it exceeds 50 hours.



Contract Details

- Hourly Rate: $2.81/hr USD + 10%-15% of revenue

- Monthly Compensation: $505-$900 + commission

title: Sales Manager
description:
Record Label Music & Sales Manager (Remote)



Pex Life Records LLC: Our Vision for Transformative Music



Pex Life Records is an independent label where urban music meets personal development. Founded by Wilmarck, we create high-quality tracks that resonate with the motivation of Tony Robbins, blended with the commercial sound of artists like Kanye West and Drake. Our music is purpose-driven, focusing on critical life areas: health, financial literacy, peak performance, and spirituality.



You will be joining a brand with a strong, engaged audience of over 1,000
 subscribers and 20,
 followers. Your work will directly contribute to inspiring and uplifting thousands through music.-----The Role: Drive Revenue, Build a Team, Shape a Brand



We are seeking a highly motivated Music Manager to lead our sales, operations, and team development. This is a pivotal role for a professional ready to commit to a 45-50 hour/week position that offers substantial commission potential and a clear path to high earnings.



Key Areas of Impact:

Sales & Business Development: Lead client acquisition by pitching proposals to songwriting job boards and driving profits to achieve ambitious sales targets.

Team Leadership: Recruit, hire, train, and inspire contractors and staff to ensure stellar performance and successful new releases.

Operations & Finance: Manage contracts, maintain essential financial records (bookkeeping), and ensure compliance and seamless communication across all stakeholders.

Customer Experience: Be the face of the company, creating memorable customer experiences, explaining product/service prices, and handling key inquiries.



Compensation & Uncapped Earning Potential



This is a performance-driven role with a clear path to significant monthly income through our incentive program.

Base & Growth: The hourly rate starts at $2.81 USD plus commission. The initial 10 hours/week commitment quickly scales up to 45 hours/week within 45 days, allowing for a rapid increase in base earnings.

Monthly Compensation Range: $505–$900 Guaranteed Base + Generous Commission.



Compensation Structure by Target Revenue Goal:

Achieve $1,200 Minimum: Guaranteed Monthly Base: $675 Minimum. Commission Rate: 10% on qualifying sales. Enhanced Benefits Package: 13th Month Pay, Internet Costs Reimbursement, Profit Sharing, PhilHealth Reimbursement.

Achieve $2,400 Minimum: Guaranteed Monthly Base: $900 Minimum. Commission Rate: 15% on qualifying sales. Enhanced Benefits Package: Social Security System & Pag-IBIG Fund Reimbursement, 50% HMO Expenses, Profit Sharing.



Flexibility and Structure:



100% Remote Position: Work from anywhere.

Core Availability: Sunday–Thursday, 6:30 PM EST – 3:00 AM EST.

Work/Life Balance: We offer Flexible Scheduling (choose your working days/hours) and Job Sharing options.

Prospect Response Disclaimer: Maintain key client relationships by being available for 3-5 quick, 5–15 minute responses per week within a designated 8-hour window (e.g., 3:00 PM – 11:00 PM EST).



What We're Looking For (Skills & Qualities)



We need a relentless executor with an independent spirit and high integrity.

Essential: Superior proposal writing, persistence, time management, and strong English speaking/writing skills.

Ideal Candidate: Flexible, eager to learn, competitive, and receptive to constructive criticism.



Your Path to Full-Time: The Paid Audition



We skip the traditional hiring steps and go straight to evaluating your work. The process is designed to be fair, fast, and merit-based:

1 Submit your proposal.

2 Pass a screening exercise.

3 Participate in an interview.

4 Top candidates are selected for a paid audition to ensure a mutual fit before a full-time offer is extended.

If you are ready to be a crucial leader in a high-growth, mission-driven music company, apply now!



Application Instructions:



Demonstrate your expertise in sales management (client acquisition, appointment setting, and closing calls) in your proposal. To ensure you've read these details, please begin your proposal with the phrase "purple elephant."
