title: NDIS Bookkeeper
description:
We are looking for a detail-oriented NDIS Bookkeeper to support billing, invoicing, and financial administration for NDIS service providers. This role involves managing NDIS invoices, reconciling payments, resolving claim issues, and ensuring compliance with NDIS pricing arrangements.



The ideal candidate has experience with NDIS billing systems, invoice reconciliation, and financial record management.



Key Responsibilities

- Prepare and submit NDIS invoices using correct support line items

- Reconcile invoices, payments, and outstanding claims

- Investigate and resolve rejected or unpaid NDIS claims

- Follow up with plan managers and stakeholders regarding invoice status

- Maintain accurate financial records and bookkeeping data

- Review billing to identify discrepancies or missing payments

- Ensure compliance with NDIS pricing arrangements and billing requirements

- Support improvements to invoicing and reconciliation processes



Requirements

- Experience in NDIS bookkeeping, billing, or finance support

- Strong understanding of NDIS line items and pricing arrangements

- Experience handling NDIS claims, invoices, and reconciliations

- High attention to detail and strong organizational skills

- Ability to investigate and resolve billing discrepancies

- Strong communication skills when coordinating with plan managers and clients



Preferred

- Experience using NDIS portals, Xero, MYOB, or other accounting systems

- Background supporting NDIS providers or disability services



Benefits:

Fully Remote / Work From Home

Fixed Day Shift Schedule

HMO Benefit

Stable long-term role

Supportive and professional team environment



How to Apply:



Please submit:

1. Link to your updated CV

2. Link to your introduction video (preferred)

3. A short summary of your experience based on the requirements

4. Sample clients or industries you’ve supported (if applicable)



Shortlisted candidates will be contacted for an interview.

title: Elite Level Media Buyer (NewsBreak)
description:
We are hiring a killer media buyer to help us scale on NewsBreak.



Direct NewsBreak experience is a plus, but it is not required. We understand that experienced NewsBreak buyers are rare. We are open to hiring someone with strong Meta or other paid traffic experience who can quickly learn a new platform and figure out what works.



We are looking for someone who already knows how to buy media at a high level and does not need constant direction.



What We’re Looking For:



The right person must have real media buying experience and be able to make decisions independently. This is not an entry-level role, and it is not a fit for someone who needs to be told exactly what to do every day.



You should know all the major metrics and you should know how to use those numbers to evaluate performance, spot problems, and make profitable decisions.



Requirements: 



- Strong media buying experience on Meta or another major paid traffic platform

- Experience managing thousands of dollars per day in ad spend

- Strong understanding of campaign metrics and how they impact profitability

- Ability to test efficiently and interpret results correctly

- Ability to know when to cut, when to hold, and when to scale

- Self-sufficient and confident in building strategy without being micromanaged

- Comfortable adapting to a new platform and learning quickly



Do Not Apply If:



- You need to be told exactly what to do every day

- You have very little media buying experience

- You have never managed meaningful daily spend

- You do not know how to read campaign data and make decisions from it

- You are a button-pusher instead of a real strategist

- You wait around for someone else to hand you the answer



Ideal Candidate:



The ideal candidate is someone who has already spent serious money on paid traffic, understands how to manage campaigns profitably, and can bring that same skill set to NewsBreak. We are looking for someone who can think independently, test intelligently, and find winning strategies on their own.



To apply, D
 the info below:



1. Platforms you’ve bought on

2. Highest daily spend managed

3. Verticals/offers you’ve run

4. One campaign you scaled successfully

5. What you look at first when performance drops

title: Affiliate Growth Manager (Instagram & Amazon) Figgy’s Events | Luxury Event Planning + Design (New York)
description:
We are hiring an Affiliate Growth Manager to build and scale a content-driven revenue system across Instagram and Amazon.



This is a monetization role. Content is the input, revenue is the outcome. You will take high-volume, high-end event content and convert it into structured, repeatable, shoppable systems.



This role starts freelance with a clear path to long-term or full-time based on performance.



Proof of Work Required (Applications without this will not be reviewed):



Submit:



• At least one example of content you turned into revenue

• A live Amazon storefront, product collection, or shoppable system you built or managed

• A brief breakdown of your process and the result



What You Will Own:



• Build and manage Amazon storefront structure, product libraries, and link strategy

• Convert past and ongoing event content into shoppable outputs

• Create repeatable formats such as “shop this setup” and “what I used”

• Systemize product identification, tagging, and categorization across themes

• Establish workflows that allow content to be reused and monetized continuously

• Track performance and refine for conversion



Content (Execution, Not the Focus):



• Direct and execute short-form video tied to affiliate outcomes

• Maintain a clean, elevated visual standard aligned with a luxury brand

• Organize large content volumes for fast retrieval and reuse



Technology + Systems (Required):



• You actively use advanced tools to increase speed, output, and quality

• You use AI, automation, or workflow systems beyond basic prompts

• You can clearly explain what you use, how you use it, and what it produces

• You build systems, not just complete tasks



This is not a graphic design or Canva-based role.



What You Must Have:



• Proven experience monetizing content through affiliate systems

• Direct experience with Amazon Storefront, LTK, TikTok Shop, or similar

• Strong understanding of how content converts, not just how it looks

• Ability to build structured systems from unstructured content

• High visual standards aligned with a premium brand

• Ability to operate independently and take ownership



What You Are Working With:



• Over 3 years of continuous event content from weekly, highly curated themed events

• Direct access to real product sourcing and purchasing history

• A non-repetitive content library across multiple themes and styles

• A nearly fully booked 2026 schedule, providing ongoing weekly content



This is a build-and-scale opportunity, not a starting point.



Position Details:



• Freelance to start, with long-term or full-time potential

• Remote

• Consistent weekly communication required

• Performance-driven role tied to measurable results



How to Apply:



• Submit required proof of work

• Include a brief explanation of how you approach monetizing content

• List the tools, systems, and workflows you actively use

title: Project Manager+ CRM Specialist
description:
IG PPC is a New York-based Amazon advertising agency and we're growing fast. We're not a slow corporate machine. We move quickly, we build things that work, and we expect the same from everyone on our team.



The role

We have hundreds of unsorted Gmail threads — lead lists, event contacts, follow-ups, client
s — and zero CRM. We need someone who can turn that chaos into a clean, organized system from scratch, and then keep it running.



This isn't a "manage the CRM" role. This is a "build it, own it, improve it" role. You'll also be expected to use AI tools daily to make yourself — and the team — faster and smarter.



What you'll do



Audit our existing Gmail data and map out a CRM structure that makes sense for an agency our size

Build and configure the CRM from zero (tagging, pipelines, contact records, automations)

Import, clean, and categorize hundreds of contacts from multiple sources

Set up workflows and automations to keep the CRM current without manual effort

Use AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, etc.) to speed up data work, write templates, and automate repetitive tasks

Build
 sequences, follow-up templates, and outreach copy as needed

Support the team with ongoing CRM management, reporting, and data hygiene



What we're looking for



You've personally built at least 3 CRMs from scratch — not just used them

You know your way around Pipedrive, HubSpot, Airtable, or similar tools at a deep level

You use AI every single day and can show us real workflows you've built with it

Your English is sharp — written and spoken

You're a problem-solver, not a task-follower. You figure things out without being walked through every step

You're available to overlap with New York business hours

You're organized, detail-obsessed, and don't let things slip through the cracks



Bonus points if you have



Experience with Zapier, Make, or other automation platforms

Background in sales operations, marketing ops, or lead generation

Experience working with US-based clients or agencies



What we offer



$800–$2,000/month depending on experience and output

Full-time remote — work from anywhere in the Philippines

Direct access to leadership — no layers, no bureaucracy

Real ownership of a critical system inside a fast-moving company

Room to grow as the agency scales



How to apply



Fill out our application at 



We review every application carefully. Read the instructions on the form — how you follow directions tells us a lot about how you work.

title: Creative Content Specialist (Video Editor & Digital Designer)
description:
The Opportunity



Are you a storyteller who lives and breathes social media? We aren’t looking for a "button-pusher"—we are looking for a creative partner. We need someone who can take one piece of long-form content and turn it into a multiple pieces of content across YouTube, Instagram,
, linkedin, tiktok. 



The Role



You will be the engine behind our brand's visual identity. Your mission is twofold: growing our YouTube presence and dominating short-form organic reach. You’ll be responsible for high-retention editing, strategic posting, and creating "must-have" lead magnets.



Key Responsibilities



Long-Form Video Editing: Craft engaging YouTube videos (10–20+ mins) using DaVinci Resolve or Adobe Premiere Pro. Focus on pacing, sound design, and B-roll.



Short-Form Organic Content: Extract the "gold" from our long-form videos to create high-energy Reels/TikToks using CapCut. You should understand trending audio, captions, and fast-cut styles.



Platform Management: Handle the posting and optimisation across all social media platforms. You’ll manage SEO, tags, titles, and end-screen strategies.



Thumbnails: Design high-CTR thumbnails using Photoshop/Canva that stop the scroll.



High-End Lead Magnets: Create premium PDFs, workbooks, or digital guides. We aren’t looking for generic AI-generated fluff, we need thoughtful, well-designed assets.



Brand Strategy: We want your brain! Come to us with suggestions on how to make our brand more competitive and visually cohesive in the marketplace.



Technical Skills Required



Advanced Video: Expert level in DaVinci Resolve or Adobe Creative Suite.



Short-Form Specialist: Mastery of CapCut for mobile-first, vertical content.



Design: Proficiency in Canva and Adobe Illustrator/Photoshop for high-end custom work.



Social Savvy: Proven understanding of YouTube and Instagram algorithms (AVD, CTR, and Engagement).



Why Join Us?

100% Remote: Work from the comfort of your home.



Growth Mindset: We value your creative input and want you to help shape our brand’s future.



Stable & Long-term: We are looking for a core tea
mber to grow with us.



How to Apply



1. Create a short form video about this role and why you are the right fit. 



2. Link your portfolio (Include both long-form YouTube work and short-form Reels).



3. Send a brand that is doing well on social media and why you love it. 



4. What is your favourite feature in CapCut for making captions pop?

title: Administration Assistant - Australian Mortgage Broking

Blambles Finance Group is a boutique finance broking business based in Brisbane, Australia. We pride ourselves on helping our customers get the best deal from our residential and commercial lender partners.

We are looking for a self motivated and highly efficient person to support the continued growth of our business on a permanent full time basis. You will work closely with our existing Filipino based virtual assistants and an Australian based residential & commercial mortgage broker.

You will be rewarded with

• A flexible working environment including Australian based hours (AEST)

:

o Outline why you would be a good fit for the job based on your past experience?

o Current remuneration and expected remuneration?



In addition, please complete a short online test by clicking on the link below:





Please note only qualified applicants who meet the minimum criteria, follow the instructions outlined above and who score highly in the online test will be considered for this role. We will only respond to applicants who will be considered further. If you have not heard from us within 7 days of your application, it is likely that your application has been unsuccessful.



Essential Duties

• Saving all
s in the Mercury inbox to relevant client opportunities

• Managing the centralised inbox including,

o Distribution of
s in the centralised inbox to the appropriate people, folders and filing in Mercury

o Setting up auto forward rules and auto-flows to improve efficiency

• Conducting rate reviews for existing customers and managing the entire rate review process

• Any other ad hoc tasks and projects required from time to time

• Completes all tasks correctly and on time



You will be provided with appropriate training and supported by our existing team and given the opportunity to progress your career.

title: Credit Repair Dispute Specialist (DisputeFox, CFPB, FTC, Metro 2)
description:
Major Motion Enterprises LLC is hiring a Credit Repair Dispute Specialist to assist with client dispute processing and file management.



We are a rapidly growing credit repair and funding company seeking an experienced, detail-oriented specialist who understands effective dispute strategies and can manage client files efficiently.





Responsibilities:

 • Analyze client credit reports using SmartCredit

 • Process disputes using DisputeFox or similar software

 • Submit disputes via:

 • CFPB

 • FTC

 • BBB

 • Apply Metro 2 compliance strategies

 • Select accurate dispute reasons and structure effective letters

 • Manage multiple client files

 • Track dispute progress and maintain accurate client records

 • Assist with overall client file management





Requirements:

 • Proven experience in credit repair dispute processing

 • CFPB disputes

 • FTC identity theft process

 • Metro 2 compliance

 • Experience with DisputeFox, LetterStream, or similar tools

 • Strong attention to detail

 • Ability to follow systems and instructions

 • Reliable, consistent, and results-driven





Compensation:

 • Paid per round of disputes per client file

 • This role rewards speed, accuracy, and efficiency

 • Increased performance will lead to increased workload and earning potential



Growth Opportunity (Important):



Major Motion Enterprises LLC is a rapidly growing company in the credit repair and funding space.



We are currently experiencing consistent client flow through referrals and ongoing marketing efforts, and we are preparing to scale further with paid advertising.



This position will begin as part-time based on client volume, with strong potential to transition into a full-time, long-term role as the company continues to scale.



We are looking for someone who wants to grow with the company and become a key part of our long-term team.





Application Requirement:



 Include the word “MOTION” at the top of your application AND confirm you understand this is a per round payment structure. Applications that do not follow this instruction will not be considered.

title: Web Designer / Web Developer

title: Digital Marketing Coordinator – AdWords & SEO
description:
SilkCards (
) is a US-based premium custom print manufacturer 

specializing in luxury business cards, specialty finishes, and tactile 

brand identity products. We have been in business since 1997 and serve 

designers, agencies, and high-end brands across North America.



We are hiring a detail-oriented Digital Marketing Coordinator to execute 

and manage our Google Ads campaigns and SEO content publishing. This is 

an execution role — strategies, frameworks, and creative direction are 

provided to you. Your job is to implement them accurately, monitor 

performance, report results, and flag issues quickly.



WHAT YOU WILL DO:



Google Ads (Primary)

- Manage and optimize existing Google Ads campaigns under provided 

  strategic direction

- Enter, update, and rotate ad copy — headlines, descriptions, 

  and extensions — as directed

- Monitor daily spend, CTR, conversion data, and surface anomalies

- Implement A/B test rotations per provided testing schedule

- Produce weekly performance reports in a standardized format



SEO & Content Publishing (Secondary)

- Publish blog content to our CMS per provided briefs and schedules

- Apply on-page SEO formatting — titles, meta descriptions, headers, 

  internal links — per provided guidelines

- Update existing pages with revised copy as directed

- Track keyword rankings using SEO tools and report weekly



General

- Consistent video discussions and chats based on need. (US Pacific time)

- Maintain a task board (we use [insert tool — Asana/Notion/Trello])

- Use Claude AI as a primary productivity and drafting tool — 

  this is a requirement, not optional

- Follow brand voice guidelines precisely — no independent 

  copy decisions without approval



WHAT YOU ARE NOT RESPONSIBLE FOR:

- Campaign strategy or keyword research strategy (provided to you)

- Writing original blog content from scratch (briefs provided)

- Graphic design or ad creative (provided to you)



WHO YOU ARE:

- Minimum 2 years managing Google Ads campaigns (hands-on, not 

  supervisory)

- Familiar with Google Search Console, Google Analytics 4, and 

  at least one SEO tool (Ahrefs, SEMrush, or Moz)

- Comfortable working in a CMS (we will train on ours)

- Proficient with Claude AI or demonstrably eager to learn — 

  please mention your AI tool experience in your application

- Excellent written English — you will be communicating with 

  US-based leadership

- Available to work US Pacific or Mountain time zone hours

- Highly process-driven — you follow systems, you do not 

  freelance decisions



TO APPLY:

Tell us in your cover message: (1) which Google Ads campaign types 

you have managed, (2) what SEO tools you use, and (3) your 

experience with or interest in AI tools like Claude.

title: Software Engineer
description:
We’re hiring an AI Prompt Software Engineer to design, build, and optimize AI-powered workflows, tools, and applications that deliver real-world value. This role requires deep expertise in prompt engineering, including structuring, testing, and iterating prompts to achieve consistent, high-quality outputs across different use cases. You should be comfortable working with large language models and integrating them into products, automations, or internal systems.



You will be responsible for developing scalable AI solutions, improving performance through experimentation, and identifying opportunities to replace manual processes with intelligent automation. Experience with tools and technologies such as OpenAI APIs, LangChain, Python, JavaScript, REST APIs, and no-code/low-code platforms is highly desirable. Familiarity with vector databases, embeddings, and building AI agents is a strong advantage.



You must provide clear examples of previous projects, including what you built, the tools and technologies used, your specific contribution, and the measurable outcomes or impact achieved. Include AI-Eng in the subject when applying so I know you have read the application. We are looking for someone who can think independently, move quickly, and translate ideas into working solutions. Strong problem-solving skills, attention to detail, and a builder mindset are essential, along with a genuine interest in staying up to date with the rapidly evolving AI landscape.

title: AI-First Ecommerce Operations Manager
description:
AI-First Ecommerce Operations Manager | Remote (Philippines) | Full-Time





About Us

Whisper Ear Care is a fast-growing ecommerce company headquartered in Hawaii. We make

products that solve swimmer’s ear infections without harsh chemicals. We sell on Amazon and

our own website. We're on the way to becoming the definitive ear care brand.



The Role

We're looking for an enthusiastic, AI-native operator to help run and grow the business. You'll

own day-to-day operations, find ways to grow sales, expand into new channels, and use AI tools

(with Claude as the foundation) to automate and scale everything you touch.



What You'll Own

? Operations — Track and order inventory, communicate with suppliers, build SOPs, and

create AI-powered tools to automate tasks

? Customer Experience — Own customer service, monitor reviews, and ensure

seamless ordering and delivery for every Whisper customer

? Amazon & Channel Growth — Optimize listings, create weekly reports on sales, and

lead expansion onto Walmart.com, Chewy, TikTok Shop, etc.

? Influencer & Creator Marketing — Build our affiliate program from scratch, manage

gifting pipelines, nurture relationships with creators

?
 & Shopify — Own drip and post order follow-up campaigns, find ways to increase

customer lifetime value, optimize our Shopify store

? AI & Automation — Audit manual tasks and eliminate them. Ask "can AI do this?"

before doing anything by hand



Who You Are

? Genuinely excited about AI. You constantly experiment with the latest models, have vibe

coded something before, and you know what Claude skills and Nano Banana are

? Have some prior experience with ecommerce or DTC brands. Bonus points for

experience with Amazon Seller Central, Walmart Marketplace, or TikTok Shop

? Strong English communicator, written and verbal



What We Offer

? Competitive salary

? Work on Philippines time zone



To Apply

Film and send us a 60 second video introducing yourself. Quickly tell us about your experience and why you would be a good candidate for the position. Follow these instructions exactly. We will not review your application unless it includes the 60 second video. Thanks!

title: DM Setter — Warm Instagram Outreach for US Marketing Agency (Commission-Based, Remote)
description:
We're a US-based marketing agency that helps home service businesses (roofers, painters, window cleaners, pressure washers, etc.) scale with paid ads and systems. We're hiring a DM setter to run warm outreach from our founder's Instagram account.



This is NOT cold outreach to strangers. You're messaging people who already follow us, engage with our content, or follow competitors in our space. These are warm leads who know the brand.



???



DAILY RESPONSIBILITIES:



• Send 100+ personalized DMs per day from our Instagram account

• Follow our proven scripts (opener, follow-up, qualifier, objection handling, booking)

• Qualify prospects based on: monthly revenue, team size, current marketing setup, and ad budget

• Book qualified prospects directly onto our sales calendar (GoHighLevel)

• Follow up with non-responders on a set cadence (Day 1, Day 3, Day 7)

• Log every conversation and outcome in a shared Google Sheet tracker

• Report daily: DMs sent, replies received, calls booked



WHAT WE PROVIDE (you don't need to figure anything out):



• Full SOP with step-by-step daily workflow

• Proven DM scripts for every scenario:

  • Cold opener for warm followers

  • Follow-up for no replies

  • Qualifier questions to filter serious prospects

  • Objection handling responses

  • Calendar booking scripts

• Daily lead lists — scraped, organized, and ready to go

• Access to our CRM (GoHighLevel) and booking system

• 1-on-1 onboarding call + ongoing Slack support

• You literally follow the system and execute



???



IDEAL CLIENT PROFILE (who you're targeting):



• Owner-operated service businesses doing $15,000-$30,000/month revenue

• 1-3 crews/employees

• Owner still answers the phone

• Has a website but it's not great

• No agency currently running their ads

• US-based, active on Instagram

• NOT big brands with polished marketing or 10K+ followers



???



COMPENSATION:



• 25% of month 1 revenue per closed deal

• Our minimum retainer is $1,500/month = $375+ per close minimum

• Many deals include revenue share on top, pushing per-deal value higher

• No cap on earnings — the more you book that close, the more you make

• Paid monthly once client payment clears

• Realistic range for strong performers: $1,500-$3,000+/month



???



MUST HAVE:



• Experience with Instagram DM outreach, appointment setting, or sales/lead gen

• Can commit 3-4 hours/day consistently (flexible scheduling)

• Strong written English — you need to sound like a real person, not a bot

• Knows how to have a genuine conversation (not copy-paste spam)

• Responsive on Slack — communicates proactively if something isn't working

• Reliable internet connection and a laptop/desktop



NICE TO HAVE:



• Experience with GoHighLevel, HubSpot, or similar CRM

• Background in agency, home services, or B2B outreach

• Experience managing or scraping Instagram accounts

• Familiarity with Slack, Google Sheets, Calendly



???



ABOUT US:



We're a growing agency with active clients generating real revenue. This isn't a startup experiment — we have paying clients, proven ad campaigns, and a sales system that works. We need someone to fill the top of our funnel with qualified appointments so our closer can do what he does best.



We move fast, communicate in Slack, and value people who take ownership. If you follow the system and book calls, you will make money. Simple as that.



???



TO APPLY:



Send a message with:



1. A brief intro — who you are and your relevant experience

2. Have you done Instagram DM outreach or appointment setting before? If yes, what were your results?

3. How many hours per day can you commit?

4. Your expected monthly earnings (so we know we're aligned)

5. When you could start



Do NOT send a generic "I'm interested" message. We will ignore it.

title: Creative Virtual Assistant - Graphic Design, Video & AI Content Creation
description:
**About Us**



We are Phoenix Garage Gurus, a fast-growing garage door repair and installation company in Phoenix, Arizona. We take pride in delivering exceptional service and we want our brand to reflect that across everything our customers see. We are looking for a creative partner who can make our brand look incredible across social media, ads, and marketing materials using modern AI tools.



**What You Will Own**



- Design social media graphics, carousel posts, story templates, and ad creatives (Canva, Photoshop, or similar)

- Edit short-form video content for Instagram Reels, TikTok, and
 (before/after transformations, technician-in-action clips, customer testimonials)

- Process raw job site photos and video into polished marketing assets (color correction, background cleanup, text overlays, branding)

- Use AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Midjourney, etc.) to generate copy, brainstorm concepts, create imagery, and speed up production

- Maintain brand consistency across ALL visual assets

- Build and manage a creative asset library with proper naming and organization

- Produce 3-5 fresh content pieces per week across multiple formats and sizes



**Required Skills (Must-Have)**



- Strong Canva proficiency (advanced level, not just templates)

- Good eye for design, layout, typography, and color

- Video editing skills (CapCut, Premiere, or similar)

- Active user of AI tools for creative work (ChatGPT, Claude, Midjourney, DALL-E, or similar)

- Experience creating ad creatives or marketing graphics for businesses

- Can produce content in multiple formats: 1:1 (Feed), 4:5 (Vertical Feed), 9:16 (Stories/Reels)

- Good English communication (written and verbal)

- Reliable internet connection with backup solution (UPS + mobile hotspot)

- Portfolio showing real work you have done (not just templates)



**Nice to Have**



- Adobe Photoshop / Lightroom experience

- Experience with AI video tools (Runway, Pika, CapCut AI features)

- Familiarity with Meta Ads Manager or creating ads for
/Instagram

- Experience working with home services, construction, or trade businesses

- AI image generation skills (Midjourney, Adobe Firefly, Leonardo AI)

- Basic understanding of what makes an ad convert (not just look pretty)



**Working Style**



- Part-time to start (20 hours/week) with a clear path to full-time as we grow

- Flexible schedule with some overlap during US Mountain Time business hours

- Daily async check-in via Slack

- Weekly 30-minute video call

- Monthly salary (not hourly), paid via Wise



**Compensation**



- $700 - $800/month to start (part-time, 20 hrs/week)

- Salary increase after successful 30-day onboarding period

- Path to full-time ($1,200 - $1,500/month) as workload grows

- 13th month pay

- Performance bonuses based on content quality and output

- Paid Philippine holidays



**Where This Role Can Go**



This starts as a creative role, and creative will always be the foundation. But as you grow with us, there is an opportunity to learn Meta 
/Instagram) ads management. We will provide training and resources, including covering the cost of Meta Blueprint certification. This is completely optional but opens up a higher-level, higher-paid path within the team. Many of the best ads managers started as creatives because they understand what makes people stop scrolling.



**To Apply (Please Follow These Instructions)**



1. Use the subject line: **"Creative [your favorite color] - [your name]"**

2. Send your portfolio OR 3-5 examples of your best creative work (links or attachments)

3. In 2-3 sentences, tell me: What is one way you currently use AI in your creative process?

4. Tell me: What AI tools do you use regularly and which is your favorite?

5. Share a brief description of your internet setup and backup solution



Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be reviewed.

title: AI Research Operator
description:
This is not a traditional EA role. If you are looking for calendar management and inbox work, this is not for you. This role is for someone who is genuinely curious about AI, obsessed with structure, and gets satisfaction from turning chaos into clarity for someone else.



About the Role

I am an AI content creator. I create content for non-technical business owners across TikTok, Instagram, LinkedIn, and a weekly newsletter, making AI simple, practical, and actionable for everyday people.

I am the face, the ideas, and the voice. What I need is someone behind the scenes who captures everything, organizes it, and makes sure nothing falls through the cracks.



What You Will Own



AI Research and News

• Deliver a daily curated AI news digest, scored and filtered for relevance to my audience

• Research new AI tools and return a clear recommendation: worth covering or not, and why

• Monitor key sources (newsletters, X, LinkedIn, YouTube) and flag anything I need to know

• Summarize findings in plain English, structured and easy to scan



Task and Project Management

• Own the project board: capture all incoming tasks, assign priorities, and set deadlines

• Send a clear weekly plan every Monday with what is happening and what needs my input

• Flag deadline risks at least 3 days in advance, not after the fact

• Break vague briefs into scoped tasks with a clear definition of done



Documentation and Systems

• Document how tools and systems are set up so I am never flying blind

• Maintain a living reference of the tech stack, what each tool does, and how they connect

• Write clear process notes when new workflows are established



Research on Request

• When I ask how something works, return a structured top-down explanation, not scattered notes

• Output must be clear enough for a non-technical person to act on immediately

• Research can cover AI tools, platforms, technical concepts, or business topics



What This Role Is Not

• You will not be building, coding, or deploying technical systems

• You will not be making creative decisions about content

• You will not be managing brand partnerships or finances

• You will not be waiting to be asked before flagging a problem



Who You Are

• Based in the Philippines, available for regular async communication

• Obsessively organized, you find satisfaction in structure and order

• Proactive communicator, you send updates before being asked

• Strong written English, clear and concise with no fluff

• Comfortable using AI tools including ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, or similar

• You have worked with a solo founder, content creator, or newsletter operator before

• You understand that a missed deadline has a direct cost to someone else's business

• You are the opposite of scattered. You are the person who organizes scattered people



Tools We Use

• ClickUp for project management

• Claude, Claude code, OpenClaw, Gemini and ChatGPT

• Google Drive and Google Workspace

• Beehiiv for newsletter

• Slack or similar for async communication

• We also test a large range of AI tools on a daily basis



How to Apply



Send a short application (under 300 words) that answers these three questions:

• Describe a time you organized something chaotic for someone else. What did you do and what was the outcome?

• What is one AI tool you have used recently and what did you use it for?

• How do you personally stay on top of deadlines and priorities when managing multiple tasks?

Applications that are vague, generic, or over 300 words will not be considered. Heading should be one word you're best at. Attention to detail starts here.

title: Team Lead Estimator - Fit Out & / OR Millwork  - CEBU
description:
This is not a working remote opportunity. Full time role in Cebu office only. 





Complete Construction is a NZ locally owned company specialising in joinery, renovations and fit outs for hospitality, health care, retail and commercial buildings.  Regardless of the scale, we take pride in every project we complete. Founded in 2003, today our team is made up of highly-skilled and specialist people who are all experts in their chosen field, down to earth, and great team players. It is our people and their talent that ensures the exceptional work we deliver for our clients.



Complete Construction (New Zealand) is hiring a Fit out & / OR Millwork  Estimator to be based in our bidding and pre-construction team in our office in Cebu, Philippines. This is a full-time long term career opportunity. Relocation package offered. 



Responsibilities:



• This role is responsible for leading the Estimating team to ensuring accurate, competitive, and timely cost submissions.      This role combines hands-on estimating with team leadership, process improvement, and close collaboration with the New Zealand management team. 

• Estimating & Pre-Construction

• Lead preparation of accurate and competitive tenders for hospitality, retail and commercial fit-out and bespoke millwork    projects

• Review architectural drawings, specifications, and schedules to develop detailed take-offs

• Prepare and review cost plans, BOQs, and tender submissions

• Source and negotiate with suppliers and subcontractors

• Assess risks, exclusions and value-engineering options. 

• Ensure estimates align with current market rates and company margins

• Team Leadership

• Lead, mentor, and develop a team of 4 estimators 

• Allocate workload and manage estimating deadlines and priorities

• Review and sign off estimates prior to submission to NZ management.

• Promote consistency, accuracy, and best-practice estimating processes



Essential criteria:

• 7+ years’ experience in estimating fit-outs and millwork estimating

• Proven experience leading and mentoring an estimating team

• Strong understanding of joinery manufacturing, materials, finishes, and installation

• High level of accuracy and attention to detail is a must

• Ability to manage multiple tenders under tight deadlines

• Prior experience working in an offshore / outsource role.  Communicating, influencing and stakeholder management comes second nature to you. 

• Someone dependable, proactive, and committed to long-term growth with our team.

• Advanced experience with cloud-based construction and estimating software. Experience using Procore advantageous but not essential 



Salary negotiable for the right candidate. 

HOW TO APPLY – Send your CV to

title: PROFESSIONAL VIDEO EDITOR
description:
We are looking for top-tier video editors only.



This role is for editors who operate at a professional, agency or studio level, not beginners and not intermediates.



If you can replicate high-end edits with precision, speed, and consistency, you will have long-term work and growth with us.



What Makes This Role Different

This is not a typical job post.

We are building a core editing team, not hiring disposable freelancers

Quality, speed, and reliability matter equally

Editors who pass our test are guaranteed a position

This role scales with responsibility, pay, and trust over time



Core Responsibilities

-Edit high-level short-form and long-form content at professional speed

-Execute clean, modern, retention-focused edits

-Use Adobe Premiere Pro and After Effects at an advanced level

-Follow creative direction with minimal back-and-forth

-Deliver edits on or before deadlines every time

-Work collaboratively with producers and other senior editors

-Solve problems independently without constant guidance

-Maintain consistent quality across high-volume workloads



Mandatory Requirements (Non-Negotiable)

-If you do not meet all of the following, do not apply.

-10/10 English proficiency (written and spoken)

-4+ years of professional video editing experience

-Expert-level Adobe Premiere Pro skills

-Expert-level Adobe After Effects skills

-Extremely fast editing speed without sacrificing quality

-Strong understanding of English creative concepts and direction

-Ability to work flexible hours

-Willingness to work weekends when required

-Willingness to work overtime during high-volume periods

-Excellent teamwork and communication skills

-Strong independent problem-solving ability

-Reliable computer, licensed software, and stable internet

-Portfolio of best work is required



The Skill Test (Very Important)

-Please watch the attached video

-If you can replicate this exact style of editing, and your portfolio backs it up, you will be given a test video.



This test exists to:

Eliminate unqualified applicants immediately

Reward editors who can actually execute at a high level



Preferred (Strong Advantages)

Agency or studio editing background

Experience with short-form social content (Reels, TikTok, Shorts)

Strong sense of pacing, rhythm, and viewer retention

Experience working under deadlines with high output

Familiarity with 
, Google Drive, and structured workflows

Personal Traits We Value

Calm under pressure

Extremely reliable

Detail-obsessed

Coachable and professional

Proactive communicator

Long-term mindset (not gig-focused)



What We Offer

Stable, long-term work

Consistent volume

Clear systems and expectations

Professional, structured environment

Growth into senior/editor lead roles over time

How to Apply

To be considered, you must submit:

A short introduction

Your best video editing portfolio (links only)

Total years of professional editing experience

Confirmation that you meet all mandatory requirements

Confirmation that you are willing to complete the replication test

Applications without a portfolio will not be reviewed.



Final Note

This role is not for everyone and that is intentional.

If you are confident in your skill, speed, and professionalism, this is a long-term opportunity.

title: Ecommerce Video Editor | AI-Native | Above Market Pay + Growth Path
description:

We run a DTC brand doing $30M+ a year. Our ads spend hundreds of thousands every month. We are building toward $80M and the way we get there is by assembling a team of the best in the game. All sharpening each other. Think less "corporate hire" and more "Avengers assemble."

Proven experience managing, warming up, and growing Reddit accounts

Strong understanding of karma farming strategies and Reddit's platform rules

Ability to identify high-traffic, relevant subreddits for content placement

title: Senior Video Editor (e-commerce Brand Experience REQUIRED)
description:
Senior Video Editor - Verniqo Health

Remote | Full-Time | $10–$16+ USD Per Hour + Bonuses up to $250 per video!!



- MUST HAVE experience making ads for e-commerce brands

- Please list brands you have worked with and include work and ads that you have made :)



Hey there! We’re a growth-driven Meta Ads & eCommerce brand based in Washington State, US and we’re looking for an eCommerce Video editor to join our team full-time. You’ll work closely with our ad strategists and creative teams to produce winning ads for our Shopify customers.



Why This Role is Crucial:

This is the most important role at our brand. If you're a skilled video editor who thrives on crafting ads that consistently perform, you'll want to read this closely!

This role is not just challenging but also incredibly fulfilling — you'll see firsthand how your edits move the needle for a multi-seven figure brand.



Who Are We Looking For?

At Verniqo Health, we have one core rule: you must have the desire to grow.



Use the word PINEAPPLE at the top of your application if you read this far. Otherwise your application will be disregarded.



As a video editor, you'll bring our team's deep knowledge and insights to life through powerful visuals and storytelling. Your ability to craft scroll-stopping hooks, compelling pacing, and polished ad concepts will be key to your success.

To excel, you'll need to master three key areas:

Understanding the market — Knowing the desires, awareness, and sophistication of the target audience to inform your editing decisions.

Understanding the product — Deep familiarity with the client's product features and unique selling propositions so every edit reinforces the right message.

Crafting your visuals — Transforming raw footage, UGC, and creative briefs into high-converting video ads that stop the scroll and drive action.





Your Responsibilities at Verniqo Health:

Edit & create 1 batch of ads (3-5 videos) per day based on instructions from our creative team.

Add captions, motion graphics, text overlays, and sound design that elevate ad performance.

Collaborate with our copy and strategy teams to ensure creative concepts are executed perfectly.

Attend weekly tea
etings to discuss ad strategies and review performance.

Analyze ad performance weekly and apply learnings to future edits.

Maintain a fast turnaround while upholding a high standard of quality.

Attend or watch recordings of monthly client strategy calls to stay in sync.

Learn the Verniqo Health Buying Strategy to understand what makes video ads win or lose.



More Reasons to Join Verniqo Health:

As a video editor, you'll receive performance bonuses under management up to $250 per video depending on performance.

You'll also have access to training programs, software, and other exclusive resources packed with content that has helped generate over $3M+ in Q4.

+ BONUSES!



Final Notes:

At Verniqo Health, we hold our tea
mbers to high standards and reward exceptional performance.

If this sounds like the opportunity you’ve been waiting for, I’d love to chat and learn more about you. Together, we can accomplish amazing things at Verniqo Health.

Want to stand out? When you apply, mention the core value that resonates with you the most from the list below—and be ready to explain why!

Core Values:

VALUE FIRST - Our success is measured by the value we generate for others.

MOVE FAST - We prioritize quality, but we do it with speed.

WHITE BELT MENTALITY - Growth over ego. We always keep learning, and remember that anybody can teach something new.



Job Type: Full-time

Pay: $10-$16 USD per hour



Benefits:

Work from home

Learn how to make ads from a multi 7-figure brand

Access to leading edge software and technology



Schedule:

8-hour shift

Monday to Friday



Application question(s):

What Core Value resonates with you the most?

Do you have experience editing video ads for eCommerce?

What got you to start being a video editor?



Experience:

Video Editing: 2 years (required)

Ecom experience preferred. + Will to learn



How to Apply

Please include: A short video about yourself, any experience with sales, and video editing, and up to 5 videos MAX of past work (portfolio, social media, or case studies) Your hourly rate and availability (what hours in the day)





Use the word PINEAPPLE at the top of your application if you read this far. Otherwise your application will be disregarded.

title: AI Image Specialist

**Position Overview:**



Magic Story is seeking a highly skilled AI Prompt Engineer & Image Editing Specialist. This unique role combines technical expertise in AI prompt engineering with advanced digital image editing and post-production. The ideal candidate is a digital Swiss Army knife and AI wizard — someone who can generate, evaluate, and refine AI-generated imagery while ensuring that each storybook page is visually polished, avatar-accurate, and emotionally compelling. Familiarity with traditional Photoshop techniques alongside new AI editing tools is essential. Experience with tools like Midjourney, GPT, and Sora is highly valued.



This is a detail-oriented and fast-paced role, with each day revolving around fulfilling personalized customer orders. Candidates should be excited by structured creative work, have a passion for visual accuracy, and thrive in a high-variation production pipeline where quality and efficiency go hand-in-hand.



**Video Introduction Requirement:**



All applicants must submit a short (1–2 minute) video introduction as part of their application. Please introduce yourself, describe your relevant experience, and explain why you’re a great fit for this role. Upload your video to YouTube (unlisted) or Google Drive (shareable link) and include the link in your application. This is required to assess your English fluency and communication skills.



**Key Responsibilities:**



**AI Prompt Engineering & Image Generation:**



- Develop and refine prompts for AI-generated images to ensure high-quality, consistent, and story-appropriate visual outputs.

- Stay up-to-date with the latest advancements in AI image generation tools and techniques (e.g., Midjourney, GPT, Sora) to continually improve output quality.

- Collaborate with the creative team to translate story concepts and character descriptions into visually captivating AI-generated images.



**Image Selection & Post-Production:**



- Review sets of AI-generated images for each story page and select the image that best matches the customer's child's avatar and the scene description.

- Use Adobe Photoshop (and similar tools) to retouch and enhance selected images: adjusting colors (e.g., matching eye and hair color to the child’s photo), correcting any distortions or anomalies (such as extra limbs or other artifacts from AI generation), and improving overall image quality.

- Leverage Photoshop’s AI-powered features (like Generative Fill) alongside traditional editing techniques to remove unwanted artifacts and seamlessly integrate the child's avatar into each illustration.

- Ensure visual consistency and excellence across all pages of the personalized book, so that the child’s character looks consistent and polished throughout the story.



**Workflow & Quality Assurance:**



- Manage the end-to-end image personalization process for each book order, ensuring all orders are completed and delivered on time.

- Work efficiently in a fast-paced environment with unpredictable order volumes – some days may bring a high volume of orders, while other days are lighter.

- Communicate clearly with the team (e.g., writers, designers, customer support) to address any issues and ensure the final product meets our quality standards and the customer's expectations.

- Keep organized records of orders and assets, and contribute to improving the personalization pipeline (suggest new tools, techniques, or process tweaks to enhance efficiency and quality).



**Qualifications:**



**Image Editing Expertise:** Proven experience in image editing, retouching, or photo post-production, with expert-level skills in Adobe Photoshop (color correction, compositing, masking, healing, etc.).



**AI Tool Proficiency:** Hands-on experience with AI image-generation tools (such as Midjourney, Sora, DALL·E, GPT, etc.) and familiarity with crafting effective prompts to achieve desired visual results.



**Attention to Detail:** A keen eye for visual details – able to spot and correct subtle discrepancies in images (e.g., mismatched eye color, artifacts, awkward proportions) to achieve a natural and consistent look.



**Creative Problem-Solving:** Ability to think critically and creatively when faced with imperfect AI outputs, finding solutions through prompt adjustments or digital editing to produce the best possible imagery.



**Tech-Savvy & Adaptable:** Strong understanding of AI technologies (including how generative models work) and enthusiasm for continuously learning new tools or features in this fast-evolving field.



**Communication & Teamwork:** Excellent communication skills (fluent in English) and a collaborative attitude. Comfortable working in a remote team, asking questions, and giving updates to ensure smooth workflow.



**Time Management:** Proven ability to manage time effectively in a dynamic environment, balancing multiple orders/projects and meeting deadlines consistently.



**Bonus Skills (Optional):** Familiarity with 3D modeling/animation or graphic design is a plus. Experience with coding or web/eCommerce platforms (e.g., Shopify, WordPress) is also a bonus, though not required.



**Compensation & Benefits:**



- Flat monthly rate of **$1,200 USD** (full-time contractor role)

- Remote work with flexible working hours

- Opportunity to work with a creative, dynamic team passionate about storytelling and technology

- Access to the latest AI tools and technologies to support your work and professional growth

- The chance to shape the future of children’s storytelling by delivering magical, personalized experiences to young readers

- Optional 13th month bonus based on performance

- Paid Philippine national holidays



**How to Apply:**



Interested candidates are invited to submit their resume, portfolio, and a video introduction to 
 your application, please detail your experience with AI image generation and Photoshop editing. Include a portfolio that features before-and-after image edits or AI-generated artwork you’ve helped enhance. Please also provide the required video introduction as a YouTube (unlisted) or Google Drive link.



Magic Story is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees.



**Join us in creating the next generation of magical storytelling!**

title: Freelance Graphic Designer – Static Meta Ad Creatives (Ecommerce)
description:
Hi! We're a fast-growing ecommerce fragrance brand from the Netherlands. We sell premium scented cleaning products and are scaling our Meta advertising. We're looking for a reliable freelance graphic designer for ongoing weekly work.

Every week we send you a briefing with the offer, copy, and reference examples. You design the creatives. We handle strategy, you focus on design execution.



WHAT YOU'LL DESIGN

Offer ads - discount, bundle, or deal creatives (main focus)

TOF ads - lifestyle and brand feel creatives (secondary)

Always 2 formats per creative: square (1:1) for feed + vertical (9:16) for Stories



VOLUME

10–20 creatives per week (all the creatives in the following formats -  1:1 + 9:16)

Volume may vary week to week



YOUR TASKS

Design 3 visual variants per angle (same message, different layout/style)

Apply brand guidelines (logo, colors, fonts - all provided)

Deliver named files in our folder structure via Google Drive

Process one round of feedback per batch



REQUIREMENTS

Portfolio with static Meta ad examples (ecommerce or lifestyle brands)

At least 1 offer ad or promotional creative in your portfolio

Proficient in Figma and/or Canva

Reliable with deadlines - every week, on time

Comfortable working from written briefs in English



PAYMENT

$3–$5 per creative set (1:1 + 9:16 together = 1 set)

Paid weekly

Performance bonuses for creatives that perform well as ads



HOW TO APPLY

Start your message with the word "STATIC" followed by your tool: Figma or Canva.

Example: "STATIC – Figma"

Then answer in 2–3 sentences: What makes a good offer ad visually stand out and drive clicks?

Applications without this will not be reviewed.

title: Full-Stack Developer for 1:1 Rebuild of a Product Configurator
description:
We are looking for a highly skilled full-stack developer to manually recreate a complex web-based product configurator with exact 1:1 behavior, logic, option dependencies, dynamic image changes, and user flow. This is not a simple redesign or approximation — the goal is to fully understand every selection path, conditional rule, and UI state, then rebuild it as a standalone application with identical functionality.

You must be comfortable analyzing a live configurator in depth, clicking through every possible combination, identifying hidden logic, and reproducing the entire experience manually.

title: Content Creator Operations Virtual Assistant
description:

About the Role



I’m a full-time fashion, lifestyle, and hosting content creator looking for a highly organized, proactive **Content Operations Virtual Assistant** to help manage the backend of my business.



This role is focused on **keeping my content, website, YouTube, and newsletter running consistently and smoothly** so I can focus on creating.



If you love systems, organization, and working behind the scenes of a growing personal brand—this is for you.



Key Responsibilities



Content Management & Organization

title: Full Stack Developer (Node.js / Vue.js) – Offshore (Full-Time)
description:
We are an established Australian SaaS company in the accounting space, entering an exciting growth phase. Our platform is already in market with a growing client base, and we are looking for a skilled Full Stack Developer to help scale and evolve our product.



This is a long-term, full-time opportunity to work on a live, production-grade application — not a greenfield build — where your work will directly impact thousands of users.



About the Role

You will be working on an existing codebase, extending functionality, improving performance, and helping scale the platform as our customer base grows.



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys:

Taking ownership of features end-to-end

Working within and improving an existing architecture

Building scalable, maintainable systems



Tech Stack

Backend: Node.js

Frontend: Vue.js

Database: PostgreSQL



Key Responsibilities

Develop and maintain full stack features across the platform

Extend and optimise an existing Node.js backend

Build clean, responsive interfaces using Vue.js

Work with PostgreSQL for data modelling and performance tuning

Identify and address performance bottlenecks as we scale

Collaborate with the Head of Technology on architecture and technical direction

Contribute to sprint planning and ongoing product improvements



Working Arrangement

Full-time position (offshore)

Preferred start time: 10:00 AM Brisbane (AEST) to align with team collaboration

Daily communication via Slack

Regular check-ins:

Daily during onboarding

Structured sprint cadence once established



Reporting Line

You will report directly to the Head of Technology, working closely to shape and scale the product.



What We’re Looking For

Strong experience with Node.js in production environments

Solid experience with Vue.js (or similar modern frontend frameworks)

Experience working with PostgreSQL

Proven ability to work with and improve existing codebases

Strong understanding of scalable application design

Comfortable working remotely with distributed teams

Good written and verbal English communication skills



Nice to Have

Experience with SaaS platforms (especially in finance/accounting)

Familiarity with performance optimisation and scaling systems

Experience working in agile/sprint environments



Why Join Us

Work on a real product with real users

Be part of a growing Australian tech company

Direct access to technical leadership and decision-making

Long-term stability and meaningful work



Important Notes

This is an individual contributor role — no agencies please

Applicants must be available to work aligned with Australian business hours (AEST)

title: Local SEO Specialist (Google Maps Ranking Expert)
description:
Local SEO Specialist (Google Maps Ranking Expert) + WordPress/Elementor + AI + Website Admin — Full-Time



PRIMARY ROLE:

Rank local businesses in the Google Maps 3-Pack (Map Pack). If you cannot show proof of Map Pack rankings, do NOT apply.



------------------------------------------------------------



MAIN RESPONSIBILITIES



Google Maps / Local SEO (Top Priority)

- Rank Google Business Profiles (GBP) in the Map Pack

- Improve Google Maps ranking performance using Local Falcon or Local Viking grid tracking

- Optimize categories, services, posts, attributes, and photos

- Fix NAP/citation inconsistencies

- Resolve duplicates, spam listings, and suspensions

- Rank competitive U.S. home-service niches (plumbing, roofing, concrete, HVAC, electrical, and other contractor services)



WordPress + Elementor (Supports Local SEO)

- Build or update service and city pages

- Improve Core Web Vitals and site speed

- Fix plugin, hosting, DNS, and SSL issues

- Optimize silo structure and internal linking for SEO



Website Maintenance / Administration

- Update plugins, themes, and WordPress core

- Manage backups and restoration points

- Monitor uptime and fix site errors

- Handle DNS, SSL, and hosting tasks

- Resolve plugin conflicts and performance issues

- Improve caching, CDN configurations, and overall site stability



AI Skills (Required)

- Perform Local SEO audits and identify ranking issues

- Troubleshoot technical issues (speed, CLS/LCP, plugin conflicts, Elementor errors)

- Generate and validate schema (JSON-LD)

- Improve workflow efficiency (SOPs, QA, audits)

- Support content creation (service pages, city pages, GBP posts, FAQs)



SOP Execution

- Follow detailed SOPs accurately

- Maintain consistency across a large volume of websites

- Create or update SOPs when needed

- Use AI to improve SOPs and workflows

- Document steps clearly

- Maintain high quality and consistency at scale



Leadership and Training

- Guide or train junior tea
mbers when needed

- Help others follow SOPs

- Delegate simple tasks

- Provide clear instructions and feedback

- Support a collaborative, results-focused environment



------------------------------------------------------------



REQUIRED EXPERIENCE

- Minimum 3 years of Local SEO experience

- Proven Map Pack ranking results (must show evidence)

- Strong WordPress and Elementor skills

- Website maintenance and admin experience

- Strong AI skills (audits, troubleshooting, schema, workflows, content)

- Comfortable training or guiding tea
mbers

- Excellent English

- Full-time availability (40 hours per week)

- Stable power and internet setup



------------------------------------------------------------



FULL-TIME — FIXED MONTHLY SALARY

Include your expected monthly salary (USD) in your Loom video.



------------------------------------------------------------

APPLICATION PROCESS:

LOOM VIDEO REQUIRED (10–15 minutes)

Applications without a Loom video will NOT be considered.



PART 1 — DESCRIBE

- Your name and location

- Years of Local SEO experience

- Your exact role in past Local SEO or Map Pack projects

  (Were you solo or part of a team? What tasks were you responsible for?)

- Your step-by-step Google Maps ranking strategy

- Your experience training or guiding tea
mbers

- Expected monthly salary (USD)



PART 2 — SHOW (Screen Share Required)

- 2–3 Google Business Profiles you personally ranked

- Local Falcon or Local Viking grids before and after

  (Explain what you did to improve the results)

- A WordPress or Elementor website you worked on

- Your website maintenance/admin work, including:

  - Plugins

  - Backups

  - Hosting panel (cPanel, Cloudways, etc.)

  - SSL and DNS tasks

- How you use AI for:

  - Local SEO audits

  - Technical troubleshooting

  - Schema generation

  - Content support



------------------------------------------------------------



ABOUT US

We are a U.S.-based digital marketing company specializing in lead generation for the home services industry. We build, grow, and maintain a large portfolio of websites and online assets focused on strong performance, search visibility, and user experience. As we continue to expand our digital footprint, we are looking for skilled, long-term tea
mbers who can help us create new sites, improve existing ones, strengthen SEO strategies, and support our growth initiatives. Our team works remotely, follows clear SOPs, and uses AI to improve efficiency and accuracy across all workflows.

title: Tracking QA Specialist (GA4 + GTM Server-Side) — Daily Funnel Validation
description:
Role Overview

We’re looking for a detail-oriented QA specialist to validate tracking accuracy across our funnels.

This role is critical to ensuring:

Events fire correctly in GTM (server-side via Stape)

Data matches inside GA4 + attribution tools

No revenue or conversion data is lost due to tracking errors

You will run daily live test purchases across funnels and document any tracking issues.



Core Responsibilities

Perform daily test purchases across active funnels

Validate event tracking across:

GA4 (Realtime + DebugView)

GTM (server-side logs via Stape)

Confirm firing of key events:

Page View

View Content

Add to Cart

Initiate Checkout

Purchase

Subscription Start 

Identify and document:

Missing events

Duplicate firing

Parameter mismatches

Attribution inconsistencies

Record Loom videos showing:

Full test purchase flow

Event validation in GA4 + GTM

Report issues clearly to dev + growth team



Daily Workflow (2 Hours / Day)

Shift: 7:00 AM – 9:00 AM PST

Run test purchases across assigned funnels

Check GA4 + GTM event firing

Validate Offer ID / transaction data

Record Loom walkthrough

Log findings in tracker (Notion / Sheet / Slack)



Requirements

Basic experience with:

Google Analytics 4 (GA4)

Google Tag Manager (GTM)

Strong attention to detail

Ability to follow structured QA checklists

Comfortable recording Loom videos

Reliable internet + ability to work daily



Nice to Have (Not Required)

Experience with:

Server-side tracking (Stape)

Meta / TikTok event tracking

Ecommerce funnels



Compensation

$4/hour

2 hours/day (7–9 AM PST)

Long-term opportunity based on performance



How to Apply

Please include:

A short Loom (1–2 min) explaining how you would check if a “Purchase” event fired correctly

Your experience with GA4 / GTM (if any)

Confirmation of availability for the time window



???? Internal Note (Why This Role Matters)

This role protects against:

Attribution loss (six-figure impact)

False CRO test results

Scaling broken funnels

title: AI Data Annotation Specialist
description:
Remote | Full-Time (40 hrs/week) | Long-Term Position



About the Role

We are a fast-growing AI company looking for a detail-oriented Data Annotation Specialist to join our remote team. You will play a critical role in training and improving our AI models by accurately labeling, categorizing, and annotating image and video content. This is a long-term, full-time position with growth opportunities.



Responsibilities



Annotate images using bounding boxes, polygons, segmentation masks, and keypoints following detailed guidelines

Label and tag video content frame-by-frame or at the clip level, ensuring temporal consistency

Classify and categorize visual content based on predefined taxonomies

Maintain high accuracy and consistency across large batches of annotation tasks

Follow annotation guidelines precisely and flag ambiguous cases for review

Participate in quality assurance reviews and provide feedback on edge cases

Meet daily/weekly annotation targets while maintaining quality standards

Communicate progress, blockers, and questions clearly to the team lead





Requirements

Must Have:



Proven experience with image and/or video annotation tasks

Hands-on experience with annotation tools such as Labelbox, CVAT, Label Studio, or similar platforms

Strong attention to detail and ability to follow complex guidelines

Proficient in English (written communication for daily coordination)

Reliable internet connection and a computer capable of running annotation tools

Available to work 40 hours per week on a consistent schedule

Self-motivated with the ability to work independently in a remote setting



Nice to Have:



Experience with multiple annotation types: bounding boxes, semantic segmentation, instance segmentation, keypoint detection

Familiarity with AI/ML concepts and how training data impacts model performance

Previous QA or review experience in annotation projects

Experience working with large-scale datasets (10K+ images/videos)

Basic knowledge of Python or scripting for data processing





What We Offer



Competitive compensation (discussed during interview)

Fully remote — work from anywhere

Flexible scheduling within agreed working hours

Long-term, stable employment — not a short-term gig

Comprehensive training and clear annotation guidelines provided

Opportunity to grow into a team lead or QA reviewer role

Work at the cutting edge of AI technology





How to Apply

Please send a message including:



A brief introduction and your relevant experience

Which annotation tools you have used and for what types of tasks

Your availability (start date and weekly hours)

Examples or descriptions of past annotation projects (if available)



We review applications on a rolling basis. Apply early for priority consideration.

title: Short-Term Rental Operations Specialist
description:
About Us

ERTE Properties is a growing short-term rental management company based in the UK, managing a portfolio of contractor accommodation and group-stay properties across Reading and the Thames Valley. We operate at a high standard and move fast — we need someone who can keep up.

The Role

We're looking for a highly experienced Short-Term Rental VA who has been around the block on all major OTAs and knows how to run operations without hand-holding. This is not an entry-level role. You will own the day-to-day and be expected to hit the ground running from week one.

What You'll Be Doing



Managing guest communications across all OTA platforms (Airbnb, 
, Expedia, and direct) with a focus on fast response times and high review scores

Handling all operations inside Guesty — reservations, calendar management, rate updates, inbox management, and reporting

Managing guest messaging and automated workflows via Enso Connect

Coordinating cleaners and maintenance teams, flagging issues proactively

Monitoring and adjusting pricing using Intellihost to stay competitive

Managing tasks, SOPs, and team workflows inside ClickUp

Making and receiving calls when necessary via Circle Loop

Creating graphics, property assets, and social content in Canva and Photoshop

Supporting marketing and CRM workflows inside GoHighLevel

Generating performance reports and flagging anomalies to management

Processing Airbnb reimbursement claims and basic financial tracking



What You Must Have



Minimum 2–3 years working as a VA specifically in short-term rental operations

Hands-on, proven experience with Guesty — this is non-negotiable

Working knowledge of Enso Connect for guest messaging automation

Experience using Intellihost or similar dynamic pricing tools

Comfortable managing tasks and documentation in ClickUp

Proficient in GoHighLevel for CRM and automation workflows

Confident making client or vendor calls via Circle Loop when needed

Strong design skills in Canva and Photoshop

Fluent written English with professional guest communication skills

Highly organised, proactive, and able to manage priorities independently



Nice to Have



Experience with direct booking website management

 marketing to past guests to drive repeat direct bookings

Landing page creation and basic copywriting

Social media scheduling and content creation



What We're NOT Looking For



Someone who needs to be trained on the basics of STR operations

Someone who lists tools on their CV but hasn't used them in a live environment

Someone who needs constant supervision to complete tasks

title: Product Listing & Social Media Marketing Specialist (Shopify + Canva)

We manage over 5,000 active SKUs, nearly 20,000 product variants, and add 5–50 new products daily. This is a high-volume, detail-intensive environment where organization, speed, and accuracy are critical.



We are hiring an experienced Shopify and Canva specialist to manage product listings, marketing graphics, social media posting, and basic
 campaigns. This role will begin part-time at 20 hours per week, with a clear path to increased hours and eventual full-time growth based on performance and company expansion.



Compensation for this role is ?500–?550 per hour based on proven experience. A paid trial project (5–10 hours) is required before final hiring. A performance review will be conducted after 90 days with opportunity for increased hours and compensation based on results.



This is not an entry-level role. You must already be confident navigating the Shopify backend, managing variants and metafields, maintaining clean taxonomy, and working inside structured systems at scale. You should not require step-by-step hand-holding. You are expected to take brief prompts and independently gather the necessary details (from
s, vendor information, product pages, and research) to complete the work correctly.



A typical instruction might be: “New Marvel Legends wave tomorrow. Info coming via
. 7 SKUs.” From that brief prompt, you should be able to extract the product data, research missing information, create accurate Shopify listings, assign correct collections, tags, and product types, set metafields properly to maintain taxonomy, design promotional graphics in Canva, draft basic marketing copy, and schedule posts or campaigns accordingly.



Core responsibilities include creating and optimizing product listings, managing SKU and variant structures, maintaining consistent taxonomy (collections, tags, product types, and metafields), ensuring listings go live the same day they are assigned (unless a different date is specified), and protecting data accuracy across thousands of products. You will also design clean, on-brand promotional graphics in Canva, write captions, and schedule posts using Metricool while keeping visual output consistent across platforms. For
 marketing, you will monitor our receiving log and inventory levels and launch template-based MailerLite campaigns when product arrives, using approved templates and writing clear, concise promotional copy that matches our brand voice.



Over time, this role is expected to grow into ownership of website content, digital merchandising, and marketing execution.



Strong English communication skills, proven Shopify backend experience, Canva design ability, independence, reliability, and comfort with fast-paced direct communication are non-negotiable. You must have at least one hour of overlap with U.S. Eastern morning time daily and be available for full U.S. hours approximately 5–10 times per year for major release/event days.



To Apply:  Record a 3–5 minute Loom video introducing yourself. In the video:



- Start by telling us your favorite toy line growing up.

- Explain your Shopify backend experience.

- Explain your Canva experience.

- Describe a large catalog or structured system you have managed.



Send links to:



- Shopify stores you’ve worked on

- Canva designs you’ve created

- Social media accounts you’ve managed (if applicable)

-Confirm your hourly rate expectation within the posted range and your weekly availability.



Applications that do not follow all instructions exactly will not be reviewed.
