title: Customer Support & Measurements Coordinator — Permanent Lighting Company (US-Based) $5/hr + Performance Bonuses
description:
About the Company

We install premium permanent outdoor LED lighting systems on homes across the United States. Think custom-color Christmas lights that stay up year-round — except high-end, professionally installed, and built to last a lifetime. Our customers pay $3,000–$10,000 for their systems and expect a premium experience from start to finish. We're a fast-growing company and we take care of the people on our team.



What You'll Be Doing

This role has two main responsibilities:

1. Roof Measurements (approx. 2–3 hours per morning/afternoon)



Using EagleView and RoofSnap (we'll train you), pull roof measurements for upcoming sales appointments

Calculate linear footage per side of the home using a simple formula we'll teach you

Enter measurements into our CRM (HighLevel) before each appointment's start time — this is time-sensitive and directly tied to your bonus

Handle edge cases like new builds and late appointment confirmations

Flag anything that doesn't look right rather than guessing



2. Customer Inbound Support (remaining hours)



Respond to customer messages in our CRM via text and

Answer inbound phone calls from customers asking about their installation timeline, materials status, or general questions

Look up project status in our systems and give clear, accurate updates

De-escalate frustrated customers calmly and professionally — we'll give you scripts and context

Log notes and escalate anything you can't resolve



This is detail-oriented, process-driven work. We have documented SOPs for everything. You won't be figuring things out on your own — you'll be following a clear system and flagging when something falls outside of it.



Compensation

Base pay: $5.00/hr

Performance bonuses — paid:



Measurements Deadline Bonus: You earn a bonus for every appointment where measurements are uploaded before the appointment start time. Miss the deadline, no bonus. 

Call Answer Rate Bonus: You earn a bonus based on the percentage of inbound customer calls you answer during your shift. We track this.  Targets and bonus amounts will be shared during the interview.



We built the bonus structure this way intentionally — if you're reliable and consistent, you make meaningfully more than the base rate. If you're not, the base is what you get. We want someone who sees the bonus as the norm, not the exception.



You're a Great Fit If You:



Have experience in customer support (phone and chat) — 2+ years preferred

Are extremely reliable and show up on time, every day

Communicate clearly in written and spoken English

Can follow a multi-step process accurately without skipping steps

Are comfortable learning new software tools (we'll train you — but you need to be a fast learner)

Have a stable internet connection and a quiet place to take calls

Are available to start your shift by 6:00 a.m. EST





You're Not a Fit If You:



Need constant supervision to complete routine tasks

Have unreliable internet or frequent power outages with no backup

Are looking for a short-term gig — we want someone long-term

Skip instructions in job applications (more on that below)





The Details



Pay: $5/hr base + performance bonuses

Hours: Part-time to start (~20 hrs/week), with the opportunity to grow to full-time as you prove yourself

Schedule: Monday–Sunday, morning shift aligned to US Central/Eastern time

Equipment: You must have your own computer and reliable internet. A headset for calls is required.

Start date: As soon as the right person is found





How to Apply

We receive a lot of applications. To make sure we find the right person, we ask everyone to complete a short Google Form before we consider your application. It takes about 5 minutes.

Do not send a message here asking for more information. Do not send a resume attachment. Only applications submitted through the form will be reviewed.



Click the link below to apply:





If you can follow that one simple instruction, you're already ahead of most applicants.

title: Graphic Designer & Social Media Content Editor
description:
Graphic Designer & Social Media Content Editor



Full-Time | Remote | Philippines | $5/hour USD



We are looking for a creative, organized, and dependable Filipino Graphic Designer & Social Media Content Editor to join our growing team full-time.



This role is ideal for someone who is strong in graphic design, social media visuals, short-form video editing, and content support and wants a stable long-term opportunity with room to grow.



You will support a fast-moving business ecosystem led by the CEO of Innovative Global Entities (IGE), a multi-brand company involved in business education, media, publishing, podcasting, and digital marketing. Our brands include Get Biz Credit, Reimagine iT Inc., Excel Media Group, Affluential Magazine, Mind Your Business Podcast, and more.



What You’ll Be Doing



Your main focus will be helping us create and prepare high-quality branded content for social media, promotions, podcast marketing, and online publishing.



Main Responsibilities

Design social media graphics, quote cards, promo posts, and carousel content

Edit short-form videos for Reels, Shorts, and TikTok

Create flyers and branded marketing visuals

Repurpose podcast and brand content into clips and social assets

Write or format basic captions and calls to action

Help schedule and organize content

Keep files organized and follow content workflows

Support multiple brands while maintaining visual consistency

Tools You Should Know



You do not need to be an expert in everything, but you should already be comfortable with most of these:

CapCut, Premiere Pro, or similar editing software

Social media formatting for Instagram,
, TikTok, LinkedIn, and YouTube

Basic WordPress editing

Google Drive, Docs, and Sheets

Good written English



Experience with InDesign is a plus. Experience with podcast content is also a plus. Your current ad requires Photoshop, InDesign, After Effects, WordPress, Teams, PowerPoint, and publishing tools, which likely narrows the pool too aggressively for the compensation.



Who We Want



We are looking for someone who is:



Creative and visually strong

Organized and detail-oriented

Reliable and responsive

Able to follow instructions and brand direction

Comfortable handling recurring weekly tasks

Professional in written English

Eager to learn and grow with the company

Requirements

At least 1–2 years of experience in graphic design, content creation, or social media support

Portfolio required

Reliable computer or laptop

Stable internet connection

Available full-time

Must have at least some overlap with 9:00 AM – 2:00 PM Eastern Time

Pay & Benefits

$5/hour USD

Paid bi-weekly via Payoneer or PayPal

Paid holidays after probation

Opportunity for raises based on performance

Long-term growth opportunity for the right person

Why This Is a Great Opportunity

Stable, full-time remote role

Work on exciting brands in media, publishing, business, and podcasting

Opportunity to grow into a larger creative role

Direct support from leadership

Long-term position for someone dependable and talented

How to Apply



Please send the following to 



Subject line:

Application – Graphic Designer & Social Media Content Editor



Include:



Your updated resume

A short introduction about yourself

Your portfolio or sample links

The tools you use most often

Your internet speed and computer specs

Your work availability in Philippine time



IMPORTANT NOTE:



Please apply only if you have real experience creating graphics and editing content for social media. Portfolio samples are required.

title: Website Manager (WordPress / Next.js / SEO)
description:
About Us



We are The Dog House Pet Salon, a Houston-based pet services company with 3 grooming locations and a pet technology platform called My Pet Credentials. We manage multiple web properties including WordPress sites (with Elementor), a Next.js website, and various business listings across Google, Yelp, and other platforms. We need someone who can keep everything running smoothly, optimize our search visibility, and manage content across all of our digital properties.



We are a family-run business that values reliability, initiative, and attention to detail.



What You Will Do



- Manage and update our WordPress websites using Elementor page builder

- Make content updates, publish blog posts, and maintain page accuracy across all web properties

- Perform on-page SEO optimization (meta titles, descriptions, headings, internal linking, image alt text)

- Monitor and improve technical SEO (page speed, Core Web Vitals, crawl errors, sitemap, robots.txt)

- Manage local SEO for 3 physical locations (Google Business Profiles, Yelp, Apple Maps, local citations)

- Use Google Search Console and Google Analytics to track performance and identify issues

- Make minor content updates to our Next.js website (text, images, basic component edits)

- Monitor website uptime and respond to issues (slow load times, broken pages, SSL certificates)

- Coordinate with developers when technical fixes are needed beyond content management

- Use AI tools to research SEO opportunities, draft content, and diagnose website issues



Skills Required



- 2+ years of WordPress management experience (content updates, plugin management, basic troubleshooting)

- Experience with Elementor or similar visual page builders

- Working knowledge of on-page and technical SEO

- Experience with Google Search Console and Google Analytics

- Understanding of local SEO (Google Business Profile optimization, NAP consistency, local citations)

- Basic understanding of HTML/CSS (enough to make minor edits and troubleshoot layout issues)

- Strong written English for content management and blog posts

- Organized, detail-oriented, and able to manage multiple properties simultaneously

- Comfortable using AI tools for research, content drafting, and problem diagnosis



Nice to Have



- Experience with Next.js or React-based websites (even basic familiarity)

- Knowledge of structured data / JSON-LD markup

- Experience managing Google Ads or social media accounts

- Familiarity with cPanel, Plesk, or similar hosting control panels

- Basic image editing skills (Canva, Photoshop, or similar)



Why Join Us



- Long-term, stable position with a company that has been serving the Houston community for years

- Clear, well-defined responsibilities -- no ambiguity about what success looks like

- Opportunity to grow into a broader digital marketing role as the company expands

- Competitive pay with annual raises based on performance

- Supportive team that provides context and training, not just task lists

- Work across a variety of platforms and properties -- no two days are exactly the same



How to Apply



Send your application with:

1. A brief introduction about yourself and your WordPress/SEO experience

2. Examples of websites you have managed (URLs if possible)

3. One specific SEO improvement you made on a past project and the result

4. Your experience with Google Business Profile management



Qualified candidates will be asked to complete a short online skills assessment (approximately 60 minutes). You will diagnose website issues, perform an SEO audit on our actual website, and walk through an emergency response scenario. AI tools are welcome -- we want to see how you think, not memorize.



Work Schedule: Full-time, 40 hours per week. We are flexible on exact hours but expect overlap with US Central Time (Houston, TX) for team communication.



Payment: Paid bi-weekly or monthly via your preferred method (Wise, PayPal, direct bank transfer).



Equipment: You provide your own computer and internet connection. We provide access to all necessary software, accounts, and AI tool subscriptions.



We use AI assistants (Claude, ChatGPT, Copilot, Cursor) as a standard part of our workflow. We are looking for people who know how to use AI effectively and know when it is wrong.

) and MPC web dashboard

- TypeScript

Why Join Us

Qualified candidates will be asked to complete a short online skills assessment (approximately 75 minutes, open-book, AI tools encouraged). You will build a component, debug a UI, and convert a design to code -- practical tasks that reflect the actual work.



Work Schedule: Full-time, 40 hours per week. We are flexible on exact hours but expect overlap with US Central Time (Houston, TX) for team communication.

We use AI assistants (Claude, ChatGPT, Copilot, Cursor) as a standard part of our workflow. We are looking for people who know how to use AI effectively and know when it is wrong.

MPC is a pet identification and records platform that gives every pet a unique ID, stores vaccination records, manages lost-and-found alerts, and connects pet owners with groomers and veterinarians.  services for transactional notifications (registration confirmations, lost pet alerts, appointment reminders)

 integration (SMTP, transactional
 services)

Why Join Us

ans you have real ownership and your voice matters

Equipment: You provide your own computer and internet connection. We provide access to all necessary software, accounts, and AI tool subscriptions.



We use AI assistants (Claude, ChatGPT, Copilot, Cursor) as a standard part of our workflow. We are looking for people who know how to use AI effectively and know when it is wrong.

title: GTM Campaign Engineer
description:
Location: Remote (PH-based preferred)

Type: Full-time

Salary: $1,200/month

About us

We are an AI-powered lead generation and outreach service. We build and run cold outbound campaigns for B2B companies, primarily recruitment and staffing agencies. We handle everything from lead sourcing to messaging to campaign execution. The systems are built, the clients are signed, and we need someone to operate the machine.

The role

You will be the person who takes approved campaign configurations and makes them real. That means building Clay tables, setting up campaigns in HeyReach and Instantly, loading sequences, managing LinkedIn automation, monitoring deliverability, and making sure every campaign runs smoothly across multiple clients simultaneously.

You are not doing strategy. You are not doing sales. You are executing campaigns that have already been planned and approved, following documented SOPs. You will manage 5-10+ campaigns across multiple clients at any given time.

What you will do



Build and manage Clay tables for lead enrichment, filtering, and data cleanup

Set up and monitor
 campaigns in Instantly and Salesforge

Set up and monitor LinkedIn automation campaigns in HeyReach

Load approved messaging sequences into the correct tools with the correct configurations

Follow SOPs precisely for each sourcing module (Sales Navigator scraping, Bright Data job scraping, CSV imports, webhook integrations, deep research workflows)

Monitor campaign performance daily (deliverability, reply rates, bounce rates)

Flag issues before they become problems (domain health, sequence errors, data quality)

Manage DNC lists and ensure contacts are properly excluded

Route replies to the correct client contacts based on campaign identity

Handle the CC handoff process for referral campaigns

Run Supabase dedup checks before launching campaigns

Maintain clean records of what is running, for which client, and the status of each campaign



What you need



Experience with Clay (building tables, using integrations, enrichment workflows, AI columns). This is non-negotiable. If you have not used Clay before, do not apply.

Experience with at least one cold
 sequencer (Instantly, Smartlead, Salesforge, or similar)

Experience with LinkedIn automation tools (HeyReach, Expandi, Dripify, or similar)

Understanding of cold
 deliverability (domain warming, inbox rotation, SPF/DKIM/DMARC, bounce management)

Comfort working with AI tools and prompts (you will use AI-generated content and need to QA it, not just copy-paste blindly)

Strong attention to detail. You are managing multiple campaigns across multiple clients. One wrong sequence loaded into the wrong campaign means a client's prospects get the wrong message. This cannot happen.

Ability to follow SOPs exactly as written while flagging when something does not make sense

Basic understanding of webhooks, CSV data handling, and how tools connect to each other

Reliable internet and availability during US business hours (you will overlap with US-based clients)



Nice to have



Experience with n8n, Make, or Zapier for workflow automation

Experience with Supabase or any database tool

Experience with Bright Data or web scraping tools

Experience with Sales Navigator

Familiarity with the recruitment/staffing industry

Experience managing campaigns for an agency (multiple clients simultaneously)



How you will be evaluated



Can you set up a Clay table from a documented SOP without hand-holding?

Can you manage 5+ campaigns across 3+ clients without dropping balls?

Do you catch errors before they go live?

Do you flag issues proactively or wait until something breaks?

Can you context-switch between clients without mixing up configurations?



To apply

Send a short message (not a cover letter, just a few sentences) answering:



Which cold
 and LinkedIn tools have you used, and for how long?

What is your experience with Clay specifically? Describe a table or workflow you built.

How many simultaneous campaigns have you managed at once across different clients?

What timezone are you in and what hours can you work?



Include a link to your LinkedIn profile. No generic applications. If your message could apply to any job posting, it will be ignored.

title: Sales Agent — EdTech (Private Schools)
description:
About The Math Wiz



The Math Wiz (
) is an online math learning platform for Filipino elementary students (Grades 1–6). Built on Singapore Math methodology and fully aligned to the DepEd MATATAG curriculum, it gives schools a turnkey digital math program — video lessons, interactive quizzes with full solutions, and self-paced learning on any device.





The Role



You will approach private elementary schools in your city and pitch The Math Wiz as a school-wide annual subscription. Schools bundle the subscription into their student fees and earn a margin — so you're not asking schools to spend money, you're showing them a new revenue line.



This is a field sales role. You'll visit schools, meet principals and academic coordinators, and walk them through how the platform works. We provide all materials — a school-facing booklet, pitch scripts, phone scripts, and a step-by-step sales playbook.





Commission Structure



On top of the wage, there will be a commission structure designed for serious earning potential:



Year 1: 70% of collected revenue from every school you sign

Year 2 onwards: 10% perpetual renewal commission for every year that school stays subscribed



This is not a one-time payout. Every school you close becomes a recurring income stream. Sign 5 schools and you have passive renewal income coming in every year with no additional work.





How Your Commission Is Protected



You won't be pitching one school at a time. You'll be working a pipeline of multiple schools simultaneously, each at a different stage of the sales process. By the time your first school signs, you'll have several others already warmed up and in progress.



This means our incentives are fully aligned. If we don't pay your commission on school #1, you walk — and we lose every other school you've been building relationships with. The cost of not paying you far outweighs the cost of paying you. Your pipeline is your leverage.



On top of that, all commission terms are documented in a formal Sales Agent Agreement before you start.





Example Earnings



One school with 200 students at ?800/student/year = ?160,000 collected

Your Year 1 commission = ?112,000

Your renewal commission every year after = ?16,000

Scale that to 5 schools and the numbers speak for themselves.





Requirements



Based in Metro Manila, Cebu City, or Davao City

Sales experience (field sales, B2B, or direct selling preferred)

Confident approaching schools and speaking with principals and administrators

Can work independently and manage your own schedule

Has own transportation for school visits

Fluent in Filipino and English





What We Provide



Professional school-facing booklet and sales agent booklet

Phone scripts and in-person pitch scripts

Step-by-step sales playbook with a proven multi-touch approach

Ongoing support and coordination from the founder directly





How to Apply



Apply through this listing. Tell us which city you're based in and briefly describe your sales experience. Shortlisted applicants will be invited to a short Zoom call to walk through the opportunity in detail.

title: Short-Form Video Editor (Flexible Hours, $3,000-$5,000 / month )
description:
Paid Trial To Complete (Required to Apply, $150 if you complete it!)

When submitting your application, include these 3 trial videos: 
tion.site/Editor-Application-Test-Brief-326f
ede1d820b810?source=copy_link



NOTE: Applications without the trial will not be considered.



Role Overview



We are looking for a highly creative and results-driven Performance Video Editor to join our team. Your mission will be to create high-performing organic video for Instagram and TikTok that don't look like ads. If you have a knack for creating content that stops the scroll and engages audiences, we want to talk to you.



This is a long-term, fully remote position for an editor who is passionate about the intersection of creativity and data, and is excited by the opportunity to have their work directly impact business results.



What You'll Do:



- Edit raw footage into compelling, fast-paced short-form video tailored for organic TikToks and Instagram Reels.

- Incorporate viral trends, engaging hooks, and retention-focused pacing to maximize performance.

- Add dynamic captions, relevant B-roll, and sound design to create a native viewing experience.

- Collaborate with our marketing team to test new creative concepts and iterate on winning ads to scale campaigns.

- Analyze ad performance to understand what resonates with the audience and apply those insights to future edits.



Who We're Looking For:



- A Viral Content Creator: You have proven experience creating organic short-form videos (TikToks, Reels) that have achieved significant reach and engagement. You understand what makes content shareable and how to capture attention in the first three seconds.

- A Performance-Minded Editor: You are excited by the idea of your creative work driving measurable results. Experience editing direct-response or paid social ads is a major plus.

- CapCut or Premiere Pro Whiz: You are highly proficient in a fast-paced editing workflow using modern tools.

- Excellent Communicator: You have strong English skills and are reliable, detail-oriented, and can work independently.

- Available & Ready: You have a perfect internet connection and are available to dedicate 3-4 hours daily to this role.

- This is a part-time remote role requiring approximately 24 hours per week (around 4 hours per day, Monday to Saturday), with the potential to grow into a full-time position based on performance.



Compensation & Growth: Earn Based on Performance



We believe in rewarding top talent for outstanding results. This role offers a unique compensation structure designed to give you significant earning potential.



- Base Rate: You will start with a competitive base rate of $10 per hour (596 PHP / hour)

- Performance Bonuses: On top of your hourly rate, you will earn substantial monthly bonuses for creating viral videos and "winning" ads that meet or exceed performance targets. Our bonus structure is uncapped.

- Earning Potential: Our top-performing editors consistently earn $3,000 - $5,000+ per month by creating ads that convert.



This is not a gig. It is a long-term partnership. Most of our editors have been with us for over a year, and we are committed to investing in your growth and success.



Why Join Our Team?



- Fully Remote: Work from anywhere in the world.

- Flexible Schedule: Manage your own hours and workflow.

- Direct Impact: See your creative work translate directly into business success and your own earnings.

- Growth & Stability: Join a team that values long-term relationships and provides ongoing training and opportunities.

title: Real Estate Conveyancing Compliance Officer
description:
PropZap — Help Build the Compliance Backbone of a Company Scaling Across North America



PropZap is building a next-generation real estate platform designed to expand across North America.



We’re not building just another brokerage.



We’re building a modern real estate company powered by strong systems, disciplined operations, intelligent workflows, and long-term vision.



Every real estate transaction carries legal, financial, and regulatory responsibility.



Behind every successful closing is a file that is complete, organized, and defensible.



As we scale, maintaining that level of operational integrity becomes even more important.



That’s why we’re looking for someone who takes pride in building order, protecting compliance, and ensuring every transaction file stands up to scrutiny.



This role helps protect the integrity of the entire brokerage.



--------------------------------------------------------------



Role: Conveyancing Compliance Officer

Location: Remote

Role Type: Full-Time / Long-Term

Compensation: 50,000 PHP+ (Negotiable)



We believe exceptional operators deserve exceptional compensation. As PropZap grows, we are willing to pay premium for people who consistently deliver high-quality work, protect compliance standards, and help strengthen the systems that allow the company to scale confidently.



Company: PropZap — Building the next-generation real estate platform for North America



--------------------------------------------------------------



Why This Role Is Important



Every real estate transaction produces a complex set of documents, approvals, and compliance requirements.



If those records are incomplete, inconsistent, or poorly documented, the brokerage is exposed to unnecessary risk.



This role ensures our transaction files are clean, complete, and defensible from acceptance through closing — particularly during the critical firm-to-close conveyancing phase.



You will also support brokerage compliance operations by ensuring documentation standards are followed and potential risks are identified early.



This role sits at the center of:



• Conveyancing readiness

• Compliance oversight

• Documentation integrity

• Operational coordination



If you enjoy bringing clarity and structure to complex documentation, this role will feel meaningful and impactful.



--------------------------------------------------------------



Your Core Responsibilities



Transaction File Compliance Review



You will review buyer and seller transaction files to ensure they are complete, accurate, and audit-ready.



This includes:



• Reviewing transaction files in SkySlope (system of record)

• Ensuring required documents are present

• Confirming documents are legible and properly executed

• Verifying files are named and stored correctly

• Ensuring amendments, waivers, and supporting documents match the executed contract set

• Checking deposits, dates, and contract details for consistency



Your goal is to ensure each file clearly reflects what occurred during the transaction and maintains a clean documentation trail.



--------------------------------------------------------------



Pre-Close Conveyancing Readiness



You will conduct pre-close readiness checks to ensure files are properly prepared before entering the final stages of conveyancing.



This includes:



• Identifying missing or inconsistent documents early

• Creating clear lists of outstanding items and responsible parties

• Re-checking files once corrections are submitted

• Monitoring for late-stage issues such as:

Missing signatures

Name mismatches

Missing waivers

Incomplete deposit documentation

Missing lawyer details

Conflicting dates



Your work helps prevent last-minute issues that could delay closing.



--------------------------------------------------------------



FINTRAC Oversight (AML / Client Identification)



You will enforce PropZap’s FINTRAC standards with a strict compliance approach.



Responsibilities include:



• Verifying identification requirements for all parties

• Confirming ID documents are clear and valid

• Ensuring names on ID match contract names exactly

• Confirming required information such as occupation and employer

• Ensuring FINTRAC references are properly recorded internally



You will also manage complex cases such as:



• Corporate parties

• Foreign buyers or sellers

• Name discrepancies

• Missing or unclear identification

• Time-sensitive transactions



Any suspicious or high-risk information must be escalated promptly.



--------------------------------------------------------------



External Law Office Coordination (When Required)



You may assist with coordination related to the conveyancing phase, including:



• Confirming lawyer contact information is recorded correctly

• Ensuring the correct contract set is available for closing

• Verifying key transaction information is consistent

• Assisting internal teams in resolving missing documentation requested by lawyers



Exact interaction with law offices may vary depending on internal workflow.



--------------------------------------------------------------



MLS & Listing Compliance (When Applicable)



You may also assist with brokerage compliance checks related to listings and marketing documentation.



This may include:



• Confirming listing documentation is properly stored

• Reviewing listing records for completeness

• Supporting brokerage documentation standards tied to listings

• Identifying potential compliance issues related to listing or marketing records



The scope of MLS or advertising compliance responsibilities may evolve as the brokerage grows.



--------------------------------------------------------------



Documentation Standards & File Hygiene



At PropZap, documentation matters.



If something affects:



• money

• deadlines

• conditions

• approvals

• compliance obligations



…it must be clearly documented in the system of record.



You will:



• Provide clear feedback when documentation standards are not met

• Request corrections when necessary

• Follow up to ensure gaps are resolved



Clean files allow teams to understand transaction status and risk quickly.



--------------------------------------------------------------



Escalations & Risk Monitoring



You will identify scenarios that require escalation, including:



• Missing FINTRAC documentation

• Money or trust-related ambiguity

• Potential misrepresentation or conflicting information

• Situations requiring legal interpretation

• Clients threatening complaints or legal action



Escalations should include a clear summary of the issue and supporting documentation.



--------------------------------------------------------------



Compliance Audits & Quality Assurance



You may periodically review files to maintain compliance standards.



This may include:



• Performing internal file audits

• Identifying recurring documentation issues

• Monitoring patterns of missing information

• Flagging operational risks early



These reviews help keep the brokerage compliant and defensible.



--------------------------------------------------------------



Process Improvement



You will also help strengthen operational systems by identifying patterns and inefficiencies.



This includes:



• Tracking recurring compliance gaps

• Suggesting improvements to checklists and templates

• Supporting updates to internal SOPs

• Helping teams maintain consistent documentation standards



Your insights help the company improve how transactions are handled as we scale.



--------------------------------------------------------------



Who This Role Is Great For



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys structure, detail, and keeping complex documentation organized.



Strong candidates often have experience in:



• Real estate conveyancing

• Transaction coordination

• Brokerage compliance

• Legal or documentation-heavy administrative roles



Key strengths include:



• Exceptional attention to detail

• Strong organizational skills

• Clear written communication

• Comfort working with sensitive personal information

• Good judgment when escalating regulated issues



--------------------------------------------------------------



Tools & Systems



You will primarily work with:



• SkySlope (transaction file system)

• Slack (internal communication)

• Notion (Task tracking, SOPs and documentation)



--------------------------------------------------------------



What You Gain



• Long-term role inside a growing real estate platform

• Direct collaboration with operations and brokerage leadership

• Opportunity to strengthen systems that support company growth

• A role where your work protects the integrity of real estate transactions



As the company expands across markets, the importance of strong compliance and documentation systems grows — and the people who build those systems grow with it.



--------------------------------------------------------------



How to Apply

title: Website Copywriter
description:
I own a small digital marketing agency in the United States and am looking for a copywriter.  We work with mainly home service businesses and help them grow through better websites, ads, SEO and direct mail.  We’re looking for a copywriter who can write high-converting homepage and service page content.  You will work alongside an SEO manager and a website developer.  We're a cool agency to work with and have a strong team of A+ players.  Many of our contractors have been with us for a very long time.



We're looking for someone who can create strong, clear, persuasive writing and who can leverage AI to be more efficient but where the final output will pass AI detection tests.  We're looking for near-native English writing skills with impeccable grammar and style.



This role is part time and will be on an as-needed basis.



Please provide the following:



1. Examples of your work, ideally referencing websites where you have created the copy.  If you provide examples of websites please specify which content on the website you wrote.



2. Do you have any experience writing for the home services (landscaping, roofing, remodeling) niche? If so can you provide some examples?  This isn't required but will be helpful.



3. What would you charge for an 800 word service page?  Do you charge by hour or by the word?



4. How are you using AI in your process (please be detailed here) and how are you making it not sound like it was written by AI?



5. What is your typical turnaround time?



6. Are you currently employed? Or are you just doing freelancing work?



Please only respond through OnlineJobs.ph, not through other channels.  Thanks and we look forward to hearing from you.

title: Social Media Strategist
description:
We are a full-service digital marketing and consulting agency focused on helping female-owned businesses grow with intention, strategy, and systems. We don’t believe in surface-level marketing. We build ecosystems that generate leads, nurture relationships, and convert consistently, all while keeping the business in alignment with the business owner and her audience.



We are expanding and looking for a Social Media Strategist who can think beyond posting content and step into a true strategic role within our company and eventually across our client portfolio.

About the Role-

This is not a “post and schedule” position. 

We are looking for someone who understands how social media functions as a lead generation and conversion engine.

You will be responsible for developing and executing a full social media strategy that drives visibility, engagement, and measurable business growth. You will act as an extension of the brand voice, bringing strategy, creativity, and consistency together across all platforms.



Key Responsibilities



Strategy Development

-Analyze current social presence and identify growth opportunities

  -Develop platform-specific strategies for:

  
 + Instagram

  -LinkedIn

  -TikTok

  -YouTube

-Identify content themes, messaging angles, and audience targeting strategies

-Build a clear roadmap for lead generation and conversion through social channels



Content Creation + Execution

-Plan and create content aligned with strategic goals (not random posting)

-Develop:

   *Short-form video (Reels, TikTok, Shorts)

   *Static posts and carousels

   *Long-form content for YouTube

 -Write captions that drive engagement and action

 -Maintain brand voice across all content



Publishing + Management

-Schedule and publish content across all platforms

-Maintain a consistent posting cadence

-Optimize posting times and formats based on performance



Engagement + Community Building

-Respond to comments and messages in a timely, on-brand manner

-Engage with audience to build relationships and trust

-Identify opportunities to convert engagement into leads



Growth + Optimization

-Track performance metrics and adjust strategy accordingly

-Identify trends, platform updates, and opportunities for growth

-Continuously refine content and messaging based on data



What We’re Looking For

This role is for someone who:

-Thinks like a strategist, not just a content creator

-Understands the connection between content, audience psychology, and conversion

-Can see the big picture while executing the details

-Is proactive and brings ideas to the table

-Is comfortable being the voice of a brand

-Understands different tones for different platforms



Required Experience

-Proven experience managing and growing accounts on:

 + Instagram

LinkedIn

TikTok

YouTube

-Experience creating both short-form and long-form video content

-Strong copywriting skills for social media

-Understanding of lead generation strategies through content

-Experience with scheduling tools and analytics platforms



Bonus (Not Required but Valuable)

-Experience working with agencies or multiple brands

-Familiarity with Go High Level or CRM-based marketing systems

-Experience in service-based businesses, consulting, or coaching industries

-Basic understanding of funnels,
 marketing, or customer journeys



What Success Looks Like in This Role

-Increased visibility and engagement across platforms

-Consistent growth in audience and reach

-Clear improvement in lead generation from social channels

-Content that feels aligned, intentional, and on-brand

-A strategy that evolves based on data, not guesswork



Why Join Us

-Opportunity to grow into a key strategic role within the company

-Work across multiple brands and industries

-Be part of a company that values strategy, systems, and intentional growth

-Room to expand into a leadership position as we scale



How to Apply

Please submit:

-Your resume (and use the keyword DETAILED in your subject line)

-Links to accounts you’ve managed

-A brief overview of how you approach social media strategy for lead generation





If you’re someone who understands that social media is more than content, and you’re excited to build something meaningful and scalable... we’d love to hear from you. 



Note: Any submissions without the keyword will be deleted. Why? Because attention to detail is a key component in every aspect of our business. And it starts from the 
nt you d
 to apply with us.

title: Transaction Coordinator (Real Estate)
description:
PropZap — Elite Operators Wanted. Build the Backbone. Lead the Future.



We’re building one of the fastest-growing real estate and technology platforms in Canada.

And now, we’re looking for a Real Estate Operations Lead who wants more than a job.

Not someone who wants a title without execution.

Not someone who manages from the sidelines.

Not someone who avoids pressure.



This role is for a hands-on operator who wants to master the systems, own the backend, and grow into true operational leadership inside a scaling real estate business.



If you are the person teams rely on.

If you see inefficiencies before others do.

If you want to build, lead, and scale operations the right way.

We want you.



---

Role: Transaction Coordinator

Location: Philippines (Remote)

Shift: Night Shift — Work on Canada MST

Role Type: Full-time, long-term

Compensation: Top-tier salary + performance bonuses + growth-based increases

Company: PropZap — Tech-enabled real estate platform revolutionizing home buying and selling in Canada



This is a foundational operations leadership role.



You will start by working deeply hands-on in the systems, processes, and daily execution. Over time, you will help design, grow, and lead the operations function as the company scales.



---

Your Core Responsibilities:

You will own and lead the backend operations that power our agents and client experience.

Full Real Estate Operations Leadership (Hands-On)



You will personally execute and oversee:

- Transaction and listing coordination

• Contract preparation, amendments, compliance, and document management

• MLS drafts, uploads, and accuracy checks

• FINTRAC, signatures, deadlines, and audit-ready files

• CRM hygiene, pipelines, task boards, and workflow tracking

• Calendar management, reminders, and operational follow-ups



You will ensure nothing slips, nothing is messy, and everything is executed with precision.



Listing & Marketing Operations:

- Coordinate photos, drone, measurements, floorplans, and virtual tours

• Manage listing timelines, deliverables, and launch readiness

• Prepare polished listing descriptions and marketing instructions

• Oversee signs, lockboxes, open houses, and showing instructions

• Maintain organized listing folders, media libraries, and assets

• Coordinate with marketing vendors and internal resources



Agent & Client Backend Support:

- Act as the primary operational support behind agents

• Communicate professionally with clients, lawyers, vendors, and partners

• Track conditions, deadlines, and next steps

• Ensure agents can focus on selling while operations run flawlessly



Systems, Process, and Scale:

- Maintain clean, reliable, and scalable operational systems

• Identify inefficiencies and proactively improve workflows

• Document processes and help build SOPs as the business evolves

• Support leadership with operational insights and execution

• Assist in hiring, training, and onboarding future operations tea
mbers



This role evolves. As the company grows, you grow into leading the operations team, not just running tasks.



---

Who You Are:

We are only interested in elite operators with leadership potential.

- You have strong experience in U.S. or Canadian real estate operations

• You are execution-first, not theory-only

• You thrive in structured systems and enjoy building order

• You move fast without sacrificing accuracy

• You anticipate problems and solve them before escalation

• You communicate clearly, professionally, and confidently

• You are calm under pressure and comfortable with volume

• You want long-term growth, responsibility, and leadership

• You want to build something meaningful, not just complete tasks



If you want micromanagement, slow pace, or narrow scope, this role is not for you.



---

Requirements:

- 3–6+ years experience in real estate operations, such as:

– Real Estate VA

– Transaction Coordinator

– Listing Manager

– Operations or Executive Assistant

• Experience with Canadian or U.S. real estate documents and MLS

• Strong English communication skills

• Comfortable with CRMs, Google Workspace, DocuSign, MLS systems

• Excellent attention to detail and operational discipline

• Fast computer, stable internet, and backup power

• Ability to work full night shift on Canada Mountain Time



Bonus If You Have:

- Experience leading or mentoring other operators

• Process improvement or operations management background

• Startup or fast-scaling company experience

• Marketing coordination or Canva familiarity



---

What We Offer:

- Top-tier compensation above PH market

• Performance bonuses tied to impact

• Long-term, stable role with real growth

• Direct collaboration with founders and leadership

• Clear path into Operational leadership

• Early-seat role in a fast-scaling Canadian proptech company

• A position where your work directly shapes how the business scales



This is not just an operations role.

This is a career-defining opportunity to build, lead, and scale real estate operations from the inside.



---

How to Apply



Send the following to: 

- Resume

- Portfolio (if available)

• 2-minute intro video explaining why you are top 1%

• Summary of your real estate operations experience

• Expected monthly salary (PHP)

• Internet speed test link

• Any DISC test result



Subject Line: Transaction Coordinator – Your Name



NOTE: Failure to follow the application instructions exactly will result in disqualification. This includes missing documents, incorrect subject lines, incomplete information, or not submitting all requested materials. Attention to detail is critical in this role, and the application process is the first test of your ability to follow instructions accurately and completely.



If you want to own the backend, lead through execution, and grow into real operational leadership, this role was built for you.

title: YouTube/Instagram/TikTok etc Creative Assistant
description:
We are looking for a high-level YouTube Creative Assistant to help launch and grow a YouTube channel from the ground up.



This is not just a video editing role.



You will manage the full lifecycle of content from idea to final video, including research, scripting, editing, and publishing.



If you understand what makes people click, stay, and engage on YouTube, this role is for you.



What You’ll Be Doing



1. Content Strategy and Ideation

Research what content is currently performing well and identify opportunities to capitalize on

Analyze competitors, trends, and keyword gaps using tools like TubeBuddy, VidIQ, or YouTube

Create 3 to 5 strong video ideas before filming, including titles and thumbnail direction



2. Scriptwriting and Storytelling

Write engaging 10-to-20-minute scripts that feel natural and conversational

Structure videos for high retention using strong hooks in the first 30 seconds

Use open loops and clear calls to action throughout

Include visual direction such as B roll, on screen text, and pattern interrupts



3. Video Editing and Repurposing

Edit high quality YouTube videos with strong pacing and clean transitions

Turn long form content into short form videos for Shorts, TikTok, and Reels

Use music, sound effects, and proper audio balancing to enhance quality



4. Uploading and Optimization

Handle the full upload process including titles, descriptions, tags, and pinned comments

Apply SEO strategies to improve reach and performance

Use tools like ChatGPT or Descript to improve speed and efficiency



What We’re Looking For



Strong scriptwriting skills with natural, human sounding content

Experience with editing software such as Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or Final Cut Pro

Understanding of YouTube retention and viewer engagement

A portfolio that shows strong storytelling and editing ability

Strong English communication skills and ability to work remotely

Someone who stays updated on trends and is always improving



Compensation and Structure



Payments sent weekly or monthly via Wise or another agreed method

Long term, stable position

Growth opportunities as the business expands

Performance based bonuses available



How to Apply



Please send the following:



1 Your resume or CV

Guaranteed 3–5% annual increment

Uncapped incentives per deal closed

Bonuses and milestone rewards

Travel incentives (top performers)

Fully remote

Work Setup

Full-time

7 days/week availability

8–12 hours/day (flexible and remote)



You are not required to work continuously, but higher effort leads to higher earnings.



Who We Want

Organized, proactive, and reliable

Strong communicator

Fast learner (systems, tools, marketing)

Comfortable working independently

Looking for long-term growth (not short-term work)

HOW TO APPLY (VERY IMPORTANT)



We only shortlist candidates who follow instructions exactly.



Step 1



Start your application with this line:

“Growth Mode: ON”



(If this line is missing, your application will be ignored.)



Step 2



Submit 5 short videos (3–5 minutes each):



1. CRM & Systems Thinking

What CRM have you used? Share 1 SOP you created and why it matters.



2. Ads Experience

Have you run
 / TikTok / PPC campaigns?



3. Career Motivation

Why do you want this role? What are your long-term goals?



4. Availability



Do you have children? If yes, how old?

Preferred working hours?

Can you commit to long hours if needed?



5. Impress Us

Teach us something valuable or show us something that makes you stand out.



Bonus (Optional but Recommended)



Include the word “Blue Mango” somewhere naturally in your application.

This helps us identify candidates who pay attention to detail.



What Happens Next

Round 1: Video submission

Shortlisted: Quick interview

Final: Onboarding

Final Note



If you’re just looking for any job, this is not for you.



If you want to grow your income, skills, and career long-term,

we would like to meet you.



Application Instructions



To apply,
: 
 with:



Resume

Portfolio

5 videos

title: Real Estate Social Media Manager (0 ? 100K Growth | AI Content | Lead Generation)
description:
***Only apply if you have real growth experience for social media accounts. We check portfolios.



Hi,



We’re a Singapore-based real estate team looking for a high-level Social Media Manager who knows how to grow accounts from 0 to 100K followers and turn content into real leads and sales.



This is not a basic posting role.

We want someone who understands strategy, virality, AI content, and conversion.



---



## What We’re Looking For



We need someone who:



* Has proven experience growing accounts (0 to 50K / 100K)

* Understands lead generation through content

* Has experience (or is willing to learn) AI-generated home tour videos

* Is familiar with multi-platform growth strategies



---



## Platforms You Must Be Familiar With



You should be comfortable working across:



*

* Instagram

* TikTok

* YouTube (Shorts and long-form)

* Redbook (Xiaohongshu ???)

* Lemon8

* Bonus: any emerging or niche platforms



We are especially interested in candidates who understand how content differs across Western and Chinese platforms.



---



## Your Role



### Content Strategy and Growth



* Plan and execute content to grow accounts to 100K+ followers

* Create viral-style content (Reels, TikTok, Shorts)

* Adapt content for different platforms (Instagram vs Xiaohongshu vs TikTok)



### Real Estate Content



* Create engaging property content and home tours

* Use or experiment with AI tools for video creation

* Turn listings into high-performing content



### Lead Generation



* Drive inbound leads (DMs, WhatsApp, forms)

* Optimize content for conversion, not just views

* Work with the sales team to improve lead quality



### Optimization



* Track performance (views, engagement, leads)

* Improve content strategy weekly

* Suggest new ideas, tools, and growth strategies



---



## Salary and Incentives



* Base: $600 to $1000 SGD/month (based on experience)

* Performance-based bonuses

* Incentives tied to lead generation

* Fully remote

* Opportunity to learn real estate and content marketing

* Growth opportunities within the team



---



## Work Setup



* Full-time or part-time (flexible for the right candidate)

* Results-focused (not just hours)



---



## Requirements



* Proven social media growth experience (required)

* Strong understanding of TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube algorithms

* Experience in short-form video editing (CapCut, Premiere, etc.)

* Familiar with AI tools (or willing to learn quickly)

* Understands content to leads to sales funnel



Experience in real estate or Chinese platforms (Xiaohongshu) is a strong advantage.



---



## How to Apply



We only review serious applicants.



### Step 1



Start your application with:

“100K Growth Mode”



---



### Step 2



Submit:



1. Proof of Growth



* Accounts you’ve grown (with results or screenshots)



2. Strategy



* How would you grow a real estate account from 0 to 100K?



3. AI Experience



* Have you used AI for video or content? How?



4. Lead Generation



* How do you convert content into leads?



5. Portfolio



* Links to videos or accounts you’ve managed



---



## Bonus



Include the word “Penthouse” in your application.

This helps us filter detail-oriented candidates.



---



## Final Note



If your experience is limited to posting content, basic design work, or has no proven growth results, this role is not suitable.



We are looking for someone who can grow fast, think strategically, and drive real business results.



---



## Next Steps



Shortlisted candidates will proceed to interview, followed by a trial and onboarding.



---



If you have successfully scaled accounts and want to build something meaningful, apply now.



---



If you want, I can next:



* Add a **1-task test (e.g. “create a viral property video”)**

* Or refine this for **higher-quality Chinese-speaking candidates (Xiaohongshu-focused hiring)**

title: Video Editor for YouTube Channel
description:
Video Editor for YouTube Compilation Channel (Full-Time Remote)



We run a growing YouTube channel producing compilation-style videos. We're looking for a full-time video editor to handle 3-4 videos per week to start, scaling to 4-5 once you're comfortable with the workflow.



How it works: You'll receive a pre-assembled draft project file in Premiere Pro. The draft already has clips placed on the timeline with transitions, blur backgrounds, voiceover, and audio ducking. Your job is to take it from draft to final — pacing, trimming, audio cleanup, sound effects, and making sure the video feels polished and engaging for viewers.



What you'll be doing:

- Receive draft Premiere Pro project files (clips, transitions, and voiceover already placed)

- Adjust pacing — trim clips that are too long, remove dead 
nts, control the flow

- Fix audio — normalize levels, add SFX on transitions, ensure voiceover sits cleanly over clip audio

- Quality control — remove or replace clips with bad quality that slipped through

- Add finishing touches — fade in/out polish, overall feel

- Export and deliver final video files



Requirements:

- Premiere Pro

- Good eye for pacing — you understand what keeps viewers watching

- Reliable internet and ability to handle large project files (500MB-1GB)

- Available for full-time hours (40hr/week)



Nice to have:

- Understanding of YouTube audience retention

- Familiarity with audio ducking and SFX timing



Compensation: $800-1,000/month USD (full-time)



To apply: Send a link to a YouTube video you've edited (or similar work). Tell me how long it took you to edit and what tools you used. Bonus points if you can explain what makes a compilation video's pacing feel right vs wrong.

title: Head of Operations & AI Automation
description:
*Our company works in the EST(Toronto, Canada)

*Apply from below link not the message function of this platform





*if you don't have any related experience like below, please don't apply.



The VP Operations & AI Automation is responsible for overseeing end-to-end operations, including logistics, co-packer (production) management, and customer service. This role also leads AI and automation initiatives from a strategic and project management perspective—advising the CEO, defining priorities, and managing external developers or partners to execute system integrations and automation.



This is not a hands-on builder role. The focus is on ownership, coordination, and execution through others.



Key Responsibilities

1. Logistics & Supply Chain Management

Oversee warehousing, fulfillment, and transportation (3PL and direct shipments)

Manage relationships with 3PLs, carriers, and distributors

Ensure inventory accuracy, forecasting alignment, and stock availability

Monitor and improve KPIs (OTIF, lead times, order accuracy)

Resolve operational issues (delays, shortages, chargebacks, retailer penalties)

Ensure full traceability (lot-level, shipment-level) and data accessibility

2. Production & Co-Packer Management

Manage co-packers and manufacturing partners

Oversee production planning, scheduling, and capacity alignment

Ensure product quality and compliance (PCP, CFIA, HACCP requirements)

Monitor yields, costs, and production KPIs

Lead onboarding and performance management of new co-packers

3. Customer Service & Order Management

Oversee B2B and B2C customer service operations

Ensure timely handling of inquiries, complaints, and order issues

Build and enforce SOPs for communication and escalation

Monitor service KPIs (response time, resolution time, satisfaction)

Align customer service with logistics and sales execution

4. AI Automation Strategy & Project Management

Advise the CEO on automation opportunities across operations and customer service

Identify high-impact workflows for automation (order processing, reporting, customer communication, inventory updates)

Define requirements, workflows, and success metrics for automation projects

Manage external developers, agencies, or freelancers building automation systems

Coordinate integrations across systems (Shopify, ERP, EDI, CRM, Google Sheets, etc.)

Ensure proper documentation, testing, and deployment of automation workflows

Monitor performance and continuously optimize implemented systems

5. Process Optimization & Systems Integration

Develop and standardize SOPs across operations

Improve cross-functional workflows and eliminate inefficiencies

Ensure systems are properly integrated and data flows are accurate

Build scalable operational frameworks to support growth

6. Compliance & Risk Management

Ensure compliance with food safety and regulatory requirements (PCP, traceability, recall readiness)

Maintain audit-ready documentation and records

Identify and mitigate operational risks across supply chain and production

7. Team & Cross-Functional Leadership

Lead internal tea
mbers and external partners (3PLs, co-packers, developers)

Collaborate with Sales, Marketing, and Finance to align demand and execution

Report on operational performance, risks, and improvement initiatives

8. Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)

OTIF (On-Time, In-Full) delivery rate

Inventory accuracy and turnover

Production efficiency and cost per unit

Customer service response and resolution time

Reduction in operational errors and chargebacks

Successful delivery of automation projects (on time, within scope)

% reduction in manual processes through automation

9. Qualifications

5–10+ years in operations, supply chain, or production (CPG/food preferred)

Proven experience managing 3PLs and co-packers

Experience leading system or automation projects (not necessarily building them)

Strong understanding of operational systems (Shopify, ERP, EDI, CRM, etc.)

Familiarity with automation tools (Make, n8n, APIs) is an asset

Knowledge of food safety and regulatory frameworks (CFIA, PCP, HACCP)

Strong project management, communication, and leadership skills

10. Ideal Profile

Strong operator who can manage complex, multi-partner environments

Systems thinker who can translate business needs into technical requirements

Comfortable managing developers and external vendors

Highly organized with strong follow-through

Data-driven and detail-oriented

Able to operate in fast-paced, ambiguous environments

First 6–12 Month Success Metrics

Stabilize and improve 3PL and co-packer performance

Establish clear visibility across inventory, orders, and production

Deliver 2–4 high-impact automation projects through external developers

Reduce operational errors and delays by measurable targets

Improve customer service speed and consistency

title: E-commerce Graphic Designer (Amazon / Shopify Product Listings)
description:
Important: This is a part-time position to start with. However, if your work delivers strong results and improves our product listings, there is a serious opportunity to grow into a full-time role within our company.



We are looking for a talented and detail-oriented Graphic Designer to join our growing e-commerce team.



Your main responsibility will be creating high-converting product listing images for platforms like Amazon, 
, and Shopify.



Each product requires a full set of 5 professional images, including lifestyle visuals and infographics that clearly communicate the product’s benefits and features.



A strong focus of this role is the main product image, as it plays a critical role in improving click-through rate (CTR). Based on insights from marketing agencies and data-driven testing, we expect you to design main images that clearly demonstrate what the product does and immediately grab attention within crowded marketplaces.



You will play a key role in increasing both CTR and conversion rate by designing clean, modern, and persuasive visuals similar to top-performing Amazon listings.





Responsibilities:

Design 5 product images per product (main image, infographics, lifestyle images, feature highlights)

Create visually appealing and conversion-focused designs

Use stock/lifestyle images to showcase products in real-life situations

Add clear and engaging text overlays (benefits, features, USPs)

Translate and adapt text when needed using tools like ChatGPT, DeepL, or Google Translate

Follow brand guidelines and maintain consistent visual identity

Optimize images for different platforms (Amazon, 
, Shopify)

Requirements

Proven experience in e-commerce graphic design (Amazon listings preferred)

Strong skills in Photoshop, Canva, or similar tools

Good understanding of what makes product images convert

Ability to work independently and meet deadlines

Basic English communication skills

Experience with lifestyle compositions and photo editing is a big plus

Nice to Have

Experience with Amazon A+ content

Experience with European marketplaces (
 is a plus)

Understanding of branding and marketing psychology

What We Offer

Long-term position with steady work

Flexible working hours

Opportunity to grow with a fast-scaling e-commerce brand

Clear instructions and structured workflow





To Apply



Please include:



Your portfolio (especially Amazon-style product listings)

Your favorite project and why

Your rate (per hour or per image set)

The word "DESIGNPRO" in your application so we know you read everything



Additional Note



We encourage the smart and effective use of AI tools (such as ChatGPT, Midjourney, Canva AI, Photoshop AI, or similar) to improve both the quality and efficiency of your work.



If you are able to leverage tools and workflows that help you produce better results in less time, we highly value that mindset. We are always open to optimizing processes and working with people who think proactively about improving output.

title: Telemarketing for Medical Practice
description:
About This Job:

OptiMindHealth is a mental health and wellness counseling company. We are a group of doctors, psychologists, and clinical social workers committed to improving the psychological health and wellbeing of our patients. We are supported by a hard-working and devoted staff who help us in all aspects of practice operations. We are looking for an energetic, articulate, and highly driven telemarketer who can represent our company to current and potential clients and referral partners. This role blends high volume outbound calling, virtual community outreach, and service promotion, all done from a remote environment.



This position is an excellent opportunity for candidates with experience in BPO, outbound calling, sales, appointment setting, practice liaison/healthcare B2B engagement, or executive recruitment who are looking to advance their career in a meaningful and mission driven environment. We are seeking individuals with excellent English communication skills with a clear, professional, and confident speaking voice, who can represent our practice with warmth and credibility. A Bachelor’s degree in Communications or a related field is preferred and will help you excel in this role.



Healthcare experience is a plus, but not required. We invest in our team by providing comprehensive training, ongoing support, and the tools needed to succeed. If you are proactive, motivated, and passionate about educating and connecting with people, this role offers a rewarding opportunity to grow professionally while making a positive impact on our patients and community referral partners.



Key Responsibilities:

- Promote the company’s services to prospective and established clients.

- Develop relationships to promote our services to referral sources.

- Engage and qualify prospects through insightful, sales-focused conversations.

- Maintain strong relationships with organizations, schools, healthcare providers, and other established referral sources.

- Monitor and evaluate the effectiveness of sales activities and make recommendations for improvement.

- Act as a liaison between the practice and the community by being a practice service line knowledge bearer.

- Maintain practice CRM, tracking contacts and incoming referral activity.

- Collaborate with our Management Team to ensure consistent messaging and branding in outbound sales efforts.



Salary and Work Setup:

The position is a permanent work from home arrangement, with additional details below.



1. Base Salary: 45,000 PHP Monthly

2. Commission-Based: No

3. Payment Method: Twice Per Month

4. Work Schedule: US Business Hours; Full-Time; 40 hours per week (No part-time)



Benefits Package:

Working at OptiMindHealth provides a stable work environment for staff members who excel and grow in their careers. Our benefits package includes:



1. Government-mandated benefits (SSS, Pag-Ibig, PHIC)

2. 13th Month Pay

3. HMO Coverage

4. Ten days of vacation per year

5. Five days of sick leave allowed per year

6. Philippine holidays observed



Include the following 2 items in your application to be considered for interview: An up-to-date CV, and a link to your sample voice recording. Your recording should be in your natural speaking voice and be at least 30 seconds in length. We require our staff to have an upbeat, positive, clear communication style and to have the ability to work closely and respectfully with a culturally diverse team.

title: Medical Billing, Claims Processing and Collection Specialist
description:
About This Job: 

OptiMindHealth is a mental health and wellness counseling company. We are a group of doctors, psychologists, and clinical social workers committed to improving the psychological health and wellbeing of our patients. We are supported by a hard-working and devoted staff who help us in all aspects of practice operations.   



We’re looking for a detail oriented and solutions focused Medical Billing, Claims Processing, and Collections Specialist to join our growing remote support team. You will play a pivotal role in keeping the practice financial operations running smoothly, ensuring accurate billing, timely claims resolution, and compassionate support that enhances the experience of every patient and provider we serve.  



 Roles & Responsibilities   



1. Medical Billing & Claims Processing:   



- Accurately code and submit claims for all practice clinicians, ensuring proper use of CPT, ICD10, and other required coding standards.  

- Audit provider documentation for each patient encounter to verify that the clinical documentation fully supports the CPT code(s) billed, ensuring compliance with payer requirements and minimizing risk of denials or recoupments.  

- Conduct timely insurance eligibility and benefits verification to help patients understand financial responsibility before or after services.  

- Review, track, and follow up on claim denials, rejections, and delayed claims; submit appeals as needed to ensure timely reimbursement  

- Monitor unresponsive or pending claims, proactively resolving issues to minimize aging accounts and improve revenue cycle efficiency.  

- Manage insurance credentialing and enrollment for new providers, ensuring all required documents and payer applications are completed, submitted, and tracked.  

- Support continuous improvement of billing processes, identifying patterns, inefficiencies, or training needs.  



2. Accounting & Collections:   



- Provide compassionate, high quality customer support via
, chat, and phone—helping patients navigate billing questions with clarity and empathy.  

- Support patients in resolving outstanding balances, offering guidance on payment plans, statements, or insurance explanations of benefits (EOBs)

- Generate and issue billing statements and invoices, ensuring accuracy and clarity for patients and internal stakeholders.  

- Document all communication thoroughly and accurately, maintaining clear records that support smooth follow up and audit readiness.  

- Collaborate closely with our established remote support team, participating in shared workflows, tea
etings, and process improvements.  

- Assist with routine accounting tasks related to patient billing and collections, helping ensure financial operations run smoothly and transparently.  



Qualifications:  



- Demonstrated experience in medical billing and claims management is required, with strong preference for candidates familiar with mental health billing, payer rules, and common denial workflows.

- Experience in healthcare customer service or patient financial support is highly valued, especially in roles requiring empathy, professionalism, and clarity.  

- Background in accounting, collections, or bookkeeping is a strong plus, particularly experience with patient balance resolution and payment workflows.  

- Exceptional English communication skills, with the ability to convey information clearly, positively, and professionally across
, chat, and phone interactions.  

- Strong interpersonal skills and the ability to work respectfully and effectively with a culturally diverse team of clinicians, staff, and patients.  

- High level of attention to detail, with a commitment to accuracy, compliance, and completeness in all billing and documentation tasks.  

- Proactive problem solving mindset, able to navigate complex billing or insurance issues with persistence and initiative.  



Salary and Work Setup: 

The position is a permanent work from home arrangement, with additional details below. 

 

1. Base Salary: 45,000 PHP Monthly 

2. Commission-Based: No 

3. Payment Method: Twice Per Month 

4. Work Schedule: US Business Hours; Full-Time; 40 hours per week (No part-time) 

 

Benefits Package: 

Working at OptiMindHealth provides a stable work environment for staff members who excel and grow in their careers. Our benefits package includes: 

 

1. Government-mandated benefits (SSS, Pag-Ibig, PHIC) 

2. 13th Month Pay 

3. HMO Coverage 

4. Ten days of vacation per year 

5. Five days of sick leave allowed per year 

6. Philippine holidays observed 

 

Requirements:



To be considered for an interview, include the following in your application:  

- Up-to-date CV   

- Sample voice recording (at least 30 seconds in your natural speaking voice).

title: GTM Engineer/CRM Builder (Remote/Full Time
description:
Job Title: GTM Engineer / CRM Builder (Remote – Full Time)



Overview  

We’re looking for a highly skilled and systems-driven GTM Engineer / CRM Builder to join our team. This role is perfect for someone who loves building scalable outbound and CRM systems from scratch, optimizing workflows, and continuously improving performance through automation.



You’ll be responsible for designing, building, and managing our go-to-market infrastructure — including CRM setup, outbound automation, and data flows. We value people who think in systems, not just tasks.



---



Key Responsibilities  

- Build and manage CRM systems (primarily Attio, but open to alternatives)  

- Design and implement outbound systems across
 and LinkedIn  

- Set up and optimize tools like Bitscale, Aimfox, Smartlead, and similar platforms  

- Automate workflows for lead sourcing, enrichment, outreach, and follow-ups  

- Maintain and improve data quality, segmentation, and reporting  

- Continuously test and optimize outbound campaigns for performance  

- Troubleshoot system issues and improve efficiency across the stack  

- Document systems and processes for scalability  



---



Requirements  

- Proven experience building and managing CRM systems (Attio experience strongly preferred)  

- Strong understanding of outbound systems (cold
 + LinkedIn automation)  

- Hands-on experience with tools like Smartlead, Bitscale, Aimfox, or similar  

- Ability to design end-to-end GTM systems (lead sourcing ? outreach ? tracking)  

- Experience with automation tools (Zapier, Make, APIs, or similar)  

- Strong problem-solving skills and systems thinking mindset  

- Detail-oriented with a focus on clean, scalable builds  



---



Nice to Have  

- Experience with data enrichment tools (e.g., Apollo, Clearbit, Clay)  

- Familiarity with deliverability best practices  

- Basic understanding of sales funnels and GTM strategy  

- Experience working in startups or fast-paced environments  



---



What We’re Looking For  

- Someone who doesn’t just use tools — but builds systems  

- A self-starter who can take ownership and improve what already exists  

- Someone who is proactive, organized, and obsessed with efficiency  

- Open to experimenting with new tools and approaches  



---



Why Join Us  

- Fully remote role  

- Future bonus scheme 

- Opportunity to build and own a complete GTM system  

- Work with a fast-moving, growth-focused team  

- Flexibility and autonomy in how you build  



---



If you’re passionate about systems, automation, and building high-performance outbound engines, we’d love to hear from you.

title: Full time data entry workers - 8 POSITIONS
description:
I'm looking for many data entry workers to work full time. There are shift times around the clock for 24/7 coverage. This means

You get one 50 minute paid break per shift.





All timings in Philippines time:

Schedule Pattern A

Day Shift (8:15 am - 4:15 pm): Monday, Wednesday, Thursday, Friday, Saturday



Schedule Pattern B

Overnight Shift (12:15 am - 8:15 am): Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday, Sunday



Schedule Pattern C

Evening (4:15 pm - 12:15 am): Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, Sunday

Overnight (12:15 am - 8:15 am): Friday, Saturday



Schedule Pattern D

Day Shift (8:15 am - 4:15 pm): Tuesday, Sunday

Evening (4:15 pm - 12:15 am): Thursday, Friday, Saturday



Let me know in the application which you are not available for, if any.



You should be able to work with very high accuracy.



This is full time work with fixed shifts.



You will be fully trained on the task, which is simple and repetitive.



To apply, send me an
 to jtjXXX at proton dot me where XXX is the three-digit number 991. Don't apply here, it won't be read. Count the number of sheep running around the corner at the end of the YouTube video with ID: I1s8iKMgsWk and start you application's subject line with this number.



Please write your education qualifications, current other commitments (other jobs, university...) and prior experience.





Additionally send a speed test screenshot from speed dot cloudflare dot com taken on a computer
