> It should take no longer than 5 to 7 hours a day.



> Perfect job for people interested in sharpening their copywriting/marketing skills as well as people who want to stack up an extra $400+ every month



NOTE: The fact that this is an "easy job" doesn't mean lazy people should apply. There will be NO room for laziness. I'm ONLY looking for committed, hard working, and serious people. You'll have a very big room for growth to take on more responsibilities and make much more money as you growth with me.

title: Own Your Results—Own Your Future
description:
(Cold Call Predator & Elite Closer | Real Base + Uncapped Pay | Full Autonomy & High Accountability)



Own Your Results—Own Your Future



Most companies talk about opportunity; we pay for it—every single month. Our best earners don’t chase quotas—they lap them. If you want a long-term sales seat (not a “gig”), extreme autonomy, and direct advancement based solely on metrics, read on. If not, keep scrolling.



Your Mission



100+ outbound calls per day to distressed property owners (tax defaults, inheritance, liens, etc.—you find the pain, you build rapport, you close)



Zero handoffs: You control the deal from initial outreach through close. No pass-offs, no excuses, no “support” teams to blame



Live in your numbers: You log every lead, every call, every stage—real-time, every day. Pipeline management is not optional.



Transparent scoreboard: Your results are public. You know exactly where you stand. Your pay and growth = your production. Period.



What We Provide



Real base (not a “draw”): You start with a guaranteed income while you stack your pipeline



No cap on commission: The only limit is your output. Top reps consistently double/triple their base—because they outperform



Everything but excuses: We deliver the tech, the data, and the process. You deliver the work ethic and skill



Clear promotion path: Prove yourself on the board, and you’re first in line for leadership roles, new territories, or team buildouts



Long-term security: We retain only top producers—those who meet or exceed daily/weekly metrics, quarter after quarter



Top Performers Are:



Obsessed with their own KPIs—love tracking, reporting, and improving



Comfortable with radical feedback, public rankings, and aggressive targets



Full-cycle closers who want a direct link between their actions and their earnings



Looking for a career seat—not a temp job, not “account management,” and never “just a lead generator”



Do NOT Apply If:



You dislike public, daily performance tracking



You need long ramp periods, constant encouragement, or handholding



You prefer “team closes,” handoffs, or a relaxed, untracked sales process



You don’t want to own the full sales cycle—start to finish



How to Apply – Two Steps Required (No Exceptions):



Resume: Must clearly show outbound calling and end-to-end closing experience. Include your personal best for daily calls & monthly closed deals.



2-Minute Unscripted Voice Memo:



State your name, country, and your record for calls in a single day



Break down your most challenging cold-to-close deal (real steps, negotiation tactics, outcome)



Share your daily tracking system for calls, leads, and pipeline



Explain why you want a career where your commission is tied directly to your scoreboard—not a relationship manager, not “just a job”



Applications missing either step, or not following these instructions, are auto-rejected.



Bottom Line:



This is a real seat for a real producer. Metrics, pay, and advancement are tied to your scoreboard—not your tenure, effort, or personality. Want in? Show us. If you want comfort, look elsewhere.

title: 2D Training Video Creator (Explainer Videos for Internal Training – Long-Term Role)
description:
About the Role



We are looking for a reliable and detail-oriented video creator to produce simple 2D explainer videos with voiceovers for internal team training. They need to be e-learning/instructional style videos from 30 seconds to 5 minutes. 



These are not marketing or YouTube videos — they are used to train our team on processes and systems. We are building our internal training academy so there are a lot of videos to be created in batches.



We need fast turn around times and someone with very good English. This is a long-term part time opportunity with consistent work.



We will provide:

- full scripts

- clear structure

- step-by-step guidance



Your role is to:

???? follow instructions carefully

???? turn the content into clean, professional videos



What You’ll Be Creating:

- Training videos

- 2D animation instructional style videos (icons, shapes, text)

- Process-based explainer content

- Clear, easy-to-follow visuals



Example topics:

- operational workflows

- property management processes

- internal systems

- Style We Want

- Clean and minimal (not flashy)

- Professional (not cartoon or entertainment style)

- Easy to understand in one watch

- Focus on clarity, not creativity



Your Responsibilities

- Turn scripts into structured explainer videos

- Follow provided instructions and storyboard direction

- Keep visuals clean and consistent

- Add subtitles/captions

- Deliver videos on time



Requirements

- Experience creating 2D explainer or training videos for corporate/staff training modules - not 'viral, social media content'

- Ability to create/work with AI generated voiceovers

- Strong attention to detail

- Ability to follow instructions exactly

- Good communication

- Reliable and consistent



Important

We are not looking for:

- YouTube-style editors

- viral or flashy animations

- overly creative storytelling



We are looking for someone who can:

???? understand structured content and present it clearly



Working Setup

- Ongoing work (multiple videos)

- Clear instructions provided for each video

- Opportunity to grow with the company



HOURS: To be discussed. We are looking for at least 30 videos to be created in 2 weeks. 

WAGE: Can be hourly or agreed price for each project set of videos



To Apply

Use form -

title: Senior Accountant
description:
Apply Here 



Senior Accountant



Philippines-Based — 100% Work From Home $1,800–$2,800 USD/month based on experience



Agate CPA is hiring a Senior Accountant to work directly with U.S.-based business clients to bring clarity, organization, and insight to their financial operations.



This role is ideal for an experienced accountant who enjoys working with clients, solving real financial problems, and turning messy accounting into clear, reliable financial information. You will manage the accounting work for a portfolio of clients, participate in regular client conversations, and help ensure their financial systems are accurate, organized, and understandable.



This is not a traditional bookkeeping role. It requires strong accounting knowledge, sound judgment, and the ability to communicate clearly with clients about their financial information.



This is a full-time individual contributor role. It does not supervise other tea
mbers.



Compensation & Benefits



Compensation: $1,800–$2,800 USD per month based on experience, 13th month pay, Firm-provided computer, 24 days Paid Time Off annually, accrued at 2 days per month starting the month after your hire date. PTO covers vacation, holidays, and sick leave. Christmas office closure (does not count against PTO).



This is an independent contractor engagement.



Required Experience



Candidates for this role should have the following experience:



8+ years of experience working for a U.S.-based public accounting or U.S.-based outsourced accounting firm, serving multiple business clients simultaneously across a variety of industries. Strong hands-on experience performing full month-end closes. Advanced proficiency in QuickBooks Online. Experience explaining financial results to business owners or leadership teams. Comfort working directly with clients in a client-facing accounting or advisory role Experience managing accounting for multiple clients simultaneously



Work Location



This position is 100% work from home.



Work from home specifically means work from your home only. It does not mean work from a library, cafe, restaurant, your friend's house, your parent's house, a co-working space, or any other location that is not your home. Working in unauthorized locations puts client data at risk. If you cannot work 100% from home, please refrain from applying to this role.



Requirements include:



Reliable high-speed internet connection. A backup internet connection. A professional, secure home office environment. Ability to maintain confidentiality of client financial information



Core Working Hours



Monday – Friday 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM U.S. Eastern Time (8:00 PM – 5:00 AM Philippines Time)



This role requires working U.S. daytime hours, which are graveyard hours in the Philippines. Occasional additional hours may be required during busy periods such as month-end close or new client onboarding.



Responsibilities



Accounting Work: Transaction coding and classification. Bank and balance sheet reconciliations. Bill pay and payroll for certain clients. Maintaining organized accounting systems. Resolving routine accounting platform issues. Reviewing financial data for accuracy and completeness. Assisting with onboarding new accounting clients, including cleaning up their accounting and QBO file.



Client Communication: Responding to client questions via
 and client portal. Participating in video meetings with clients (typically monthly). Explaining financial statements clearly and professionally. Maintaining strong client relationships.



Tools and Internal Systems: Expert-level proficiency in QuickBooks Online. Experience with financial platforms such as Gusto, 
, RightTool, Uncat, etc. Strong experience performing month-end closes. Comfort working in cloud-based accounting environments. Willingness to test and adopt new software tools and applications. Updating workflow tasks daily and participating in daily standups (written updates and meetings).



Regular Tasks



Daily: Code accounting transactions. Respond to client questions. Resolve routine accounting software issues. Update workflow tasks. Provide written start-of-day and end-of-day updates.



Weekly: Complete reconciliations. Review accounting records for accuracy. Communicate with clients about financial activity.



Monthly: Complete month-end accounting work. Review financial statements. Prepare for and participate in client meetings.



Periodically: Assist with new client onboarding. Implement client-specific financial analysis tools. Identify opportunities to improve accounting processes.



Signals of Success in This Role



The person who does well in this role:



Takes ownership of client outcomes, not just assigned tasks Persists in finding clear answers to client questions. Works effectively through messy or incomplete financial situations. Communicates frequently and proactively with both clients and tea
mbers. Helps bring structure and clarity to complex financial information Is comfortable participating in challenging or complicated client conversations. Enjoys testing new technology, tools, and workflows that may help clients get better answers.



First 90 Days: What Success Looks Like



First 30 Days: You will become familiar with Agate's systems, tools, and workflows and develop an understanding of your assigned clients. You will be able to locate information, research prior-period activity, and respond to routine questions.



First 60 Days: You will independently manage day-to-day accounting work for your assigned clients, including coding transactions, reconciliations, month-end closes, bill pay, and payroll.



First 90 Days: You will be fully client-facing for your assigned clients. You will lead client meetings, explain financial statements clearly, and respond confidently to accounting-related client questions.



Hiring Process



Our hiring process is designed to ensure strong mutual fit.



1. Resume and questionnaire submission

2. Internal review of resume and questionnaire

3. Accounting simulation

4 Interview(s)

5. Background check

6. Offer

If this sounds like you, we look forward to hearing from you.



Apply Here

-style videos, and social media growth.

- Working with 
 pages or clipping-style content

 page

title: Full time AI video creator
description:
Hiring: AI Content Creation VA (Short-Form Video)



We are a social media content company that creates short-form video content for health and wellness brands on Instagram. We use AI tools to generate images, voiceovers, talking head videos, and motion clips, then edit everything together into finished Instagram Reels.



This is a long-term position, not a one-time project.



What you will be doing:



- Using AI tools to generate realistic images of characters (Nano Banana Pro)

- Generating natural sounding voiceovers (ElevenLabs)

- Creating talking head videos (HeyGen)

- Generating motion video clips (Google Veo 3)

- Editing everything together into polished short-form videos (CapCut or your preferred editing software)

- Using Claude AI to write prompts and improve your work quality



You do not need prior experience with these specific tools. We have a full 9-stage onboarding program that trains you on everything step by step. But you do need to be someone who learns fast and pays attention to detail.



What we are looking for:



- Reliable and consistent. You show up every day and communicate if something comes up. This is the number one thing we care about.

- Detail-oriented. The difference between a good video and a bad one comes down to small details.

- Coachable. You take feedback seriously and apply it to your next video.

- Has their own laptop or desktop computer with a stable internet connection.

- Has their own video editing software (CapCut works great).

- Can follow instructions carefully without needing to be told the same thing twice.



Schedule:



Monday through Saturday. Daily check-in at 9:00 AM PHT. All work for the day must be completed and submitted by 9:00 PM PHT.



Pay:



$500 per month.



Onboarding:



Before you start producing content, you will go through our 9-stage onboarding program. Onboarding is unpaid but mandatory and must be completed within 7 days. This deadline is non-negotiable. It is designed to fully prepare you so you can do the job at a high level from day one. If onboarding is not completed within 7 days we will not be moving forward.



To apply:



Do not just send me a message saying you are interested. To be considered for this position you must complete the following test assignment and include it in your application:







Applications without the completed assignment will not be reviewed. This is how we filter for people who actually pay attention and follow instructions.



If you have any questions about the role, include them in your message along with your completed assignment.



Looking forward to hearing from you.

title: TikTok KOL Supervisor
description:
Job Overview:

We are seeking a dynamic and highly motivated KOL Manager to oversee and grow our TikTok influencer marketing efforts in Philippines. The ideal candidate will be responsible for identifying, engaging, and managing relationships with TikTok influencers to drive brand awareness, engagement, and ultimately sales in the local market.

Key Responsibilities:

1. KOL Strategy Development:

  - Develop and implement a comprehensive TikTok KOL influencer strategy aligned with brand objectives, market trends, and consumer insights in Vietnam.

  - Create campaigns that drive engagement, brand awareness, and conversion, with clear KPIs and measurable outcomes.

2. KOL Research and Identification:

  - Identify and establish relationships with top-tier and micro-influencers in Vietnam who align with the brand’s values, target audience, and goals.

  - Stay up-to-date with TikTok trends and emerging influencers to ensure the brand is always at the forefront of the platform.

3. Campaign Execution & Management:

  - Oversee end-to-end influencer campaign execution, from briefing and content creation to final delivery and performance analysis.

  - Ensure influencers’ content aligns with brand guidelines, voice, and overall marketing strategy.

4. Collaboration and Negotiation:

  - Negotiate contracts, terms, and compensation with influencers and influencer agencies to ensure mutually beneficial partnerships.

  - Collaborate with internal teams (creative, PR, and marketing) to ensure influencer content is integrated seamlessly into the overall marketing strategy.

5. Performance Tracking and Reporting:

  - Monitor the performance of KOL campaigns on TikTok, track key metrics (engagement, reach, conversions), and optimize strategies accordingly.

  - Provide regular reports and insights to management on campaign effectiveness, ROI, and influencer impact.

6. Community Building:

  - Build and nurture long-term relationships with influencers to foster loyalty and repeat collaborations.

  - Engage in community management by interacting with influencers’ audiences and ensuring positive brand sentiment.

7. Market and Competitor Insights:

  - Monitor competitors' influencer strategies on TikTok and analyze trends in influencer marketing within Philippine’s digital landscape.

  - Use data and insights to continuously improve and adapt the influencer strategy.

Qualifications:

- Proven experience in influencer marketing or KOL management, ideally in the TikTok ecosystem, preferably within Philippines.

- Strong understanding of TikTok trends, features, and best practices.

- Excellent negotiation and communication skills.

- Creative mindset with an ability to think outside the box to create viral content.

- Fluent in English (both written and spoken).

- Highly organized, detail-oriented, and able to manage multiple projects simultaneously.

Preferred:

- Experience working with a brand in the lifestyle, fashion, or e-commerce industry.

- Existing network of TikTok influencers in Philippines.

title: TikTok Content Operation Supervisor
description:
Job Responsibilities

- Develop and execute TikTok content growth strategies for our luggage brand, driving exposure, quality, and GMV conversion.

- Plan and manage account content aligned with platform trends, user needs, and promotional campaigns.

- Analyze video performance, track goals, and capture industry and platform hot topics.

- Produce localized, original content for the Indonesian TikTok account (shooting and editing).

- Collaborate with the live operations team to create highlight content, ensuring high-quality materials that maximize conversion.



Job Requirements

- College degree or above (education flexible with strong experience); fluent spoken English for daily communication.

- Skilled in short video shooting (camera/phone) and editing software (PR/CapCut); basic team management experience.

- 1+ year of TikTok/IG short video content creation and operations; strong creativity and content planning skills.

- Solid understanding of TikTok’s content and traffic mechanisms; strong data analysis skills to optimize strategies.

title: Sales & Lead Generation Virtual Assistant (CRM + Marketing Support)
description:
ABOUT US



A Couple & A Dream is a Florida-based home services, renovation, and design company.



We specialize in:



Handyman services



Painting (interior & exterior)



Small renovations



Junk removal



Interior design



We are building a one-stop solution for homeowners and growing fast.



ROLE OVERVIEW



We are hiring a Sales & Lead Generation Virtual Assistant to help us manage leads, follow-ups, and marketing execution.



This is a SALES-FIRST role.



Your main goal is:



Generate leads



Follow up consistently



Convert leads into booked jobs



This is not a passive admin position.

This is a results-driven role with direct impact on revenue.



WHAT YOU WILL DO



Lead Generation & Outreach (Core Responsibility)



Run SMS and
 outreach campaigns (GoHighLevel)



Upload and manage lead lists (DealMachine, Yelp, Google, etc.)



Follow up with leads daily



Keep pipeline active and moving



Sales Calls & Follow-Ups (Very Important)



Make outbound calls to qualify leads



Follow up after estimates are sent



Re-activate old leads



Handle basic objections and move deals forward



Your goal: turn leads into appointments and jobs



CRM Management (GoHighLevel)



Update lead status, tags, and notes



Keep pipelines clean and organized



Ensure no lead is left without follow-up



Every lead must be tracked and followed until closed



Customer Support



Respond to inbound SMS, calls, and
s



Answer basic questions



Book appointments



Maintain fast and professional communication



Marketing Support (Execution Level)



Support Meta Ads and Google Ads campaigns



Upload creatives and update copy



Monitor basic performance (leads, CPL, responses)



Ensure all leads are captured in the CRM



Social Media & Content Support (Basic)



Schedule posts



Edit short videos (Reels, Shorts)



Write captions using provided guidelines



Reply to comments and messages



TOOLS YOU WILL USE



GoHighLevel (CRM, SMS,
)



Google Sheets and Docs



Phone or dialing tools



Canva or CapCut



Meta Ads Manager



Google Ads



, Instagram, Google Business Profile



REQUIREMENTS



Experience as a Sales VA, Cold Caller, or Lead Generation VA



Comfortable making outbound calls daily



Experience with CRM systems (GoHighLevel preferred)



Basic experience with Meta Ads or Google Ads



Basic content editing skills (Canva or CapCut)



Strong English communication skills



Organized, proactive, and results-driven



KPIs (WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE)



Fast response time to leads



100 percent follow-up completion



High number of leads contacted daily



Consistent appointment booking



Leads moving through pipeline



Improvement in closing rate over time



COMPENSATION AND GROWTH



$3.00 to $4.00 USD per hour



Performance bonuses based on:



Appointments booked



Deals closed



Leads recovered



Growth path:



Sales Closer



Sales and Marketing Coordinator



Operations or Growth Manager



WORK SCHEDULE



Remote



Full-time (40 hours per week)



Must overlap with US Eastern Time



Long-term position



IMPORTANT



This role is ideal for someone who:



Wants to grow in sales and marketing



Is comfortable with calls and follow-ups



Is proactive and takes ownership



This role is not for someone who:



Avoids sales conversations



Waits for instructions instead of taking action



Is only looking for basic admin work



HOW TO APPLY (REQUIRED)



Start your application with:



SALES ACAD



Then answer:



What sales or cold calling experience do you have?



What CRM systems have you used?



Have you worked with ads or lead generation campaigns before?

title: Cold Calling Executive – Short-Term Rentals (London)
description:
Location: Remote



Job Type: Part-Time



About Us:



We are a rapidly growing short-term rental company operating across London, providing high-quality, fully managed accommodation to business travelers, tourists, and relocators. As part of our expansion, we're looking for a motivated and persuasive Cold Calling Executive to help us grow our property portfolio by contacting landlords and letting agents directly.



Job Summary:



As a Cold Calling Executive, your primary responsibility will be to initiate contact with property owners and letting agents across London. Your goal is to introduce our services, build rapport, and schedule viewings.



Key Responsibilities:



Make outbound calls to landlords and letting agents from provided lists or through your own research.

Pitch the company’s short-term rental management services in a compelling and professional manner.

Handle objections and questions confidently and knowledgeably.

Identify qualified leads and schedule viewings

Maintain accurate records of calls, leads, and conversations using our spreadsheet.

Continuously improve pitch based on feedback



Requirements:



Previous experience in cold calling - can speak confidently on the phone

Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.

Strong negotiation and persuasion skills.

Confident, self-motivated, and resilient personality.

Good knowledge of the London property market is a plus.

Ability to work independently and hit performance targets.



What We Offer:



Base pay

Flexible working hours.

Training and scripts provided.

Opportunity to grow with a fast-moving and ambitious company.



How to Apply:



Please submit your CV along with a short cover letter outlining your experience with cold calling and why you're a good fit for this role

title: SMS Campaign Specialist (Real Estate )
description:
Please review this job post completely before applying.



Job Title: SMS Campaign Specialist

Location: Remote (Must work EST hours)

Job Type: Full-Time, Long-Term

Hours: 40 hours/week

Start Date: Immediate (within the next 7 days)



About Us:



We’re a growing real estate investment company focused on off-market deals. Our acquisition team works directly with motivated sellers, and SMS outreach is a core channel for generating leads.



This is not a general VA role. We’re hiring ONLY experienced SMS specialists. If SMS was just 20% of your last job, this position is not for you.



Who We’re Looking For:



– You’ve managed daily SMS outreach as your main job — not just as a side task

– You’ve worked with tools like Launch Control, GoHighLevel, Smarter Contact, etc.

– You understand deliverability, compliance, opt-out logic, and spam filters

– You know how to tag leads, track replies, and move qualified prospects into CRM

– You’re not using a phone — you’ve used professional platforms and tools

– You can handle 1,500+ outbound texts/day and rotate templates properly

– You’re available full-time (45 hrs/week), working EST hours



Key Responsibilities:



– Run high-volume SMS campaigns daily using proper systems

– Monitor responses and qualify leads based on script and criteria

– Manage templates and rotate messages to avoid filtering

– Tag leads accurately and track campaign metrics

– Coordinate with acquisition and data teams to align campaigns



Required Experience:



– Minimum 1 year managing SMS outreach full-time

– Real estate investment or wholesaling background is a major plus

– Strong written English — clear, professional, and natural tone

– Familiarity with CRMs and SMS platforms

– Must be organized, reliable, and fully independent



How to Apply:



We only review serious applications from experienced SMS specialists.



Apply using the link below:




/1uMRkxneOR1Kn0C3UdI9_6A1avdy



Incomplete applications or generic submissions will not be reviewed.

Type: Full-Time

About Us



We are a fast-growing U.S.-based real estate investment company focused exclusively on acquiring and expanding our portfolio of investment properties.



Our main goal is to connect with property owners and sellers who have off-market properties for sale.



What You’ll Be Doing (Daily)

 and

, LinkedIn, Instagram, TikTok).

title: AI Automation Virtual Assistant (White Label Resalable Solutions)
description:
AI Automation Virtual Assistant (White Label Resalable Solutions)

We’re seeking a highly skilled AI Automation Virtual Assistant who specializes in building resalable, white label automation solutions using Zapier, 
, and GoHighLevel (GHL). This role requires hands on experience creating real automation systems—not just theoretical knowledge—and the ability to provide examples of past workflow builds, templates, or automation assets.

You will be responsible for designing scalable automations, developing reusable templates, and setting up end to end systems that can be packaged and resold to clients.

Key Responsibilities

AI Automation & Workflow Development

•	Build reusable and white label automation templates using Zapier, 
, or GHL

•	Create end to end workflow automations for lead management, client onboarding, notifications, CRM tasks, and business operations

•	Develop AI assisted workflows combining LLMs, APIs, and CRM actions

•	Build custom automation systems for data capture, lead routing, task creation, user segmentation, and reporting

•	Optimize and refine existing automations for reliability, speed, and scale

•	Document workflow structure so templates can be resold and used by multiple clients

Chatbot & AI System Creation

•	Build reusable chatbot flows for GHL

•	Set up AI powered assistants for customer support, lead qualification, onboarding, and FAQs

•	Create white label chatbot templates that agencies can resell

•	Integrate chatbot actions with Zapier, 
, or GHL automations

Integration & System Setup

•	Connect CRMs, forms, landing pages, booking tools, and databases using automation platforms

•	Create standardized integrations clients can plug into (e.g., CRM setup packs, onboarding systems, lead nurture flows)

•	Build API based automations where no native integration exists

•	Maintain clean, well documented workflows ready for duplication and resale

Required Skills & Experience

•	Proven experience building automations in Zapier, 
, or GHL

•	Ability to provide screenshots, workflow maps, or examples of past automation work

•	Experience creating white label or resalable automation templates

•	Strong understanding of automation logic, triggers, branching, and error handling

•	Ability to turn business processes into streamlined, automated systems

•	Strong documentation and communication skills

Nice to Have

•	Experience with chatbot builders

•	Familiarity with AI content or AI agent tools

•	Ability to create simple process diagrams or SOPs

•	Basic design skills for template presentation (optional)

To Apply

Please include examples of your automation work, such as:

•	Screenshots of Zapier, Make, or GHL workflows

•	Reusable templates you've built

•	Examples of white label or resalable automations

•	Workflow maps, documentation, or links to past projects

title: Controller
description:
Introduction:

We are a fast growing e-commerce business. We have a strong fan base and customer base. We provide top quality products and top tier customer service. As our controller, your role is a hybrid between accounting, building systems/SOPs and operations. 



Responsibilities:

Invoicing wholesalers, tracking payments

Updating wholesalers sheet, modified orders sheet

Booking expenses and receipt management

Tracking revenue and COGS by product

Monthly close and reconciliations

Generating and reviewing financial reports

Building a treasury system



Operating tasks:

Inventory tracking

Ad hoc operational tasks



Requirements:



CPA required. In-depth understanding and experience (1-3 years) with Shopify, QuickBooks, Google Drive, Google Sheet



Excellent English communication. C2 Mastery required. 



The requirement for English is very high for this role, you need to be very fluent in English



You will be on a screenshare with the team for your shift every time. You will be coming to the “office” to work virtually



The shift is from 9:30pm - 5:30am local Philippines time. It is required that you are already on this night shift schedule for at least 6 months with a previous employer



How To Apply:



For the subject line of your application, please do the following steps:

Go to our
 page 
 and find our website. Visit the website and find the t-shirt for sale which has a picture of Alex Pagulayan on it. The words written on the t-shirt + the word Bookkeeper will be your ‘subject line’ to write.

title: Ecommerce Virtual Assistant – Shopify & Amazon Affiliate
description:

We are seeking a detail oriented and experienced Ecommerce Virtual Assistant to support our Shopify store and Amazon Affiliate operations. This role is ideal for someone with hands on experience managing ecommerce tasks, optimising product listings, supporting affiliate content creation, and improving day to day store workflows.

You will play an important role in enhancing efficiency across ecommerce operations, product management, content workflows, and customer experience.

title: Sales & Production Coordinator – US Client Relations (Neutral Accent Required)
description:
Company: STX Promo | 
 



Location: Remote (Philippines-based) 



Work Hours: Full-Time, U.S. Day Shift (Philippine Overnight) + Light weekend inbox rotation 



Pay Range: $1,100–$1,500/month (Includes premium pay for U.S. hours / Night Shift. Starting rate depends on experience). 



Perks & Benefits: Paid Time Off (PTO), observed US Holidays, end-of-year/performance bonuses (13th-month), and massive room for long-term growth. (Adjust these to fit your exact offerings!)





About STX Promo & Our Growth



STX Promo helps businesses and organizations Step Up Their Setup with eye-catching custom canopies, table covers, flags, banners, and more. We work with small businesses, schools, and nonprofits across the U.S. to elevate their brand presence at events and trade shows.



We are growing incredibly fast. Over the last 10 months alone, we’ve added 4 people to our core team along with several specialized gig workers. As we gear up for our busiest season yet, our current Sales and Production Coordinator is handling a massive volume of orders. We are actively hiring a second full-time coordinator to jump into the trenches, split the workload, and help us maintain our pro-level communication and zero-hassle client experience.





About the Role: Your Impact



We need a highly organized, proactive Sales & Production Coordinator who specializes in Client and Vendor Relations and Process Optimization.



In this role, you are the crucial bridge between our U.S. clients, our internal design team, and our manufacturing suppliers.



Communication Split (80%
 / 20% Phone): While this role is heavily
-based (about 80% of your communication via Gmail and Live Chat), the other 20% will involve speaking directly with our U.S. clients and vendors over the phone. You must be able to confidently handle calls, troubleshoot issues, and provide a friendly, premium customer experience. Because of this, flawless spoken English and a clear, neutral accent are absolute requirements.





Key Responsibilities:



Workflow Optimization: Actively analyze and improve our backend processes using ClickUp, Shopify, and Gmail.



Client Relations (80/20 Split): Manage daily incoming sales and customer service
s/chats, and confidently handle inbound phone inquiries with a friendly, US-facing tone.



Vendor Management: Place precise orders through supplier portals, track delivery times, and troubleshoot delays directly with vendors.



Production Coordination: Collaborate heavily with our Graphic Design team to confirm print graphics and prepare files for handoff.



Workflow Tracking: Organize project priorities using ClickUp. Maintain organized client files within Google Drive.



Schedule & Light Weekend Rotation: Work a consistent Monday–Friday U.S. daytime schedule. You will split a light weekend inbox rotation with our current coordinator (you will not work every weekend) to ensure clients aren't left hanging and deals are closed quickly.





? You're a Great Fit If You Have:



Top-Tier English & Neutral Accent: Extensive experience working directly with U.S.-based clients over voice/phone (US BPO/Call Center experience is a massive plus). You must possess a strong understanding of American business communication and have a clear, neutral accent.



Operational Mindset: You are a problem solver who naturally looks for ways to make systems run smoother.



Vendor/Client Experience: A solid background in managing supplier relationships and keeping clients happy.



Extreme Attention to Detail: You must be hyper-vigilant when approving graphics and placing orders.



Grace Under Pressure: You thrive in a fast-paced environment and keep your cool during the "busy season."



How to Apply (Please Read Carefully):



To ensure your application stands out, you MUST submit the following two items. Applications missing either of these will be immediately deleted.



A Voice Intro (REQUIRED): Please provide a link to a 1-to-2-minute voice recording (you can use a free tool like 
). 



Introduce yourself, highlight your experience dealing with US clients on the phone, and tell us why you are a great fit for this role. We use this to evaluate your spoken English and "phone voice," so please speak naturally and confidently!



Your updated Resume/CV.



We look forward to hearing your intro and finding the next crucial member of our growing team!

?

title: Video Editor/Graphic Designer
description:
Location: Remote (Work from Home)

Salary: PHP 350 – 500 per hour

Employment Type: Part-time

Required Experience: 1-2 years



About Sparkblaze Digital



Sparkblaze Digital is a digital marketing and advertising company that helps businesses grow through data-driven online advertising. Our team focuses on creating and managing paid media campaigns that generate high-quality leads and measurable results for our clients.

We specialize in platforms such as Google and Meta Ads, helping companies reach the right audience at the right time. One of the industries we support is education and consulting services, where we run lead generation campaigns that connect families with premium academic preparation services. We are a fully remote team, and we are looking for motivated Filipino talent who want to grow their career in digital advertising.



What You'll Do



As a Video Editor, you will help create engaging video content used for advertising, marketing, and social media campaigns.

Your responsibilities may include:

• Editing raw footage into engaging short-form videos

• Adding captions, transitions, music, and basic graphics

• Repurposing long-form videos into shorter clips for social media

• Optimizing videos for platforms like
, Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube

• Collaborating with the marketing team to produce content for campaigns

• Organizing video assets and maintaining editing files



What Are We Looking For?



We are looking for someone who has basic to intermediate video editing skills and is passionate about creating engaging digital content.



You should have experience or knowledge in:

• Video editing using tools like Adobe Premiere Pro, CapCut, or similar software

• Editing short-form videos for social media

• Adding captions, simple motion graphics, and transitions

• Understanding pacing, storytelling, and viewer engagement

• Optimizing videos for social media formats and platforms

• Basic audio editing and background music integration



You do not need to be an expert, but you should be comfortable learning new editing techniques and improving your skills.



Who Are We Looking For?



We are looking for an A-player — a results-driven professional who takes pride in delivering performance.



• A recent graduate or early-career creative professional

• Has 1–2 years of experience in video editing or content creation

• Creative and has a good eye for storytelling and visuals

• Familiar with social media video trends

• Detail-oriented and organized

• Able to work remotely and meet deadlines

• Interested in building a long-term career in digital content and marketing



Why Join Sparkblaze Digital



• Fully remote work setup

• Competitive hourly pay

• Opportunity to work on real marketing campaigns

• Build a strong video editing portfolio

• Work with a growing digital marketing team



If you're passionate about video editing, digital content, and creative storytelling, we would love to hear from you.

Apply now and start your career with Sparkblaze Digital.



Application date: 23rd March – 23rd April 2026

title: Media Buyer (PPC Specialist)
description:
Location: Remote (Work from Home)

Salary: PHP 35,000 – 70,000 per month

Employment Type: Full-time or Part-time

Required Experience: 3-5 years



About Sparkblaze Digital



Sparkblaze Digital is a digital marketing and advertising company that helps businesses grow through data-driven online advertising. Our team focuses on creating and managing paid media campaigns that generate high-quality leads and measurable results for our clients.

We specialize in platforms such as Google Ads and Meta Ads, helping companies reach the right audience at the right time. One of the industries we support is education and consulting services, where we run lead generation campaigns that connect families with premium academic preparation services. We are a fully remote team, and we are looking for motivated Filipino talent who want to grow their career in digital advertising.



Our team works remotely and focuses on performance, accountability, and results. We are now looking for a seasoned Media Buyer (PPC Specialist) who can take ownership of campaigns and drive measurable growth.



What You'll Do



As a Media Buyer (PPC Specialist), you will be responsible for managing, optimizing, and scaling paid advertising campaigns across multiple platforms.



Your responsibilities include:

• Managing and scaling campaigns on Google Ads and Meta Ads Manager

• Developing campaign strategies focused on lead generation and ROI

• Conducting advanced keyword research, audience targeting, and funnel optimization

• Writing and testing high-converting ad copy and creatives

• Monitoring and optimizing performance based on CTR, CPC, CPA, ROAS, and conversion rates

• Implementing and troubleshooting tracking using Google Tag Manager

• Identifying scaling opportunities and improving lead quality

• Analyzing data and presenting insights and recommendations

• Collaborating with the team on creatives, landing pages, and campaign strategy



What Are We Looking For?



We are looking for a high-performing PPC specialist who is confident in managing and scaling campaigns.



You should have:

• 3–5 years of proven experience in media buying / PPC

• Strong expertise in Google Ads and Meta Ads Manager

• Google Ads (AdWords) Certification

• Deep understanding of campaign structure, bidding strategies, and optimization

• Strong knowledge of conversion tracking, attribution, and analytics

• Experience optimizing for lead quality, not just volume

• Ability to confidently manage budgets and scale campaigns

• Strong analytical and problem-solving skills

• Ability to work independently and take full ownership of campaigns



Who Are We Looking For?



We are looking for an A-player — a results-driven professional who takes pride in delivering performance.



You are someone who:

• Has 3–5 years of hands-on experience and is confident in your skills

• Is a mid to senior-level media buyer

• Thinks strategically and executes with precision

• Is highly accountable and results-oriented

• Can diagnose and solve campaign performance issues independently

• Communicates clearly and works well in a remote team

• Is proactive, detail-oriented, and performance-driven

• Can provide at least 2 reference checks from former managers or clients

• Handled local service campaigns (plumbing, home services, etc.) — experience in this vertical is a strong plus



Why Join Sparkblaze Digital?



• Fully remote work setup

• Flexible (Part-time or Full-time opportunities available)

• Competitive monthly salary aligned with experience

• Opportunity to manage and scale high-impact campaigns

• Work with a performance-driven and fast-growing team

• Continuous learning and growth in digital marketing



If you are a confident, experienced PPC specialist ready to take ownership of campaigns and drive real results.

Apply now and start your career with Sparkblaze Digital.



Application date: 23rd March – 23rd April 2026

Global E-commerce Jewelry Brand

This role is focused on supporting daily financial operations while using spreadsheets as your main tool to keep everything accurate, structured, and under control.



You will work with real financial data across payment processors, banks, advertising platforms, and suppliers. Your work directly impacts how well the company understands its numbers and makes decisions.



If you are detail-oriented, structured, and comfortable working with data, this is a strong opportunity to build real experience in e-commerce finance.

Data Accuracy

* High attention to detail

Nice to Have (Not Required)

What This Role Offers

This role is ideal for someone who is strong with spreadsheets and wants to apply those skills in a real finance environment with real impact.

title: Ad Creative Motion Designer
description:
We are looking for a part-time Ad Creative Motion Designer to help us recreate high-performing ad formats for an AI-powered body analysis and fitness coaching startup.

--

Your main job is to study a reference ad, understand exactly how it works, and then rebuild the same style and structure using our own scripts, texts, images, voice-over, and branding assets.

--

This is not a generic video editing role.

--

We need someone who can reverse-engineer an ad format and reproduce:

 pacing

 narrative structure

 transitions

 subtitle style

 visual hook

 scene-by-scene flow

 layout and visual hierarchy

--

You must be able to look at a Meta ad reference and recreate the editing logic very closely using our own assets.

This position starts as a 1-month part-time contract.



 If the collaboration goes well, there may be a full-time opportunity afterward.

--

What you will do

Study reference ads fro
ta ad libraries

 Analyze whether the ad can realistically be recreated with the assets provided

 Confirm feasibility before starting production

 Recreate the ad structure as closely as possible using our own assets

 Match the pacing, rhythm, transitions, subtitle style, hook logic, and scene sequencing

 Edit and organize deliverables for multiple aspect ratios

 Export final files cleanly and keep source files organized

 Occasionally make simple visual cutouts or retouching when needed

 Implement feedback quickly and accurately

--

Formats

You will create ads in:

 9:16

 1:1

 4:5

 16:9

--

Video length will typically range from:

 60 seconds

 up to 2 minutes

--

Expected initial volume:

 around 20 to 30 videos over the first month

--

What we need from you

Strong motion design and ad editing skills

 Ability to recreate a reference ad format very closely

 Strong attention to detail

 Strong understanding of ad hooks, retention, direct-response editing, and Meta or TikTok performance creatives

 Good to very good written English

 Ability to understand references in English without needing excessive explanation

 Ability to follow visual instructions, written instructions, and Loom feedback

 Fast turnaround and good responsiveness

--

Important

Before starting any ad, you must be able to clearly say one of these two things:

 “Yes, I can reproduce this format accurately”

 or

 “No, this cannot be matched properly with the current assets”

--

If you are not confident that you can match the reference closely, you must say so before production starts.

We prefer honesty and precision over guessing.

--

Preferred background

We strongly prefer candidates with experience in one or more of these areas:

 beauty

 skincare

 face analysis

 AI products

 fitness, health, or aesthetics offers

 performance marketing creatives

--

Tools

You can use the tools you are strongest with, as long as the output quality is excellent.

However, we are not looking for candidates who work only with Canva or CapCut mobile.

A professional editing workflow is expected.

--

Deliverables

You must provide:

 final MP4 exports

 source project files

 organized working files

--

All files will be shared and managed through Google Drive.

--

Working setup

Part-time

 4 hours per day

 5 days per week

 1-month trial to start

 Partial overlap with Dubai time is preferred

--

Expected pace:

 first draft within 24 hours when assigned

 then 1 to 2 videos per day depending on complexity

 fast same-day iterations when needed

--

Compensation

$400/month

 Part-time

 Trial starts with a test project

 There is a full-time opportunity for the right person

--

Revisions

We expect someone who can integrate feedback quickly and accurately.

Revisions are not formally capped, but they must stay within reason.

--

 We want someone who understands feedback fast and does not need the same explanation multiple times.

Paid test

Shortlisted candidates will complete one test ad.

Test format

You will receive one reference ad and our own text, script, and assets.

 You will first analyze whether the ad is realistically reproducible.

 Then you will create one recreated version using our assets.

Test payment

$30, paid only if the result matches the brief very closely.

--

What we evaluate

Fidelity to the reference style

 Execution speed

 Clean editing

 Attention to detail

 Ability to follow instructions exactly

--

How to apply

Please send:

 3 to 5 ad examples

 At least 1 beauty, skincare, face, or aesthetic-related example

 A Google Drive, Loom, or portfolio link

--

For each example, briefly explain:

 what part you personally made

 which tools you used

 how long it took you

--

At the beginning of your application, write the word:

 PRECISION

--

Applications without this keyword will be ignored.

--

Please also answer these 5 questions in your application:

Have you already recreated ads from a reference video before?

Which software do you use most for this kind of work?

 you only edit with Canva or mobile apps

 you cannot closely recreate a reference ad style

 you struggle with written English instructions

 you need very detailed hand-holding on every edit

 your portfolio does not include performance-style ads

--

We are looking for someone who is precise, visually sharp, fast, reliable, detail-oriented, comfortable with performance ad formats, and capable of recreating an ad style with a very high level of fidelity.

This is a strong fit for someone who enjoys breaking down winning creatives and rebuilding them with discipline.

title: Lead Generation and Data Research VA — Transportation Industry (Full-Time-EST-8AM-5PM EST)
description:
About Us

LimozX is a growing SaaS platform built for the ground transportation industry. We work with limo and black car services, NEMT providers, airport transfer companies, shuttle operators, corporate fleets, hotels with transport partnerships, and travel agencies around the world. Our platform helps operators run their businesses more efficiently, from dispatch and booking through to billing and fleet management.

We are expanding quickly and building out our sales team. That starts here, with someone who can find the right people for us to reach out to every day.

About the Role

This is a full-time, long-term position. You will be the foundation of our outbound sales operation, responsible for finding and organizing the companies we contact every day.

You will research transportation businesses worldwide, verify their contact information, and keep our CRM clean and up to date. The sales team depends entirely on the accuracy and consistency of your work, so attention to detail and reliability are everything in this role.

If you take pride in doing things right, work well without constant supervision, and communicate proactively when something is unclear, this role was built for you.

What You Will Do

• Research transportation companies worldwide, including limo and black car services, NEMT providers, airport ground transport operators, corporate shuttle companies, hotel concierge and transport departments, and travel agencies

• Collect and verify company details such as phone numbers,
 addresses, websites, and service types

• Organize and clean data in Google Sheets, so it is accurate and easy to work with

• Upload verified leads into our CRM and keep all records properly tagged and categorized by segment and status

• Prepare daily call lists for the sales team based on the leads you have researched

• Track invalid numbers and bounced
s and flag them for removal

• Follow instructions carefully, meet daily output targets, and let us know immediately if anything is unclear

What We Are Looking For

These are non-negotiable. Please apply only if you genuinely meet every one of them.

• Fluent written English with clear, professional communication

• Strong experience in lead generation or data research, ideally in a B2B or SaaS environment

• Excellent Google Sheets skills, including organizing, cleaning, and formatting large datasets

• High attention to detail and a commitment to accuracy, not just speed

• Reliable and consistent, with the ability to manage your own daily workload independently

• Stable internet connection with no frequent dropouts

• Available to overlap at least 4 hours with US Eastern Time, Monday through Friday. Candidates from all countries are welcome to apply.

• Able to follow written instructions exactly as given, without needing repeated follow-up

Compensation

• $2-$3 per hour

• Full-time, long-term position

• Performance bonuses based on output quality and accuracy

• Salary review after 90 days for strong performers

How to Apply

To be considered, you must submit all five of the following. Applications missing any one item will not be reviewed.

1. Voice recording. Record a 1 to 2-minute voice introduction using LOOM and share the link with your application.

2. Video introduction. Please record a brief introduction video using Loom (
). Once you are done, copy the video link and include it with your application. Make sure your video is set to "Anyone with the link can view" so we can access it.

3. Resume. Attach your most recent resume. Make sure it is up to date and reflects your relevant experience.

4. Sample lead list. Share a small sample of a lead list you have built before. Remove any sensitive or confidential information before sending.

5. Availability. Please share your weekly availability and preferred working hours. Let us know which hours overlap with US Eastern Time. Candidates from all time zones are welcome as long as you can meet the minimum overlap requirement.

A Final Note

We are not looking for someone who sends applications to a hundred jobs at once. We are looking for someone who has read this carefully, meets the requirements, and genuinely wants to build something with us long-term. If that sounds like you, we would love to hear from you.

title: Graphics designer
description: I am looking for a designer who can both generate good design ideas and create simple, clean artwork based on those ideas. The designs will usually be minimal vector-style graphics such as animal outlines, country outlines, hearts, crosses, and similar simple shapes. I can provide general themes, but I want someone who is also good at coming up with original ideas independently. The designs should be clean, attractive, and easy to produce. The exact number of designs is not fixed. Some designs may take longer to research or create than others, and that is okay. Some days you may complete many designs, while on other days you may complete fewer depending on the complexity of the work. My target is around 25–40 simple designs per week, but quality, originality, and overall effort matter more to me than hitting an exact number every day. I am more focused on strong results and consistent output than exact hours worked.

title: Performance Marketing Manager
description:
PropZap — We’re Building a Dream Team to Shape the Future of Real Estate in North America.



We are not building just another brokerage.



We are building a scalable real estate platform designed to modernize how homes are bought and sold — through systems, technology, disciplined execution, and long-term vision.



Our ambition is not incremental growth.

It is structured, North American scale.



And we are intentionally building a high-caliber team aligned with that mission.



If you are driven by measurable impact.

If you believe performance marketing should compound over time.

If you want to build infrastructure, not just campaigns.



We want you to take the helm of our growth engine.



--------------------------------------------------------------



Role: Performance Marketing Manager

Location: Remote

Shift: Aligned with Canada MST

Role Type: Any

Compensation: 50,000 PHP+

Company: PropZap — Building the next-generation real estate platform for North America



This is a revenue-accountable growth leadership role.



You are directly responsible for building and scaling the paid acquisition engine that fuels expansion.



You will not simply execute instructions.



You will lead marketing performance strategy.



Your performance will be measured by qualified lead volume, conversion efficiency, disciplined optimization, and the strength of the systems you build.



You are expected to be the internal expert for marketing matters — the person leadership turns to for strategic insight, innovative ideas, and informed recommendations.



--------------------------------------------------------------



Your Core Responsibilities:



Meta Ads Leadership (Most Critical)

• Manage and scale large-budget Meta Ads campaigns

• Architect structured campaign systems designed for scale

• Plan ad angles, hooks, positioning, and creative strategy

• Write high-converting direct-response copy

• Produce graphic and video ad creatives (for ads)

• Execute disciplined A/B testing frameworks

• Optimize based on cost per qualified lead and full-funnel data



You must have proven, hands-on experience managing significant ad budgets.



Landing Page Optimization (Squarespace)

• Optimize and improve our existing landing page (
)

• Increase conversion rates through structured experimentation

• Refine messaging clarity and CTA effectiveness

• Improve user journey and reduce friction

• Ensure advanced tracking accuracy



Future scope may include additional landing pages and funnel expansion as we scale.



 Marketing & Lead Management (HubSpot)

• Build and optimize structured
 nurture systems

• Segment and organize both new and existing leads

• Implement disciplined tagging and CRM organization

• Improve engagement and conversion rates

• Maintain clean, scalable list architecture

• Ensure seamless handoff of qualified leads



Analytics, Tracking & Attribution

• Implement advanced tracking systems (Pixel, CAPI, UTM strategy)

• Maintain CRM attribution clarity from click to handoff

• Analyze full-funnel performance, not surface metrics

• Identify bottlenecks and propose structured improvements

• Document A/B tests and build repeatable optimization frameworks



Marketing Leadership & Innovation

• Proactively propose innovative growth strategies

• Stay current with emerging trends, tools, platforms, and advertising strategies

• Evaluate new opportunities and recommend adoption when appropriate

• Serve as the internal authority on paid growth and performance marketing

• Guide leadership decisions with data and informed insight



You are not just executing campaigns.



You are setting direction.



--------------------------------------------------------------



Who You Are:



You are driven by growth, ownership, and long-term impact.

• Proven, hands-on experience managing large Meta Ads budgets

• Deep understanding of direct-response marketing and buyer psychology

• Ability to independently plan creative angles and performance strategy

• Strong copywriting and positioning skills

• Comfortable producing ad creatives when required

• Strong analytical thinking and disciplined testing mindset

• Structured in documentation and optimization

• Accountable for measurable outcomes

• Continuously learning and staying ahead of platform changes and trends



Highly Ideal:

• Real estate marketing experience

• Experience promoting brokerages to attract agents

• Experience generating buyer and seller leads

• Understanding how to position real estate services competitively



Requirements:

• Demonstrated success managing large Meta Ads budgets

• Strong landing page optimization experience

• Advanced analytics and tracking knowledge

• Experience using HubSpot for segmentation and
 marketing

• Experience implementing structured A/B testing systems

• Reliable remote setup



Bonus If You Have:

• SEO experience

• Google Ads experience

• AI tools and automation knowledge

• Zapier or workflow automation experience

• Advanced CRM tagging and list organization skills



--------------------------------------------------------------



What We Offer:

• A long-term opportunity inside a scaling North American proptech platform

• Direct collaboration with founders

• Meaningful ownership of paid acquisition performance

• The opportunity to architect and refine the company’s growth engine

• Clear path toward future Head of Marketing

• Real influence on continental expansion



We are building a team designed to scale.



The platform is expanding.

The systems are strengthening.

The ambition is long-term.



We are looking for someone who sees themselves not just as a marketing manager — but as the growth leader who helps steer the direction of a North American real estate platform.



--------------------------------------------------------------



How to Apply



Send the following to: 



• Resume (required)

• Portfolio (required)

• Case studies or performance summaries of Meta campaigns (required)

• Summary of budgets managed (required)

• Intro video (preferred)

• Expected monthly compensation (required)

• Internet speed test link (required)

• Any DISC test result (if available)



Subject Line: Performance Marketing Manager – Your Name



NOTE: Failure to follow the application instructions exactly will result in disqualification. Attention to detail matters, and the application process reflects the level of discipline we value.



If you are ready to take the helm of our growth engine and help build the future of real estate in North America, we want to hear from you.

Basic English understanding

title: Phone Research Assistant - Call Landscaping Companies in Phoenix (75-125 calls)
description:
I'm conducting market research on artificial turf installation business in the Phoenix, Arizona metro area and need a VA to make 80-100 phone calls to local turf/landscaping companies.



Your role: Call companies and inquire about services and pricing. Through natural conversation, you'll gather key information about each company (availability, pricing, licensing, service area). This is NOT sales — you're simply having conversations and collecting data.

Note: Some companies on the list are suppliers (sell turf but don't install). For those, you'll just ask about material pricing and move on quickly.



What You'll Be Doing:

Task 1: Customer Inquiry Calls (80-100 calls)



- Call artificial turf companies from a list I'll provide

- First, determine if they do installations or are just a supplier

For INSTALLERS: Ask about availability, pricing, service area, and licensing as a customer would

For SUPPLIERS: Quick call to get material pricing, then move on

- Log all responses in a Google Sheet I'll provide

- Flag high-priority companies based on criteria I'll give you



Task 2: Subcontractor Outreach (15-20 contacts)

- Search Craigslist,
 Groups, and Indeed for independent turf installers in Phoenix

- Reach out to see if they're interested in subcontract work

- Gather info on their experience, equipment, insurance, and rates

- Log everything in a separate sheet



Deliverables:

- Completed Google Sheet with data from all calls

- Priority list of top 10-15 companies worth following up with

- List of 10-15 potential subcontractors



Project Details:

- Total calls/contacts:
Estimated hours: 20-25 hours

- Timeline: Complete within 7-10 days of starting

- Working style: Independent — I'll provide detailed scripts and briefing docs, you execute



What I'll Provide:

- List of companies to call with phone numbers

- Detailed briefing document

- Call scripts and suggested phrases (not word-for-word, just guidance)

- Google Sheet template for logging everything

- Support via text/phone if you have questions



Ideal Candidate:

- Clear, natural English speaking voice (slight accent is fine)

- Experience with phone-based research or cold calling

- Comfortable having casual conversations (not robotic script-reading)

- Reliable, organized, and detail-oriented

- Available to work during US business hours (Arizona is MST, no daylight saving)



To Apply:

Please answer these questions in your proposal:



1. Have you done phone-based research or cold calling before? Are you familiar with Google Sheets? Briefly describe.

2. Are you comfortable posing as a customer to gather information?

3. What hours are you available in Arizona time (PST)?

4. Record a 30-second voice memo introducing yourself (upload to Google Drive or Loom and share the link) — I want to hear how you sound on the phone.



Looking forward to working with you!

title: Systems Engineering, Implementation & Adoption (SaaS Implementation Specialist)
description:
We are seeking a SaaS Implementation Specialist to act as our dedicated systems implementation and enablement lead. This is not general IT support. It is a hands on, execution focused specialist role responsible for engineering, configuring, implementing, documenting, and training staff on SaaS platforms across the organization.



This role ensures systems are properly designed, integrated, adopted, and supported not just turned on. Success is measured by stable implementations, strong staff adoption, and systems that reflect real operational workflows.



Key Responsibilities:



- Migration from Jotform?based tracking to SOS Inventory

- Integration with QuickBooks Online (QBO) and Shopify

- Design of intake, routing, prioritization, and resolution workflows

- Assist evaluation and rollout of staff scheduling and client appointment applications

- Optimization of Teams, SharePoint, permissions, automation, and documentation

- Support for SSO/MFA?aligned SaaS integrations

- Ongoing Systems Support & Improvement



Required Skills and Experience



- Minimum 3 years’ experience implementing or administering SaaS platforms

- Strong understanding of business systems, workflows, and integrations

- Demonstrated experience with: Inventory, ticketing, scheduling, or operations systems, Microsoft 365 (Teams, SharePoint, permissions, user management)

- Experience with QuickBooks Online, Shopify, inventory, or logistics platforms

- Familiarity with healthcare, nonprofit, or service?based operations

- Excellent written and spoken English

- Strong documentation and training skills



As part of our screening process, candidates are required to submit a short Loom video (maximum 5 minutes). This allows us to better understand your experience, communication style, and ability to deliver value in a virtual environment.

 

Please Cover the Following in Your Video:



1. Your SaaS implementation experience – what systems have you implemented or led end?to?end? 



2. An example implementation – briefly walk through a system you helped design, configure, and roll out. 



3. Your approach to staff training & adoption – how do you help non?technical staff succeed with new systems? 



4. Tools & platforms you’ve worked with – Inventory, ticketing, scheduling, accounting, Microsoft 365, automation, etc. 



5. Availability & work setup – Hours, time zone, internet reliability, and remote readiness. 



How to Submit

 

- Please include a shareable Loom link with your application or reply. 

- Applicants with no introduction video will not be considered or advanced in the screening process.

title: SEO Account Specialist
description:
Who We Are

We're a fast-growing startup with one primary goal: to become the most-efficient marketing agency in the world. We work hard, we swear a bit, and we have a great time doing it. If you're looking for a laid-back, punch-the-clock gig — this isn't it. We set big goals, we chase them relentlessly, and if you're with us, you'll be climbing the ladder fast. No politics, no BS.



Core Values

Relentless Drive — We don't shy away from challenges. Whether it's tough work or difficult conversations, we power through with grit and determination. We demand excellence from our team.

World-Class Accountability — Every tea
mber is held to a high standard. We're chasing greatness, and that requires world-class effort and attention to detail from everyone.

Radical Transparency — We're an open book. If there's an issue that's our fault, speak up. We handle things like professionals — no drama, just real solutions.



About the Role

The SEO Account Specialist plays a vital role on our team, owning the day-to-day execution of client SEO campaigns from start to finish. You'll work across a roster of clients in the home services space and be responsible for driving real, measurable results — not just activity metrics.



Here's what autonomy actually looks like at our company: you won't have someone breathing down your neck every hour. We trust the people we hire to get the job done. What you WILL have is a regular, structured meeting cadence with the owner to align on project timelines, flag any blockers, and set priorities for the week ahead. We believe in giving our people space to do their best work — but we move fast, communicate clearly, and expect you to do the same.



As we continue to grow, this role has a clear path toward a management position where you'll oversee other specialists, influence operations, and help shape the future of the team.



What You'll Own

On-Page SEO

Optimize headings (H1–H4), meta titles, and meta descriptions across client websites

Write and update body copy aligned with target keywords and conversion goals

Identify structural issues, keyword gaps, and content opportunities on client sites



Google Business Profile (GBP) Optimization

Manage and optimize GBP categories, services, and products for each client

Maintain a consistent posting cadence: 2 photo posts per week per client, 1 Update per week per client

Spot opportunities for profile improvements that drive map pack visibility



Analytics & Tracking

Set up and maintain Google Analytics 4 (GA4) — you must be an expert here, not just familiar

Build out Google Tag Manager (GTM) configurations including triggers, tags, and conversion tracking

Ensure clean data flows across all client accounts — if the tracking is wrong, the decisions are wrong



Reporting & Client Management

Own and update SEO Master Sheets for each client, keeping data current and accurate

Proactively identify opportunities for improvement across client websites, GBPs, and overall SEO health

Flag blockers, risks, or delays early — never go radio silent on an issue



AI-Assisted Execution

Leverage AI platforms (Claude, ChatGPT, etc.) to improve output quality and workflow efficiency

Craft effective prompts that produce accurate, assumption-free responses — vague prompts produce garbage; we expect precision

Use AI as a force multiplier, not a crutch — your judgment still drives the work



The Non-Negotiables

This section is here for a reason. We've worked with people who were talented but unreliable, communicative but dishonest, and hardworking but incompetent. We're done with all of it. The person who fills this role will embody the following — without exception.



Highly Competent

You don't just know Local SEO — you've done the work and have case studies. You can look at a client's GBP, website, or analytics setup and immediately know what's broken, what's missing, and what will move the needle. You don't need your hand held on the fundamentals, and you don't guess when you don't know — you find the answer.



Radically Reliable

If you say you'll do something, it gets done. Deadlines aren't suggestions. Client deliverables aren't afterthoughts. You're the kind of person your teammates and your boss can count on without having to check in. Reliability at this company isn't a bonus trait — it's table stakes.



Completely Honest

We don't want yes-people. If something's going wrong, we want to know immediately — not after it's blown up. If you made a mistake, own it fast and come with a fix. If a client's expectations are unrealistic, speak up. Dishonesty and spin have no place here, and neither does silence when you know something's off.



Highly Communicative

This is a remote role. That means communication is your lifeline. You will have regular check-ins with the owner to discuss what's in progress, what's blocked, and what's coming next. Outside of those meetings, you're expected to be proactively communicative — not waiting to be asked. Quick Slack message when something's done. A heads-up when you're behind. A question before you go down a rabbit hole. Silence is not professionalism here; it's a red flag.



What We're Looking For

Minimum 5 years in an SEO role within a digital agency setting

Deep expertise in Local SEO fundamentals: on-page, off-page, and GBP optimization

Expert-level Google Analytics 4 and Google Tag Manager skills — must be verifiable

Proven experience with AI platforms (Claude, ChatGPT, etc.) and effective prompt engineering

Exceptional written and verbal communication skills — you can explain complex things clearly

High attention to detail with strong organizational skills across multiple client accounts

Self-motivated and growth-oriented — you want to be great, not just good enough



Why Join Us

We're not just another agency grinding through the motions. We're building something real, and we're doing it fast. Here's what that means for you:



Uncapped Career Growth — This job WILL have the ability to potentially become a Lead SEO. Do great work, move up fast. Management opportunities are real and close.

No Micromanagement — We hire adults. You'll have clear expectations, regular owner check-ins to keep projects moving, and then the autonomy to execute. We don't babysit.

Collaborative Culture — Small team, big goals, zero politics. We celebrate wins together and solve problems directly.

Professional Development — We invest in people who invest in themselves. Continuous learning is expected and supported.



One Last Thing

We work extremely hard. If you're not prepared to bring your best every single day alongside a passionate, highly motivated team, this role isn't for you — and that's okay.... BUT if you're ready to own your work, communicate without being asked, deliver without being chased, and grow faster than you would anywhere else — we want to hear from you.



Include "88" in your job submission subject line so we know you've read this whole description



Include your Resume & Portfolio in your application for the team's review, thanks!
