title: Full-Time Assistant
description:
Overview:

I’m hiring a full-time Assistant to handle tasks like property list cleaning and preparation, market selection and pricing, handling transactions, etc for my land investing business. This is a focused execution role.



If you are detail-oriented, reliable, and comfortable working with spreadsheets and structured rules, this role will be a strong fit.



Tasks include (but not limited to):

- Removing duplicate records

- Cleaning and standardizing data

- Fixing formatting inconsistencies

- Maintaining strict column order

- Exporting clean CSV files

- Performing basic quality checks before submission

- Selecting markets to mail to

- Pricing those markets



All tasks would be taught to you through Loom or Google Meet. 



Required Skills (Non-Negotiable)

- Strong attention to detail

- Ability to follow step-by-step instructions exactly

- Clear written communication

- Basic Excel or Google Sheets skills, including:

- Sorting and filtering data

- Removing duplicates

- Copying and pasting.

- Exporting clean CSV files

- Comfortable using ChatGPT or similar AI tools (AI tools like ChatGPT are used for clarification and support, not judgment.)



Pay & Schedule

- $4–$6 per hour, based on experience (exceptional work will be rewarded with

performance-based bonuses.)

- Full-time (40 hours/week)

- Work hours anytime between 9pm MST – 7pm MST. 

- Sloppy or inconsistent work will result in the role ending quickly. Clear quality standards will be provided in writing, so expectations are explicit.



Application Deadline:

Applications must be submitted no later than Tuesday, March 24th, at 6:00 PM MST.

Late submissions will not be reviewed.



How to Apply (Read Carefully)



Applications that do not follow instructions exactly will not be reviewed.



Step 1: Complete the application task

Note:

The application task includes a short Loom video with step-by-step instructions. Some steps may require careful review, judgment, and copying work exactly as demonstrated. This is intentional and reflects the level of attention to detail required for this role. This task rewards careful observation more than speed.



Download the sample CSV file here or make a copy:





Using Excel or Google Sheets, watch the Loom and complete the following steps exactly:





Pricing Input for This Test:

Use a PPA of $5,000 for all Column L.



Cash Offer will be 50% of Market Value (Column M)



Duplicates Formula is the following:

=IF(COUNTIF($F:$F,F2)>1,"Duplicate","")



Export the final file as a CSV.



Step 2: Submit your submission on OnlineJobsPH



Subject line (must match exactly):

STILLPOINT – Assistant Application



Your submission must include all of the following:

1. The completed CSV file

2. File name format:

Stillpoint_ListCleaningTest.csv

3. Your resume



Important Notes

- Do not guess or go beyond the instructions

- Do not change column order or column names

- Do not submit screenshots or links — CSV file only

- Missing attachments, incorrect file names, or incorrect subject lines will result in rejection



Applicants who pass this step will be considered for the role.

title: Real Estate Data Research VA
description:
Please review this job post completely before applying.



Job Title: Real Estate Research & Data Analyst (Virtual Assistant)

Type: Full-Time, Long-Term

Hours: 40 hrs/week (EST)

Location: Remote

Start Date: Immediate (within 7 days)



About the Role



We are a U.S.-based real estate investment company actively acquiring off-market properties. We are looking for a Data Research Specialist to support our acquisitions team by cleaning, organizing, and preparing property data.



This is not a cold calling, marketing, or underwriting role. You will be working with data only — following instructions to identify qualified leads, maintain clean records, and provide accurate updates inside our systems.



If you’re detail-oriented, comfortable with large datasets, and confident in Excel and CRM work, this is a great long-term role for you.



What You’ll Do



? Organize and clean property records inside our CRM (REISift)

? Review and filter property data based on criteria we provide

? Upload/download lists from sources such as Zillow, PropStream, PropWire, and MLS (Jacksonville, FL)

? Use Excel/Google Sheets to clean and format bulk data sets

? Convert property reports from PDF to Excel using Tabula

? Flag qualified leads for the acquisitions team according to instructions

? Maintain accurate, consistent records and prepare weekly summaries of work completed



Must-Have Skills



? 2+ years working in real estate data research, list management, or related role

? Strong working knowledge of Zillow, MLS, REISift, PropStream, and PropWire

? Advanced Excel/Google Sheets skills (downloading, uploading, cleaning datasets, using formulas)

? Experience with PDF-to-Excel conversion tools (Tabula or similar)

? Detail-oriented and consistent — accuracy in data cleaning is critical

? Reliable computer and high-speed internet setup for daily full-time work

? Good written English for reporting and notes



Bonus Points



? Experience supporting U.S. real estate investment teams

? Familiarity with skip tracing workflows

? CRM experience (REISift preferred)

? Ability to handle large data sets without errors



Why Work With Us



? Stable, long-term role with consistent hours

? Professional U.S. real estate investment team

? Clear systems and instructions to follow

? Opportunity to grow into higher-level roles as the company expands



How to Apply (Read Carefully)



We do not accept direct applications on OnlineJobs.ph.



Apply only using this link:


/1uMRkxneOR1Kn0C3UdI9_6A1avdy



Only applications submitted via the above form will be reviewed.

title: Industrial Designer/Engineer - Hard & Soft Goods
description:
POSITION SUMMARY

We are seeking a talented and experienced Product Designer to join our design team. This role will focus on developing both hard goods (kitchenware, home décor, tableware, storage solutions) and soft goods (textiles, bedding, table linens, home accessories) for our seasonal product lines. The ideal candidate is proficient in Adobe Creative Suite, has strong textile and print design skills, and understands the product development process from concept through production.

 

KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

Design & Development:

• Create original designs for hard and soft goods across multiple home product categories

• Develop patterns, prints, and textile designs using Adobe Illustrator and Photoshop

• Design seasonal collections that align with market trends and brand direction

• Produce technical sketches, renderings, and detailed specifications for manufacturing

• Create colorways and maintain brand color standards across product lines

• Develop presentation boards and line sheets using Adobe InDesign

Product Development & Production:

• Manage products from initial concept through final production

• Create comprehensive technical specification packages including materials, construction details, and finishes

• Collaborate with overseas vendors and factories to ensure design integrity

• Review and approve prototypes, samples, and pre-production units

• Provide feedback and revisions to manufacturing partners

• Support quality control processes and address production issues

• Assist with cost analysis and value engineering when needed

Collaboration & Communication:

• Work cross-functionally with merchandising, sourcing, and sales teams

• Present design concepts and seasonal line reviews to internal stakeholders

• Research market trends, competitive products, and consumer preferences

• Attend trade shows and markets as needed

• Maintain organized design files, asset libraries, and documentation

 

REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS

Experience:

• 3-7 years of professional product design experience in hard and soft goods

• Proven track record designing home products, textiles, or related categories

• Experience working with overseas vendors and understanding of manufacturing processes

• Portfolio demonstrating strong design skills across multiple product categories

Technical Skills:

• Expert proficiency in Adobe Illustrator

• Expert proficiency in Adobe Photoshop

• Advanced proficiency in Adobe InDesign

• Strong understanding of textile and print design

• Ability to create camera-ready artwork and production files

• Knowledge of pattern development and repeats

• Technical specification writing experience

Design Capabilities:

• Strong understanding of color theory and trend forecasting

• Excellent visual communication and presentation skills

• Ability to translate concepts into commercially viable products

• Understanding of materials including ceramics, glass, metal, wood, textiles, and finishes

• Knowledge of manufacturing processes for both hard and soft goods

Professional Skills:

• Exceptional attention to detail and organizational abilities

• Strong time management skills with ability to handle multiple projects simultaneously

• Excellent communication and collaboration skills

• Problem-solving mindset with focus on practical solutions

• Adaptable to changing priorities in a fast-paced environment

• Self-motivated with ability to work independently and as part of a team

 

PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS

• Bachelor's degree in Product Design, Textile Design, Industrial Design, or related field

• Experience in the wholesale/import industry

• Knowledge of product safety standards and compliance requirements

• Proficiency in Adobe After Effects or Premiere

• Experience with CAD software

• Familiarity with retail market and consumer trends

• Trade show and market experience



To apply: Please submit your application through the provided link below:
